Learning Management System

Human Capital Management System · Nabati Group
Konsol Persona & Akses Pembelajaran

Tinjauan Persona & Akses (P1–P7)
  • Pembelajar — Karyawan, atasan, mentor: akses belajar & pengembangan
  • Pengelola L&D — Spesialis & Manager L&D: konten, program, analitik
  • Mitra HR (HCBP) — HRBP per BU, talent, OD: lintas unit & PT
  • Kepatuhan & Konten — Content owner / compliance: regulasi & audit
  • Eksekutif & Admin — CPO, CEO/BOD, Master Admin: kebijakan & pengawasan

Akses ditegakkan per modul & per persona. Navigasi & kewenangan menyesuaikan persona secara otomatis saat masuk.

Learning Management System
Alur Proses End-to-End

Learning Management System
End-to-End Process Flow

Dokumentasi alur kerja lengkap: dari kurasi konten hingga ROI analytics. Lima alur proses, 12 functional requirement, dan filosofi 70:20:10, didukung satu asisten AI, HC AI, di setiap tahap.

Comprehensive workflow documentation: from content curation to ROI analytics. Five process flows, 12 functional requirements, and the 70:20:10 philosophy, powered by a single AI assistant, HC AI, at every stage.

📋 Versi 1.0 (Feb 2026) 📋 Version 1.0 (Feb 2026) 🌎 32.000+ Karyawan · 9 Negara 🌎 32,000+ Employees · 9 Countries 📊 5 Alur · 12 FR 📊 5 Flows · 12 FRs 🔄 Filosofi 70:20:10 🔄 70:20:10 Philosophy 🤖 HC AI di setiap tahap 🤖 HC AI at every stage
HC AI
Asisten AI Learning Management System
Learning Management System AI Assistant

Satu asisten untuk seluruh alur LMS: kurasi konten, auto-tagging & quality scoring, learning path design, bulk assignment, eskalasi compliance 3-tier, multi-modal delivery, adaptive assessment, sertifikasi digital, Kirkpatrick ROI analytics, dan orkestrasi integrasi lintas modul.

One assistant for the entire LMS flow: content curation, auto-tagging & quality scoring, learning path design, bulk assignment, 3-tier compliance escalation, multi-modal delivery, adaptive assessment, digital certification, Kirkpatrick ROI analytics, and cross-module integration orchestration.

Five process flows, from content curation to ROI analytics, run by a single AI assistant, HC AI, at every stage.

HC AI
🔄 Siklus berkelanjutan: output analitik ROI memasok kembali desain learning path dan kurasi konten berikutnya. Learning adalah proses hidup, bukan event tahunan.Continuous loop: ROI analytics output feeds back into the next learning path design and content curation cycle. Learning is a living process, not an annual event.
Siapa yang Terlibat Who Is Involved

Persona & Peran

Personas & Roles

Lensa per persona: apa yang setiap peran lakukan di LMS dan alur/FR mana yang mereka sentuh. Tiap kartu ditandai persona PRD P1–P7. Klik chip FR untuk melompat ke kartu terkait.

A per-persona lens: what each role does in the LMS and which flows/FRs they touch. Each card is tagged with its PRD persona P1–P7. Click an FR chip to jump to the related card.

A. Pembelajar & PemimpinA. Learners & Leaders

👤KaryawanEmployeeP1

Pembelajar utamaThe primary learner

  • Cari katalog & minta rekomendasi via HC AI
  • Ikuti learning path, kelas, & microlearning
  • Praktik on-the-job & unggah bukti perubahan perilaku
  • Ikut coaching dengan atasan; asesmen & sertifikasi
  • Search the catalog & get HC AI recommendations
  • Follow learning paths, classes, & microlearning
  • Practice on the job & upload behaviour-change evidence
  • Join coaching with the manager; assessments & certify
👔Atasan / ManagerManagerP2

Penggerak pengembangan timTeam development driver

  • Approve enrollment & penugasan training
  • Coaching/mentoring tercatat + sign-off
  • Validasi bukti praktik on-the-job tim
  • Pantau progres & kesenjangan kompetensi tim
  • Approve enrollment & training assignments
  • Logged coaching/mentoring + sign-off
  • Validate the team's on-the-job evidence
  • Monitor team progress & competency gaps
🤝Mentor / CoachMentor / CoachP3

Pendamping pembelajaran sosial (20%)Social-learning guide (20%)

  • Sesi mentoring/coaching lintas unit
  • Berbagi pengalaman & studi kasus nyata
  • Beri umpan balik & action item terlacak
  • Pantau perkembangan mentee
  • Cross-unit mentoring/coaching sessions
  • Share real experience & case studies
  • Give feedback & tracked action items
  • Track mentee progress

B. L&D & HR Business PartnerB. L&D & HR Business Partner

🎓Spesialis L&DL&D SpecialistP4

Kurator kontenContent curator

  • Upload & kurasi konten multi-format
  • AI course builder & quality scoring
  • Auto-tagging & translasi multi-bahasa
  • Petakan konten ke kompetensi & katalog
  • Upload & curate multi-format content
  • AI course builder & quality scoring
  • Auto-tagging & multi-language translation
  • Map content to competencies & catalog
🧭L&D ManagerL&D ManagerP4

Perancang kapabilitasCapability designer

  • Gap analysis kompetensi organisasi
  • Desain learning path per job family
  • Bulk assignment training mandatory
  • Eskalasi compliance 3-tier
  • Organisational competency gap analysis
  • Design learning paths per job family
  • Bulk-assign mandatory training
  • 3-tier compliance escalation
🧩HCBP / HRBP per BUHRBP (Business Unit)P5

Penyelaras kapabilitas unit bisnisBusiness-unit capability partner

  • Terjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis BU ke prioritas belajar
  • Pantau adopsi & gap kapabilitas per BU
  • Kawal compliance & mandatory per BU
  • Laporkan dampak ke pimpinan BU
  • Translate BU business needs into learning priorities
  • Monitor BU adoption & capability gaps
  • Steward per-BU compliance & mandatory
  • Report impact to BU leaders
🌱Talent ManagementTalent ManagementP5

Pengembang talenta & suksesiTalent & succession developer

  • Kembangkan talent pool & high-potential
  • Tautkan learning ke succession & 9-box
  • Rancang jalur karier & readiness suksesor
  • Pantau kesiapan & gap talenta kritis
  • Develop talent pools & high-potentials
  • Link learning to succession & 9-box
  • Design career paths & successor readiness
  • Track critical-talent readiness & gaps
🏗️Organization DevelopmentOrganization DevelopmentP4

Pembangun kapabilitas & budayaOrg capability & culture builder

  • Miliki competency framework & skills taxonomy
  • Rancang capability academy & program perubahan
  • Dorong adopsi & manajemen perubahan
  • Ukur kapabilitas & kesehatan organisasi
  • Own the competency framework & skills taxonomy
  • Design capability academies & change programs
  • Drive adoption & change management
  • Measure organisational capability & health

C. Tata Kelola & SistemC. Governance & System

🛡Content Owner / ComplianceContent Owner / ComplianceP6

Penjamin mutu & kepatuhan kontenContent quality & compliance gate

  • Approval konten regulasi/compliance
  • Quality gate & version control konten

  • Audit trail & tata kelola katalog

⚙️Admin Sistem / Master AdminSystem / Master AdminRBAC

Administrator sistem & aksesSystem & access administrator

D. EksekutifD. Executive

Pemilik strategi & ROIStrategy & ROI owner

  • Arahkan prioritas strategis kapabilitas

  • Review group-level L&D ROI
  • Set strategic capability priorities
  • Sponsor the 70:20:10 learning culture
Filosofi Pembelajaran Learning Philosophy

Filosofi 70:20:10

The 70:20:10 Philosophy

LMS tidak berhenti di training formal. Mengikuti model 70:20:10, sebagian besar pembelajaran terjadi dari praktik dan interaksi sosial. LMS mencatat ketiga lapisan secara terukur: 70% praktik on-the-job, 20% coaching & mentoring bersama atasan, 10% training formal.

Learning does not stop at formal training. Following the 70:20:10 model, most learning happens through practice and social interaction. The LMS records all three layers measurably: 70% on-the-job practice, 20% coaching & mentoring with the manager, 10% formal training.

70%PraktikPractice
20%SosialSocial
10%FormalFormal
70%Pengalaman & PraktikExperience & Practice

Belajar dari mengerjakan: penugasan nyata, stretch project, action learning, dan rotasi. Dicatat sebagai bukti penerapan yang divalidasi atasan.

Learning by doing: real assignments, stretch projects, action learning, and rotation. Recorded as application evidence validated by the manager.

  • Stretch assignment & proyek
  • Action learning & job rotation
  • Evidence penerapan + validasi atasan
  • Stretch assignments & projects
  • Action learning & job rotation
  • Application evidence + manager validation
20%Coaching & MentoringCoaching & Mentoring

Belajar dari orang lain: sesi coaching & mentoring 1-on-1 tercatat bersama atasan, dengan catatan, komitmen tindak lanjut, dan sign-off.

Learning from others: 1-on-1 coaching & mentoring sessions logged with the manager, with notes, follow-up commitments, and sign-off.

  • Log coaching/mentoring + sign-off atasan
  • Pencocokan mentor lintas unit
  • Komitmen tindak lanjut yang dilacak
  • Coaching/mentoring log + manager sign-off
  • Cross-unit mentor matching
  • Tracked follow-up commitments
10%Training FormalFormal Training

Belajar terstruktur: kursus, e-learning, dan sertifikasi — ditangani penuh oleh Alur 1–5 LMS ini.

Structured learning: courses, e-learning, and certification — fully handled by Flows 1–5 of this LMS.

  • Kursus & e-learning (Alur 1–3)
  • Asesmen & sertifikasi (Alur 4)
  • Analitik & ROI (Alur 5)
  • Courses & e-learning (Flows 1–3)
  • Assessment & certification (Flow 4)
  • Analytics & ROI (Flow 5)
FR-LD-006Manajemen Coaching & Mentoring (Tercatat dengan Atasan)Coaching & Mentoring Management (Logged with Manager)HC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & Atasan langsung,As an Employee & direct Manager, kami ingin mencatat sesi coaching dan mentoring 1-on-1 — jadwal, catatan, komitmen tindak lanjut — dengan persetujuan (sign-off) atasan, serta pencocokan mentor lintas unitwe want to log 1-on-1 coaching and mentoring sessions — schedule, notes, follow-up commitments — with manager sign-off, plus cross-unit mentor matching sehingga 20% pembelajaran sosial terdokumentasi, terhubung ke learning path & kompetensi, dan menjadi bukti pengembangan yang terukur.so that the 20% social learning is documented, linked to learning paths & competencies, and becomes measurable development evidence.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Sesi coaching min. bulanan; sign-off atasan dalam 5 hari kerjaCoaching session at least monthly; manager sign-off within 5 working days
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Komitmen tindak lanjut yang belum ditutup >30 hari dieskalasi ke atasanFollow-up commitments open >30 days are escalated to the manager
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
≥80% karyawan punya ≥1 sesi coaching tercatat per kuartal; rasio mentor-mentee aktif≥80% of employees have ≥1 logged coaching session per quarter; active mentor-mentee ratio
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Menyarankan topik coaching dari gap kompetensi dan hasil asesmen karyawan
  • Mentor matching: mencocokkan mentee dengan mentor lintas unit berdasarkan skill, pengalaman, dan ketersediaan
  • Auto-ringkasan catatan sesi menjadi action item yang dapat dilacak
  • Mengingatkan atasan untuk sign-off dan menutup komitmen tindak lanjut
  • Menautkan sesi ke learning path, kompetensi, dan modul performance management
  • Insight engagement: pola frekuensi coaching per tim & kualitas tindak lanjut
  • Suggests coaching topics from competency gaps and the employee's assessment results
  • Mentor matching: pairs mentees with cross-unit mentors by skill, experience, and availability
  • Auto-summarizes session notes into trackable action items
  • Reminds the manager to sign off and close follow-up commitments
  • Links sessions to learning paths, competencies, and the performance management module
  • Engagement insight: coaching frequency patterns per team & follow-up quality
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Sesi Coaching tercatat: Budi (Mentee) × Ibu Sari (Atasan), 28 Jun 2026, topik 'Delegasi & Prioritisasi'. 2 action item dibuat, jatuh tempo 12 Jul. Menunggu sign-off atasan. Terhubung ke Learning Path 'Supervisory Excellence' (kompetensi Leadership L2). Mentor lintas unit disarankan: Pak Andi (Operations) untuk topik manajemen shift.Coaching session logged: Budi (Mentee) × Ms. Sari (Manager), 28 Jun 2026, topic 'Delegation & Prioritization'. 2 action items created, due 12 Jul. Awaiting manager sign-off. Linked to Learning Path 'Supervisory Excellence' (Leadership L2 competency). Suggested cross-unit mentor: Mr. Andi (Operations) for shift-management topics."
ProsesProcess
  1. Karyawan/atasan menjadwalkan sesi coaching atau mentoring
  2. HC AI menyarankan topik dari gap kompetensi & learning path
  3. Sesi berlangsung; catatan dan komitmen tindak lanjut dicatat
  4. Atasan melakukan sign-off atas catatan dan action item
  5. Action item dilacak hingga selesai; yang macet dieskalasi
  6. Sesi tertaut ke kompetensi, learning path, dan performance
  1. Employee/manager schedules a coaching or mentoring session
  2. HC AI suggests topics from competency gaps & learning path
  3. Session takes place; notes and follow-up commitments are logged
  4. Manager signs off on the notes and action items
  5. Action items tracked to completion; stalled ones escalated
  6. Session linked to competencies, learning path, and performance
MasukanInput
  • Gap kompetensi & hasil asesmen karyawan
  • Jadwal & ketersediaan atasan/mentor
  • Direktori mentor & profil skill
  • Learning path dan target pengembangan
  • Employee competency gaps & assessment results
  • Manager/mentor schedule & availability
  • Mentor directory & skill profiles
  • Learning paths and development targets
KeluaranOutput
  • Catatan sesi coaching/mentoring dengan sign-off atasan
  • Action item terlacak dengan status & jatuh tempo
  • Rekam jejak pengembangan 20% per karyawan
  • Pasangan mentor-mentee aktif
  • Coaching/mentoring session records with manager sign-off
  • Tracked action items with status & due dates
  • 20% development trail per employee
  • Active mentor-mentee pairings

Log Sesi Coaching / Mentoring — Sign-off AtasanCoaching / Mentoring Session Log — Manager Sign-off

Bagian dari lapisan 20% (FR-LD-006): catat sesi 1-on-1, kirim ke atasan untuk sign-off, dan kumpulkan rekam jejak pengembangan sosial.Part of the 20% layer (FR-LD-006): log a 1-on-1 session, submit to the manager for sign-off, and build a social-development trail.

1Isi sesiFill session
2KirimSubmit
3Sign-off atasanManager sign-off
4TercatatLogged
Belum ada sesi tercatat.No sessions logged yet.

Demo ilustratif — data hanya di browser Anda, tidak diunggah atau disimpan.Illustrative demo — data stays in your browser only; nothing is uploaded or stored.

FR-LD-007Pembelajaran Eksperiensial & Praktik On-the-JobExperiential & On-the-Job LearningHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & Atasan,As an Employee & Manager, kami ingin menugaskan dan melacak praktik nyata — stretch assignment, action learning, proyek, job rotation — dengan bukti penerapan (evidence) dan validasi atasanwe want to assign and track real practice — stretch assignments, action learning, projects, job rotation — with application evidence and manager validation sehingga 70% pembelajaran dari pengalaman terukur, dan kompetensi benar-benar terbukti di pekerjaan, bukan sekadar lulus kursus.so that the 70% experiential learning is measured, and competencies are truly proven on the job, not just course completion.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Berkelanjutan; review penerapan tiap siklus kinerjaContinuous; application review each performance cycle
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Bukti penerapan ditolak → tugas praktik diulang atau diperdalamApplication evidence rejected → practice task repeated or deepened
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
≥70% target kompetensi terbukti via evidence praktik; waktu kompetensi-ke-mahir turun≥70% of target competencies proven via practice evidence; competency-to-proficiency time reduced
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Merekomendasikan tugas on-the-job & stretch assignment sesuai kompetensi target
  • Membuat checklist praktik/OJT dan kriteria bukti penerapan
  • Menangkap evidence multi-format sebagai bukti perubahan perilaku: foto, video, dokumen, hasil kerja, atau tautan output
  • Workflow validasi atasan atas bukti penerapan
  • Menautkan praktik ke performance management dan career path
  • Melacak proyek action-learning beserta dampak bisnisnya
  • Recommends on-the-job tasks & stretch assignments matching target competencies
  • Generates practice/OJT checklists and evidence criteria
  • Captures multi-format evidence of behavior change: photos, videos, documents, work products, or output links
  • Manager validation workflow for application evidence
  • Links practice to performance management and career paths
  • Tracks action-learning projects and their business impact
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Tugas praktik: 'Pimpin perbaikan OEE di Line 3 selama 1 bulan' (kompetensi Operational Excellence L2). Checklist 5 langkah dibuat. Evidence diunggah: laporan OEE naik 6%. Menunggu validasi atasan. Setelah disetujui, kompetensi ditandai 'terbukti di pekerjaan' dan disinkronkan ke career path 'Production Supervisor'.Practice task: 'Lead OEE improvement on Line 3 for 1 month' (Operational Excellence L2 competency). 5-step checklist generated. Evidence uploaded: OEE report up 6%. Awaiting manager validation. Once approved, the competency is marked 'proven on the job' and synced to the 'Production Supervisor' career path."
ProsesProcess
  1. HC AI/atasan menugaskan praktik on-the-job sesuai kompetensi target
  2. Checklist praktik & kriteria bukti dibuat
  3. Karyawan menerapkan di pekerjaan dan mengunggah evidence
  4. Atasan memvalidasi bukti penerapan
  5. Kompetensi ditandai 'terbukti di pekerjaan' bila lolos
  6. Hasil disinkronkan ke performance & career path
  1. HC AI/manager assigns on-the-job practice matching target competencies
  2. Practice checklist & evidence criteria generated
  3. Employee applies on the job and uploads evidence
  4. Manager validates the application evidence
  5. Competency marked 'proven on the job' once passed
  6. Results synced to performance & career path
MasukanInput
  • Kompetensi target & learning path
  • Peluang penugasan, proyek, & rotasi
  • Kriteria bukti penerapan
  • Data performance & konteks pekerjaan
  • Target competencies & learning path
  • Assignment, project & rotation opportunities
  • Application evidence criteria
  • Performance data & job context
KeluaranOutput
  • Catatan praktik dengan evidence & validasi atasan
  • Kompetensi 'terbukti di pekerjaan'
  • Rekam jejak pembelajaran 70% per karyawan
  • Dampak proyek action-learning terhadap bisnis
  • Practice records with evidence & manager validation
  • Competencies 'proven on the job'
  • 70% learning trail per employee
  • Action-learning project business impact

Bukti Perubahan Perilaku — Upload Foto / Video / FileBehavior-Change Evidence — Upload Photo / Video / File

Bagian dari lapisan 70% (FR-LD-007): karyawan mengunggah bukti penerapan di pekerjaan untuk divalidasi atasan. Contoh: video praktik mengemudikan forklift, memindahkan barang, atau melakukan manuver.Part of the 70% layer (FR-LD-007): the employee uploads on-the-job application evidence for the manager to validate. Example: a video of practicing forklift operation, moving goods, or performing maneuvers.

1UploadUpload
2Kirim ke atasanSubmit to manager
3Review atasanManager review
4TervalidasiValidated

Demo ilustratif — berkas hanya ditampilkan di browser Anda, tidak diunggah atau disimpan.Illustrative demo — the file is shown in your browser only; nothing is uploaded or stored.

Alur 1 dari 5 Flow 1 of 5

Kurasi Konten & Manajemen Katalog

Content Curation & Catalog Management

Dari upload konten multi-format dengan AI auto-tagging dan quality scoring, hingga penemuan katalog berbasis percakapan oleh karyawan via HC AI.

From multi-format content upload with AI auto-tagging and quality scoring, to conversational catalog discovery by employees via HC AI.

HC AIFR-LD-001aKurasi Konten Berbantuan AIAI-Assisted Content Curation
HC AIFR-LD-001bPenemuan Katalog via PercakapanConversational Catalog Discovery
FR-LD-001aKurasi & Pembuatan Kursus Berbantuan AIAI-Assisted Content Curation & Course CreationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D,As an L&D Specialist, saya ingin mengupload, membuat, dan mengkurasi konten pembelajaran dalam berbagai format (e-learning, video, SCORM, PDF, podcast, microlearning) dengan AI-assisted tagging, terjemahan multi-bahasa, dan quality scoringI want to upload, create, and curate learning content in multiple formats (e-learning, video, SCORM, PDF, podcast, microlearning) with AI-assisted tagging, multi-language translation, and quality scoring sehingga pustaka konten kaya, mudah dicari, dan dapat diakses 32.000+ karyawan di 9 negara dalam bahasa mereka, dengan waktu pembuatan kursus berkurang 60%.so that our content library is rich, searchable, and accessible to 32,000+ employees across 9 countries in their language, with course creation time reduced by 60%.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Berkelanjutan; SLA approval: 24 jam L&D Manager, 48 jam Content OwnerContinuous; approval SLA: 24h L&D Manager, 48h Content Owner
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang mutu: quality score di bawah 70 dikembalikan dengan rekomendasi perbaikan HC AIQuality gate: score below 70 returned with HC AI improvement recommendations
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Avg quality score katalog ≥ 80/100; 70%+ kursus aktif digunakan per kuartalAvg catalog quality score ≥ 80/100; 70%+ active courses used per quarter
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Multi-format content support: SCORM 1.2/2004, xAPI, video MP4, PDF, podcast MP3, HTML5 interaktif, microlearning
  • AI auto-tagging: mengekstrak topik, skills, kompetensi, tingkat kesulitan dari konten yang diupload
  • Auto-translasi ke 8 bahasa: Bahasa Indonesia, Inggris, Mandarin, Thai, Vietnam, Jepang, Korea, Melayu
  • Quality scoring: rating 0-100 berdasarkan potensi keterlibatan, kejelasan, cakupan asesmen, mobile-friendliness
  • Content recommendation engine: menyarankan konten yang sudah ada untuk di-reuse sebelum membuat kursus baru
  • AI course builder: menghasilkan outline kursus dari deskripsi topik, menyarankan learning objectives dan pertanyaan asesmen
  • Deteksi duplikasi: mengidentifikasi overlap dengan katalog yang sudah ada
  • Multi-format content support: SCORM 1.2/2004, xAPI, MP4 video, PDF, MP3 podcast, interactive HTML5, microlearning
  • AI auto-tagging: extracts topics, skills, competencies, difficulty level from uploaded content
  • Auto-translation to 8 languages: Bahasa Indonesia, English, Mandarin, Thai, Vietnamese, Japanese, Korean, Malay
  • Quality scoring: 0-100 rating based on engagement potential, clarity, assessment coverage, mobile-friendliness
  • Content recommendation engine: suggests existing content to reuse before creating new courses
  • AI course builder: generates course outline from topic description, suggests learning objectives and assessment questions
  • Duplicate detection: identifies overlap with existing catalog
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Kursus Baru: 'Food Safety & Hygiene untuk Manufacturing' (SCORM 2004, 45 menit). Auto-tagged: Food Safety, HACCP, GMP, Manufacturing, Compliance. Kompetensi dipetakan: Quality Management (L2), Operational Excellence (L1). Quality Score: 87/100 - konten kuat, perlu 2 pertanyaan asesmen tambahan. Auto-translasi: Bahasa (selesai), Thai (selesai), Vietnam (dalam proses). Estimasi audiens: 12.400 karyawan manufacturing di 8 pabrik.New Course: 'Food Safety & Hygiene for Manufacturing' (SCORM 2004, 45 min). Auto-tagged: Food Safety, HACCP, GMP, Manufacturing, Compliance. Competencies mapped: Quality Management (L2), Operational Excellence (L1). Quality Score: 87/100 - strong content, needs 2 more assessment questions. Auto-translated: Bahasa (done), Thai (done), Vietnamese (in progress). Estimated audience: 12,400 manufacturing employees across 8 factories."
ProsesProcess
  1. L&D Specialist mengupload konten dalam format yang didukung (SCORM, video, PDF, dll.)
  2. HC AI memproses konten: ekstrak metadata, tag topik, petakan kompetensi
  3. Quality assessment: rating keterlibatan, kejelasan, mobile-friendliness, cakupan asesmen
  4. AI menyarankan perbaikan: tambah pertanyaan quiz, persingkat bagian, perbaiki visual
  5. Translasi multi-bahasa diinisiasi (otomatis atau workflow human review untuk konten kritis)
  6. Detail kursus dilengkapi: judul, deskripsi, durasi, prasyarat, audiens target
  7. Konten dikaitkan ke competency framework dan skills taxonomy
  8. Kursus dikategorikan: departemen, job family, grade level, mandatory/optional
  9. Workflow review dan approval: L&D Manager → Content Owner → Compliance (jika regulasi)
  10. Diterbitkan ke katalog dengan availability by entity, negara, dan kelompok karyawan
  1. L&D Specialist uploads content in supported format (SCORM, video, PDF, etc.)
  2. HC AI processes content: extracts metadata, tags topics, maps competencies
  3. Quality assessment: rates engagement, clarity, mobile-friendliness, assessment coverage
  4. AI suggests improvements: add quiz questions, shorten sections, improve visuals
  5. Multi-language translation initiated (auto or human review workflow for critical content)
  6. Course details completed: title, description, duration, prerequisites, target audience
  7. Content linked to competency framework and skills taxonomy
  8. Course categorized: department, job family, grade level, mandatory/optional
  9. Review and approval workflow: L&D Manager → Content Owner → Compliance (if regulatory)
  10. Published to catalog with availability by entity, country, and employee group
MasukanInput
  • File konten pembelajaran (SCORM, xAPI, video, PDF, podcast, HTML5)
  • Metadata kursus: judul, deskripsi, durasi, audiens target
  • Competency framework untuk skills mapping
  • Skills taxonomy untuk auto-tagging
  • Persyaratan translasi multi-bahasa
  • Persyaratan compliance/regulasi per negara
  • Katalog kursus yang ada (untuk deteksi duplikat)
  • Learning content files (SCORM, xAPI, video, PDF, podcast, HTML5)
  • Course metadata: title, description, duration, target audience
  • Competency framework for skills mapping
  • Skills taxonomy for auto-tagging
  • Multi-language translation requirements
  • Compliance/regulatory requirements per country
  • Existing course catalog (for duplicate detection)
KeluaranOutput
  • Kursus terproses dengan AI-generated tags, competency mapping, dan quality score
  • Versi multi-bahasa (hingga 8 bahasa per kursus)
  • Entri katalog kursus dengan metadata lengkap dan kata kunci pencarian
  • Rekomendasi perbaikan konten
  • Version history konten dengan change tracking
  • Konfirmasi publikasi dengan estimasi jangkauan audiens target
  • Laporan deteksi duplikat terhadap katalog yang ada
  • Processed course with AI-generated tags, competency mapping, and quality score
  • Multi-language versions (up to 8 languages per course)
  • Course catalog entry with full metadata and search keywords
  • Content quality improvement recommendations
  • Content version history with change tracking
  • Publishing confirmation with target audience reach estimate
  • Duplicate detection report against existing catalog
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Competency Framework: definisi skills dan kompetensi untuk mapping
  • Skills Taxonomy: sistem klasifikasi untuk auto-tagging
  • Katalog Kursus yang Ada: deteksi duplikat dan reuse konten
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): identifikasi audiens target per entitas/negara
  • Competency Framework: skill and competency definitions for mapping
  • Skills Taxonomy: classification system for auto-tagging
  • Existing Course Catalog: duplicate detection and content reuse
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): target audience identification by entity/country
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Standar SCORM/xAPI: content packaging dan tracking standards
  • Translation Services: AI dan human translation untuk 8 bahasa
  • Content Authoring Tools (Articulate, Adobe Captivate): platform pembuatan konten
  • SCORM/xAPI Standards: content packaging and tracking standards
  • Translation Services: AI and human translation for 8 languages
  • Content Authoring Tools (Articulate, Adobe Captivate): content creation platforms
Temukan & Enroll ↓Discover & Enroll ↓
FR-LD-001bPenemuan Katalog & Konten via HC AICourse Catalog & Content Discovery via HC AIHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan,As an Employee, saya ingin menelusuri dan mencari katalog kursus menggunakan bahasa alami melalui HC AI, filter berdasarkan topik, skill, durasi, format, dan bahasa, dan mendapat rekomendasi personal berdasarkan peran, skill gap, dan tujuan karier sayaI want to browse and search the course catalog using natural language through HC AI, filter by topic, skill, duration, format, and language, and get personalised recommendations based on my role, skill gaps, and career goals sehingga saya dapat menemukan konten pembelajaran yang relevan dalam hitungan detik dan pengembangan saya dipandu oleh AI yang memahami kebutuhan spesifik saya.so that I can find relevant learning content in seconds and my development is guided by AI that understands my specific needs.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; rekomendasi diperbarui setiap kali ada perubahan profil atau progressReal-time; recommendations updated whenever profile or progress changes
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang approval: kursus berbayar membutuhkan approval manager sebelum enrollmentApproval gate: paid courses require manager approval before enrollment
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Avg 4+ interaksi katalog per karyawan per bulan; 60%+ self-enrollment completion rateAvg 4+ catalog interactions per employee per month; 60%+ self-enrollment completion rate
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Pencarian bahasa alami: 'HC AI, carikan kursus pendek tentang Excel untuk pemula'
  • Smart filtering: berdasarkan topik, skill, durasi (5 menit hingga 40 jam), format, bahasa, tingkat kesulitan
  • Rekomendasi personal: berdasarkan peran, grade, skill gap dari performance review, aspirasi karier
  • Trending courses: menampilkan kursus paling populer di departemen atau job family karyawan
  • Learning path suggestion: 'Untuk menjadi Data Analyst, ini 6 kursus dalam urutan yang disarankan'
  • Peer learning: 'Karyawan dengan peran serupa juga menyelesaikan kursus-kursus ini'
  • Bookmarking dan wishlist: simpan kursus untuk nanti, terima pengingat untuk memulai
  • Natural language search: 'HC AI, find me a short course on Excel for beginners'
  • Smart filtering: by topic, skill, duration (5 min to 40 hrs), format, language, difficulty
  • Personalised recommendations: based on role, grade, skill gaps from performance reviews, career aspirations
  • Trending courses: shows most popular courses in employee's department or job family
  • Learning path suggestion: 'To become a Data Analyst, here are 6 courses in recommended order'
  • Peer learning: 'Employees in similar roles also completed these courses'
  • Bookmarking and wishlists: save courses for later, get reminders to start
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Karyawan: 'HC AI, saya ingin meningkatkan skill kepemimpinan sebelum review promosi saya.' HC AI: Berdasarkan peran Grade 8 Anda dan target Grade 10, saya rekomendasikan 4 kursus: 1) Leading High-Performance Teams (8 jam, interaktif, rating 4.7/5, diselesaikan 85% pemimpin Grade 10 yang baru dipromosikan). 2) Coaching Skills for Managers (4 jam, video + praktik, prasyarat Grade 10). 3) Strategic Thinking Fundamentals (6 jam). 4) Conflict Resolution Masterclass (3 jam). Total: 21 jam. Apakah saya buat learning path dan enroll Anda?Employee: 'HC AI, I want to improve my leadership skills before my promotion review.' HC AI: Based on your Grade 8 role and Grade 10 target, I recommend these 4 courses: 1) Leading High-Performance Teams (8hr, interactive, rating 4.7/5, completed by 85% of newly promoted Grade 10 leaders). 2) Coaching Skills for Managers (4hr, video + practice, prerequisite for Grade 10). 3) Strategic Thinking Fundamentals (6hr). 4) Conflict Resolution Masterclass (3hr). Total: 21 hours. Shall I create a learning path and enroll you?"
ProsesProcess
  1. Karyawan meminta rekomendasi kursus atau mencari katalog via HC AI
  2. HC AI menganalisis: peran, grade, skill gap, feedback kinerja, aspirasi karier
  3. Katalog dicari dengan natural language understanding dan smart filters
  4. Hasil diurutkan berdasarkan relevansi, popularitas, completion rates, dan rating
  5. Rekomendasi personal disorot dengan reasoning
  6. Karyawan menelusuri detail: durasi, format, bahasa, ulasan, prasyarat
  7. Karyawan bookmark, enroll, atau meminta approval manager untuk kursus berbayar
  8. Learning path disarankan jika beberapa kursus terkait teridentifikasi
  9. Integrasi kalender: HC AI menyarankan waktu belajar berdasarkan jadwal karyawan
  10. Post-enrollment: progress tracking dan pengingat penyelesaian via HC AI
  1. Employee asks HC AI for course recommendations or searches catalog
  2. HC AI analyses: role, grade, skill gaps, performance feedback, career aspirations
  3. Catalog searched with natural language understanding and smart filters
  4. Results ranked by relevance, popularity, completion rates, and ratings
  5. Personalised recommendations highlighted with reasoning
  6. Employee browses details: duration, format, language, reviews, prerequisites
  7. Employee bookmarks, enrolls, or requests manager approval for paid courses
  8. Learning path suggested if multiple related courses identified
  9. Calendar integration: HC AI suggests study times based on employee schedule
  10. Post-enrollment: progress tracking and completion reminders via HC AI
MasukanInput
  • Profil karyawan: peran, grade, skills, data kinerja, aspirasi karier
  • Katalog kursus dengan metadata dan rating lengkap
  • Completion data: apa yang sudah diselesaikan karyawan dan rekannya
  • Analisis gap kompetensi dari performance review
  • Persyaratan career path (kursus yang dibutuhkan per grade progression)
  • Kalender karyawan untuk saran waktu belajar
  • Employee profile: role, grade, skills, performance data, career aspirations
  • Course catalog with full metadata and ratings
  • Completion data: what employee and peers have already completed
  • Competency gap analysis from performance reviews
  • Career path requirements (courses needed per grade progression)
  • Employee calendar for study time suggestions
KeluaranOutput
  • Rekomendasi kursus personal dengan reasoning
  • Hasil pencarian terfilter dengan relevance ranking
  • Saran learning path untuk tujuan karier
  • Konfirmasi enrollment kursus
  • Jadwal belajar terintegrasi kalender
  • Manajemen bookmark/wishlist
  • Insight rating kursus dan completion data rekan
  • Personalised course recommendations with reasoning
  • Filtered search results with relevance ranking
  • Learning path suggestions for career goals
  • Course enrollment confirmations
  • Calendar-integrated study schedule
  • Bookmark/wishlist management
  • Course ratings and peer completion insights
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Katalog Kursus (FR-LD-001a): katalog lengkap dengan metadata dan rating
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): peran, grade, skills, aspirasi karier
  • Performance Mgmt (FR-PM-001): gap kompetensi dan rekomendasi pengembangan
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): persyaratan grade progression dan prasyarat training
  • Course Catalog (FR-LD-001a): full catalog with metadata and ratings
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): role, grade, skills, career aspirations
  • Performance Mgmt (FR-PM-001): competency gaps and development recommendations
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): grade progression requirements and training prerequisites
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • External Course Providers (LinkedIn Learning, Coursera, Udemy Business): integrasi konten pihak ketiga
  • Industry Certifications: kursus yang diperlukan untuk sertifikasi profesional
  • External Course Providers (LinkedIn Learning, Coursera, Udemy Business): third-party content integration
  • Industry Certifications: required courses for professional certifications
Alur 2 dari 5 Flow 2 of 5

Learning Path Design & Penugasan Training

Learning Path Design & Training Assignment

Dari desain learning path berbasis AI yang memetakan gap kompetensi ke rangkaian kursus optimal, hingga penugasan massal dengan eskalasi compliance 3-tier yang memastikan 100% completion on-time.

From AI-driven learning path design that maps competency gaps to optimal course sequences, to bulk assignment with 3-tier compliance escalation ensuring 100% on-time completion.

HC AIFR-LD-002aDesain Learning Path Berbasis AIAI-Driven Learning Path Design
HC AIFR-LD-002bPenugasan Training & Compliance WajibTraining Assignment & Mandatory Compliance
FR-LD-002aDesain Learning Path Berbasis AI & Competency MappingAI-Driven Learning Path Design & Competency MappingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Manager / HRBP,As an L&D Manager / HRBP, saya ingin merancang learning path terstruktur yang memetakan rangkaian kursus ke tujuan pengembangan kompetensi, jalur karier, dan persyaratan job family, dengan AI yang secara otomatis mengidentifikasi urutan kursus optimal dan prerequisite chainI want to design structured learning paths that map course sequences to competency development goals, career progressions, and job family requirements, with AI automatically identifying optimal course sequences and prerequisite chains sehingga pengembangan karyawan mengikuti peta jalan terstruktur dan learning path langsung terhubung ke kemajuan karier dan capability building organisasi.so that employee development follows a structured roadmap and learning paths directly connect to career advancement and organisational capability building.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Per siklus pengembangan; diperbarui saat ada perubahan katalog, kompetensi, atau strategi bisnisPer development cycle; updated when catalog, competency, or business strategy changes
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang efektivitas: HC AI memprediksi completion rate dan skill improvement sebelum publishEffectiveness gate: HC AI predicts completion rate and skill improvement before publishing
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
72%+ completion rate per learning path; avg +35% skill improvement pasca penyelesaian path72%+ completion rate per learning path; avg +35% skill improvement post-path completion
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Auto-generate learning path dari analisis gap kompetensi: mengidentifikasi kursus untuk menutup skill gap spesifik
  • Career-aligned paths: memetakan persyaratan training per grade level dalam setiap job family
  • Optimasi prerequisite chain: memastikan urutan kursus logis (fondasi sebelum lanjut)
  • Estimasi durasi: menghitung total durasi path dan menyarankan timeline penyelesaian yang realistis
  • Milestone tracking: memecah path panjang menjadi milestone yang bisa dicapai dengan sertifikasi intermediate
  • Opsi alternatif: fast-track (3 bulan) vs standard (6 bulan) vs paruh waktu
  • Effectiveness scoring: menilai desain path berdasarkan completion rate historis dan data skill acquisition
  • Auto-generates learning paths from competency gap analysis: identifies courses to close specific skill gaps
  • Career-aligned paths: maps training requirements per grade level within each job family
  • Prerequisite chain optimisation: ensures courses sequenced logically (foundations before advanced)
  • Duration estimation: calculates total path duration and suggests realistic completion timeline
  • Milestone tracking: breaks long paths into achievable milestones with intermediate certifications
  • Alternative options: fast-track (3 months) vs standard (6 months) vs part-time
  • Effectiveness scoring: rates path design based on historical completion rates and skill acquisition data
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Learning Path Dihasilkan: 'Data Analytics Mastery' (Job Family: Analytics, Grade 7 ke Grade 10). Total: 6 kursus, 48 jam selama 4 bulan. Milestone 1 (Bulan 1): Excel Advanced + SQL Fundamentals (16 jam). Milestone 2 (Bulan 2): Python for Analytics + Data Visualization (18 jam). Milestone 3 (Bulan 3-4): Business Intelligence Tools + Capstone Project (14 jam). Sertifikasi: ONE HCMS Data Analytics Professional. Prediksi completion rate: 72%. Estimasi peningkatan skill: +35% kompetensi analytics.Learning Path Generated: 'Data Analytics Mastery' (Job Family: Analytics, Grade 7 to Grade 10). Total: 6 courses, 48 hours over 4 months. Milestone 1 (Month 1): Excel Advanced + SQL Fundamentals (16hr). Milestone 2 (Month 2): Python for Analytics + Data Visualization (18hr). Milestone 3 (Month 3-4): Business Intelligence Tools + Capstone Project (14hr). Certification: ONE HCMS Data Analytics Professional. Predicted completion rate: 72%. Estimated skill improvement: +35% in analytics competency."
ProsesProcess
  1. L&D Manager mendefinisikan tujuan learning path (target kompetensi, karier, sertifikasi)
  2. HC AI menganalisis gap kompetensi: kondisi saat ini vs target untuk audiens
  3. AI memilih kursus optimal dari katalog yang sesuai kebutuhan skill development
  4. Prerequisite chain divalidasi: kursus diurutkan secara logis
  5. Path disusun dengan milestone, checkpoint intermediate, dan asesmen
  6. Durasi dan timeline dihitung dengan rekomendasi pace yang realistis
  7. Path alternatif dihasilkan (fast-track, standard, part-time)
  8. Prediksi efektivitas: estimasi completion rate dan peningkatan skill
  9. Review dan approval: L&D Manager → HRBP → Department Head
  10. Published learning path tersedia untuk enrollment dan penugasan
  1. L&D Manager defines learning path objective (competency target, career, certification)
  2. HC AI analyses competency gap: current state vs. target for audience
  3. AI selects optimal courses from catalog matching skill development needs
  4. Prerequisite chain validated: courses sequenced logically
  5. Path structured with milestones, intermediate checkpoints, and assessments
  6. Duration and timeline calculated with realistic pace recommendations
  7. Alternative paths generated (fast-track, standard, part-time)
  8. Effectiveness prediction: estimates completion rate and skill improvement
  9. Review and approval: L&D Manager → HRBP → Department Head
  10. Published learning path available for enrollment and assignment
MasukanInput
  • Target kompetensi: skills spesifik dan level profisiensi yang ingin dicapai
  • Katalog kursus dengan competency mappings dan prerequisite data
  • Persyaratan job family: kebutuhan training per grade level
  • Data pembelajaran historis: completion rates, time-to-complete, peningkatan skill
  • Profil audiens target: level skill saat ini, jam belajar yang tersedia
  • Persyaratan sertifikasi (internal dan eksternal)
  • Competency target: specific skills and proficiency levels to achieve
  • Course catalog with competency mappings and prerequisite data
  • Job family requirements: training needs per grade level
  • Historical learning data: completion rates, time-to-complete, skill improvements
  • Target audience profile: current skill levels, available learning hours
  • Certification requirements (internal and external)
KeluaranOutput
  • Learning path terstruktur dengan kursus berurutan dan milestone
  • Prerequisite dependency map (alur visual urutan kursus)
  • Estimasi durasi dengan recommended timeline (minggu/bulan)
  • Opsi path alternatif (fast-track, standard, fleksibel)
  • Prediksi efektivitas (completion rate, estimasi peningkatan skill)
  • Keselarasan sertifikasi (sertifikasi mana yang dicapai dari path ini)
  • Published path tersedia di katalog untuk enrollment
  • Structured learning path with sequenced courses and milestones
  • Prerequisite dependency map (visual flow of course sequence)
  • Duration estimate with recommended timeline (weeks/months)
  • Alternative path options (fast-track, standard, flexible)
  • Effectiveness prediction (completion rate, skill improvement estimate)
  • Certification alignment (which certifications path qualifies for)
  • Published path available in catalog for enrollment
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Katalog Kursus (FR-LD-001): kursus tersedia dengan competency mappings
  • Competency Framework: target skills dan level profisiensi
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): persyaratan training per grade progression
  • Historical Learning Data: completion rates dan skill outcomes per kursus
  • Course Catalog (FR-LD-001): available courses with competency mappings
  • Competency Framework: target skills and proficiency levels
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): grade progression training requirements
  • Historical Learning Data: completion rates and skill outcomes per course
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Industry Certification Bodies: persyaratan sertifikasi dan keselarasan kursus
  • Best Practice L&D Frameworks (70-20-10): prinsip learning design
  • Industry Certification Bodies: certification requirements and course alignments
  • Best Practice L&D Frameworks (70-20-10): learning design principles
Assign & Track ↓Assign & Track ↓
FR-LD-002bPenugasan Training, Enrollment & Compliance WajibTraining Assignment, Enrollment & Mandatory ComplianceHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D / Manager,As an L&D Specialist / Manager, saya ingin menugaskan training wajib ke populasi karyawan tertentu (berdasarkan departemen, grade, lokasi, job family), menetapkan deadline dengan eskalasi otomatis, dan melacak status enrollment 32.000+ karyawan secara real-timeI want to assign mandatory training to specific employee populations (by department, grade, location, job family), set deadlines with automated escalation, and track enrollment status of 32,000+ employees in real-time sehingga compliance training menjangkau 100% audiens target on-time dan semua risiko keterlambatan terdeteksi dan dieskalasi secara proaktif.so that compliance training reaches 100% of the target audience on time and all late-completion risks are proactively detected and escalated.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Berkelanjutan; eskalasi 3-tier: H-15 reminder → H-7 alert manager → H-3 eskalasi HRBPContinuous; 3-tier escalation: D-15 reminder → D-7 manager alert → D-3 HRBP escalation
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang eskalasi: HC AI otomatis memicu notifikasi sesuai tier dan risk scoringEscalation gate: HC AI automatically triggers notifications per tier and risk scoring
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
100% completion mandatory training on-time; 0 karyawan melewati deadline compliance regulasi100% on-time mandatory training completion; 0 employees past regulatory compliance deadline
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Bulk assignment: tugaskan kursus ke kelompok karyawan berdasarkan departemen, entitas, grade, lokasi, job family
  • Rule-based auto-assignment: kursus onboarding karyawan baru ditugaskan otomatis di Day 1
  • Deadline management: deadline yang bisa dikonfigurasi dengan eskalasi tier (reminder → alert manager → eskalasi HRBP)
  • Self-enrollment: karyawan menelusuri dan enroll kursus opsional via HC AI atau ESS portal
  • Manager assignment: manager dapat menugaskan kursus spesifik ke direct report dengan justifikasi
  • Waitlist management: untuk sesi kelas/virtual dengan batas kapasitas, auto-enroll dari waitlist
  • Budget tracking: biaya training eksternal dilacak terhadap alokasi anggaran L&D departemen
  • Bulk assignment: assign courses to employee groups by department, entity, grade, location, job family
  • Rule-based auto-assignment: new hire onboarding courses assigned automatically on Day 1
  • Deadline management: configurable deadlines with escalation tiers (reminder → manager alert → HRBP escalation)
  • Self-enrollment: employees browse and enroll in optional courses via HC AI or ESS portal
  • Manager assignment: managers can assign specific courses to direct reports with justification
  • Waitlist management: for classroom/virtual sessions with capacity limits, auto-enroll from waitlist
  • Budget tracking: external training costs tracked against department L&D budget allocation
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Penugasan Training Wajib: 'Anti-Bribery & Corruption 2026 Update' ditugaskan ke SEMUA karyawan (32.450). Deadline: 31 Maret 2026 (45 hari). Eskalasi: Hari ke-30 reminder ke karyawan → Hari ke-37 alert ke manager → Hari ke-42 eskalasi ke HRBP. Status saat ini (Hari ke-12): 8.450 selesai (26%), 15.200 sedang proses (47%), 8.800 belum mulai (27%). Per entitas: Indonesia 31%, Thailand 22%, Vietnam 18%. Risiko: Pabrik Vietnam (480 karyawan, 0% mulai) ditandai untuk perhatian segera.Mandatory Training Assignment: 'Anti-Bribery & Corruption 2026 Update' assigned to ALL employees (32,450). Deadline: 31 March 2026 (45 days). Escalation: Day 30 reminder to employee → Day 37 alert to manager → Day 42 escalation to HRBP. Current status (Day 12): 8,450 completed (26%), 15,200 in progress (47%), 8,800 not started (27%). By entity: Indonesia 31%, Thailand 22%, Vietnam 18%. Risk: Vietnam factory (480 employees, 0% started) flagged for immediate attention."
ProsesProcess
  1. L&D memilih kursus dan mendefinisikan populasi target (filter: entitas, dept, grade, lokasi)
  2. Tipe penugasan dipilih: mandatory (dengan deadline) atau recommended (opsional)
  3. Untuk mandatory: deadline ditetapkan dengan eskalasi rules (3-tier)
  4. Sistem menghitung ukuran audiens target dan mengirim notifikasi enrollment
  5. Karyawan diberitahu via HC AI, email, dan ESS portal dengan link langsung ke kursus
  6. Untuk kelas/virtual: penjadwalan sesi dengan capacity management
  7. Self-enrollment dibuka untuk kursus opsional (approval workflow jika ada biaya)
  8. Real-time tracking dashboard: completion %, per entitas, per departemen, daftar overdue
  9. Automated escalation memicu pada interval yang dikonfigurasi
  10. Data completion disinkronkan ke profil karyawan dan compliance dashboard
  1. L&D selects course and defines target population (filters: entity, dept, grade, location)
  2. Assignment type selected: mandatory (with deadline) or recommended (optional)
  3. For mandatory: deadline set with escalation rules (3-tier)
  4. System calculates target audience size and sends enrollment notifications
  5. Employees notified via HC AI, email, and ESS portal with direct course link
  6. For classroom/virtual: session scheduling with capacity management
  7. Self-enrollment opens for optional courses (approval workflow if cost involved)
  8. Real-time tracking dashboard: completion %, by entity, by department, overdue list
  9. Automated escalation triggers at configured intervals
  10. Completion data synced to employee profile and compliance dashboard
MasukanInput
  • Kursus yang ditugaskan dengan kriteria populasi target
  • Data populasi karyawan: entitas, departemen, grade, lokasi, job family
  • Konfigurasi deadline dan escalation rules
  • Jadwal sesi kelas (untuk instructor-led training)
  • Alokasi anggaran L&D per departemen (untuk kursus eksternal/berbayar)
  • Auto-assignment rules (onboarding hire baru, compliance tahunan, role-specific)
  • Course to be assigned with target population criteria
  • Employee population data: entity, department, grade, location, job family
  • Deadline and escalation rules configuration
  • Classroom session schedule (for instructor-led training)
  • L&D budget allocation per department (for external/paid courses)
  • Auto-assignment rules (new hire onboarding, annual compliance, role-specific)
KeluaranOutput
  • Assignment records: siapa, kursus apa, deadline, escalation tier
  • Notifikasi enrollment dikirim via HC AI, email, ESS
  • Real-time completion tracking dashboard (global, entitas, departemen)
  • Laporan overdue dengan status eskalasi per karyawan
  • Enrollment sesi kelas dengan capacity tracking
  • Konsumsi anggaran per departemen untuk training eksternal
  • Compliance dashboard: % complete per mandatory course
  • Assignment records: who, what course, deadline, escalation tier
  • Enrollment notifications sent via HC AI, email, ESS
  • Real-time completion tracking dashboard (global, entity, department views)
  • Overdue report with escalation status per employee
  • Classroom session enrollment with capacity tracking
  • Budget consumption per department for external training
  • Compliance dashboard: % complete per mandatory course
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): populasi karyawan untuk targeting
  • Organization Design (FR-OD-001): struktur departemen, entitas, lokasi
  • Katalog Kursus (FR-LD-001): kursus tersedia dan jadwal sesi
  • Onboarding Workflow (FR-TA-006b): trigger auto-assignment hire baru
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): employee population for targeting
  • Organization Design (FR-OD-001): department, entity, location structure
  • Course Catalog (FR-LD-001): available courses and session schedules
  • Onboarding Workflow (FR-TA-006b): new hire auto-assignment trigger
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Email / SMS Gateway: notifikasi enrollment dan pengingat
  • Calendar Systems: integrasi penjadwalan sesi kelas
  • Email / SMS Gateway: enrollment and reminder notifications
  • Calendar Systems: classroom session scheduling integration
Alur 3 dari 5 Flow 3 of 5

Delivery & Tracking Progress Pembelajaran

Learning Delivery & Progress Tracking

Dari multi-modal delivery yang menjangkau karyawan di pabrik, kantor, dan lokasi terpencil (termasuk offline), hingga manager dashboard real-time dengan traffic light system untuk intervensi proaktif.

From multi-modal delivery reaching employees in factories, offices, and remote locations (including offline), to a real-time manager dashboard with traffic light system for proactive intervention.

HC AIFR-LD-003aMulti-Modal Learning DeliveryMulti-Modal Learning Delivery
HC AIFR-LD-003bMonitoring Progress & Manager DashboardProgress Monitoring & Manager Dashboard
FR-LD-003aMulti-Modal Learning DeliveryMulti-Modal Learning DeliveryHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan,As an Employee, saya ingin mengakses dan menyelesaikan training di perangkat apapun (HP, tablet, laptop), di lokasi apapun (lantai pabrik, kantor, rumah, dalam perjalanan), dengan kemampuan offline untuk area dengan konektivitas buruk, dan melacak progress secara mulus di semua perangkatI want to access and complete training on any device (mobile, tablet, laptop), in any location (factory floor, office, home, commuting), with offline capability for areas with poor connectivity, and track progress seamlessly across all devices sehingga pembelajaran sesuai rutinitas harian saya terlepas dari lokasi kerja, dan progress tidak pernah hilang saat berpindah perangkat.so that learning fits into my daily routine regardless of where I work, and progress never gets lost when switching devices.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; offline sync otomatis saat kembali online; progress disimpan per modulReal-time; offline auto-sync when back online; progress saved per module
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang penyelesaian: modul terakhir selesai memicu asesmen dan notifikasi completionCompletion gate: final module completion triggers assessment and completion notification
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
4.5/5.0 learner satisfaction score; 85%+ overall completion rate semua kursus4.5/5.0 learner satisfaction score; 85%+ overall course completion rate
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Mobile-first LMS: fully responsive untuk smartphone, tablet, dan desktop
  • Offline mode: download kursus untuk diselesaikan offline, auto-sync progress saat kembali online
  • Resume anywhere: progress disinkronkan di semua perangkat secara real-time (mulai di HP, lanjut di laptop)
  • Microlearning support: modul 5-10 menit untuk pekerja pabrik dan lapangan
  • Video streaming: kualitas adaptif berdasarkan kecepatan koneksi
  • Konten interaktif: quiz, drag-and-drop, simulasi skenario di mobile
  • Push notifications: pengingat belajar, deadline alerts, ucapan selamat completion via HC AI
  • Aksesibilitas: screen reader support, closed captions pada video, text size dan kontras yang bisa disesuaikan
  • Mobile-first LMS: fully responsive for smartphones, tablets, and desktops
  • Offline mode: download courses for offline completion, auto-sync progress when back online
  • Resume anywhere: progress syncs across devices in real-time (start on phone, continue on laptop)
  • Microlearning support: 5-10 minute modules for factory and field workers
  • Video streaming: adaptive quality based on connection speed
  • Interactive content: quizzes, drag-and-drop, scenario simulations on mobile
  • Push notifications: study reminders, deadline alerts, completion congratulations via HC AI
  • Accessibility: screen reader support, closed captions on video, adjustable text size and contrast
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Pengalaman belajar Ahmad (Operator Gudang, Pabrik Bekasi): 07:30: Buka HC AI di HP saat istirahat, download 'Forklift Safety Refresher' (offline, 15 menit). 08:00: Selesaikan 3 dari 5 modul offline di lantai pabrik. 12:30: Istirahat makan siang, WiFi terhubung, progress auto-sync (60% selesai). 12:45: Selesaikan 2 modul tersisa di HP. 13:00: Ambil asesmen quiz (skor: 88/100, lulus). Sertifikat diterbitkan seketika. Skills diperbarui di profil. Manager diberitahu.Ahmad's (Warehouse Operator, Bekasi Factory) learning experience: 07:30: Opens HC AI on phone during break, downloads 'Forklift Safety Refresher' (offline, 15 min). 08:00: Completes 3 of 5 modules offline on factory floor. 12:30: Lunch break, WiFi connected, progress auto-synced (60% complete). 12:45: Completes remaining 2 modules on phone. 13:00: Takes assessment quiz (score: 88/100, passed). Certificate issued instantly. Skills updated in profile. Manager notified."
ProsesProcess
  1. Karyawan mengakses kursus via HC AI (mobile), ESS portal (web), atau LMS app
  2. Untuk offline: karyawan download konten kursus ke perangkat sebelum masuk area minim koneksi
  3. Kursus diluncurkan dalam format yang sesuai (SCORM player, video player, PDF reader)
  4. Progress dilacak terus menerus: penyelesaian modul, waktu yang dihabiskan, percobaan quiz
  5. Untuk kelas/virtual: kehadiran direkam via QR code, biometrik, atau check-in manual
  6. Progress disinkronkan di semua perangkat secara real-time (atau saat reconnect untuk offline)
  7. Bookmark dan catatan disimpan untuk referensi nanti
  8. HC AI mengirim dorongan dan pengingat berdasarkan pace progress
  9. Penyelesaian kursus memicu: asesmen, sertifikat, pembaruan skills, notifikasi manager
  10. Riwayat pembelajaran direkam di profil karyawan dengan jejak audit lengkap
  1. Employee accesses course via HC AI (mobile), ESS portal (web), or LMS app
  2. For offline: employee downloads course content to device before entering low-connectivity area
  3. Course launches in appropriate format (SCORM player, video player, PDF reader)
  4. Progress tracked continuously: module completion, time spent, quiz attempts
  5. For classroom/virtual: attendance captured via QR code, biometric, or manual check-in
  6. Progress synced across devices in real-time (or upon reconnection for offline)
  7. Bookmarks and notes saved for later reference
  8. HC AI sends encouragement and reminders based on progress pace
  9. Course completion triggers: assessment, certificate, skills update, manager notification
  10. Learning history recorded in employee profile with full audit trail
MasukanInput
  • Konten kursus yang di-enroll (SCORM, video, PDF, modul interaktif)
  • Informasi perangkat karyawan (mobile, tablet, desktop, OS)
  • Status konektivitas jaringan (online, offline, low-bandwidth)
  • Data progress dari sesi sebelumnya (resume-where-left-off)
  • Detail sesi kelas (lokasi, waktu, QR code, instruktur)
  • Preferensi aksesibilitas (screen reader, captions, text size)
  • Enrolled course content (SCORM, video, PDF, interactive modules)
  • Employee device information (mobile, tablet, desktop, OS)
  • Network connectivity status (online, offline, low-bandwidth)
  • Progress data from previous sessions (resume-where-left-off)
  • Classroom session details (location, time, QR code, instructor)
  • Accessibility preferences (screen reader, captions, text size)
KeluaranOutput
  • Delivery kursus di perangkat apapun dengan pengalaman yang dioptimalkan
  • Paket konten offline untuk download dan sync
  • Real-time progress tracking (% selesai, waktu yang dihabiskan, skor quiz)
  • Sinkronisasi progress lintas perangkat
  • Rekaman presensi kelas (QR/biometrik)
  • Konfirmasi completion dan pembuatan sertifikat
  • Log aktivitas pembelajaran (timestamps, perangkat, lokasi)
  • Course delivery on any device with optimised experience
  • Offline content packages for download and sync
  • Real-time progress tracking (% complete, time spent, quiz scores)
  • Cross-device progress synchronisation
  • Classroom attendance records (QR/biometric capture)
  • Completion confirmations and certificate generation
  • Learning activity log (timestamps, device, location)
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Content Server: SCORM packages, video, dokumen untuk streaming/download
  • Progress Tracking Engine: data penyelesaian level modul dan asesmen
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): preferensi perangkat dan aksesibilitas
  • Attendance System (FR-ESS-002): integrasi biometrik/QR untuk sesi kelas
  • Content Server: SCORM packages, videos, documents for streaming/download
  • Progress Tracking Engine: module-level completion and assessment data
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): device preferences and accessibility settings
  • Attendance System (FR-ESS-002): biometric/QR integration for classroom sessions
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • CDN: distribusi konten global untuk loading cepat di 9 negara
  • Push Notification Service: pengingat dan alerts via HC AI
  • Offline Sync Engine: device-level caching dan sinkronisasi progress
  • CDN: global content distribution for fast loading across 9 countries
  • Push Notification Service: HC AI reminders and alerts
  • Offline Sync Engine: device-level caching and progress synchronisation
Monitor Progress ↓Monitor Progress ↓
FR-LD-003bMonitoring Progress Real-Time & Manager DashboardReal-Time Progress Monitoring & Manager DashboardHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Manager / Spesialis L&D,As a Manager / L&D Specialist,
saya ingin memantau progress belajar tim secara real-time, melihat completion rates per kursus, departemen, dan individu, serta mengidentifikasi karyawan yang tertinggal sebelum deadline terlampauiI want to monitor my team's learning progress in real-time, see completion rates by course, department, and individual, and identify employees falling behind before deadlines are missed sehingga saya secara proaktif mengelola perkembangan tim, compliance training tidak pernah melewatkan deadline, dan saya bisa berdiskusi dengan anggota tim berdasarkan data pembelajaran aktual.so that I proactively manage my team's development, compliance training never misses deadlines, and I can have informed conversations with team members about their actual learning progress.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; prediksi risiko diperbarui setiap 24 jam; laporan kuartalan auto-generateReal-time; risk predictions updated every 24 hours; quarterly reports auto-generated
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Traffic light: Hijau (on track) / Kuning (at risk) / Merah (overdue) per karyawan per kursusTraffic light: Green (on track) / Yellow (at risk) / Red (overdue) per employee per course
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Avg 50+ jam belajar per karyawan per tahun; 0% overdue compliance trainingAvg 50+ learning hours per employee per year; 0% overdue compliance training
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Team learning dashboard: completion rates, jam belajar, kursus dalam progress per anggota tim
  • Analitik tingkat departemen: completion aggregate per departemen dengan perbandingan benchmark
  • Traffic light system: hijau (on track), kuning (at risk), merah (overdue) per karyawan per kursus
  • Predictive alerts: HC AI memprediksi karyawan mana yang akan melewatkan deadline berdasarkan pace
  • Drill-down: dari ringkasan departemen ke timeline belajar karyawan individu
  • Persiapan 1:1: menghasilkan poin diskusi pembelajaran untuk rapat manager-karyawan
  • Benchmarking: jam belajar tim vs rata-rata perusahaan dan standar industri
  • Team learning dashboard: completion rates, hours invested, courses in progress per team member
  • Department-level analytics: aggregate completion by department with benchmark comparison
  • Traffic light system: green (on track), yellow (at risk), red (overdue) per employee per course
  • Predictive alerts: HC AI predicts which employees will miss deadlines based on pace
  • Drill-down: from department summary to individual employee learning timeline
  • 1:1 preparation: generates learning discussion points for manager-employee meetings
  • Benchmarking: team learning hours vs. company average and industry standards
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Manager Dashboard (Head of Digital Marketing, 15 direct reports): Ringkasan Belajar Tim Q1 2026: Total jam: 342 (rata-rata 22,8 per orang vs rata-rata perusahaan 18,5 - excellent). Training mandatory: 100% selesai (semua 3 kursus). Pengembangan opsional: 8 dari 15 aktif mengejar learning path. At-risk: 2 karyawan (tertinggal di path 'Advanced Analytics', deadline 28 Feb). Top learner: Lisa (48 jam, 6 kursus, 2 sertifikasi). HC AI: Rekomendasikan nudge ke Ahmad dan Budi soal deadline analytics. Sarankan sesi knowledge-sharing tim tentang skill Python baru.Manager Dashboard (Head of Digital Marketing, 15 direct reports): Team Learning Summary Q1 2026: Total hours: 342 (avg 22.8 per person vs. company avg 18.5 - excellent). Mandatory training: 100% complete (all 3 courses). Optional development: 8 of 15 actively pursuing learning paths. At-risk: 2 employees (behind on 'Advanced Analytics' path, deadline Feb 28). Top learner: Lisa (48 hours, 6 courses, 2 certifications). HC AI: Recommend nudging Ahmad and Budi on analytics deadline. Suggest team knowledge-sharing session on new Python skills."
ProsesProcess
  1. Dashboard memuat data belajar tim secara real-time
  2. Overview: total jam, completion rates, status compliance mandatory
  3. Traffic light indicators per karyawan per kursus yang ditugaskan
  4. HC AI memprediksi risiko completion berdasarkan pace saat ini vs deadline
  5. Manager drill-down ke timeline belajar karyawan individu
  6. Karyawan at-risk ditandai dengan tindakan yang disarankan
  7. Manager dapat kirim dorongan atau re-prioritize via HC AI
  8. Persiapan 1:1: HC AI menghasilkan poin diskusi pembelajaran per anggota tim
  9. Benchmarking departemen: bandingkan tim vs departemen lain dan perusahaan
  10. Laporan belajar kuartalan auto-generate untuk tinjauan leadership
  1. Dashboard loads team learning data in real-time
  2. Overview: total hours, completion rates, mandatory compliance status
  3. Traffic light indicators per employee per assigned course
  4. HC AI predicts completion risk based on current pace vs. deadline
  5. Manager drills down to individual employee learning timeline
  6. At-risk employees flagged with recommended actions
  7. Manager can send encouragement or reassign priorities via HC AI
  8. 1:1 prep: HC AI generates learning discussion points per team member
  9. Department benchmarking: compare team vs. other departments and company
  10. Quarterly learning report auto-generated for leadership review
MasukanInput
  • Daftar anggota tim dari hierarki org
  • Data enrollment dan completion kursus per anggota tim
  • Deadline training mandatory dan status eskalasi
  • Jam belajar yang dicatat per karyawan
  • Benchmark perusahaan dan departemen untuk perbandingan
  • Progress Individual Development Plans (IDP)
  • Team member list from org hierarchy
  • Course enrollment and completion data per team member
  • Mandatory training deadlines and escalation status
  • Learning hours logged per employee
  • Company and department benchmarks for comparison
  • Individual Development Plans (IDP) progress
KeluaranOutput
  • Real-time team learning dashboard (completion, jam, status)
  • Traffic light risk indicators per karyawan per kursus
  • Predictive deadline-miss alerts dengan tindakan yang disarankan
  • Timeline belajar karyawan individu untuk diskusi 1:1
  • Laporan benchmarking departemen (vs rata-rata perusahaan)
  • Ringkasan belajar tim kuartalan untuk leadership
  • Action triggers: kirim pengingat, re-assign kursus, eskalasi
  • Real-time team learning dashboard (completion, hours, status)
  • Traffic light risk indicators per employee per course
  • Predictive deadline-miss alerts with recommended actions
  • Individual employee learning timeline for 1:1 discussions
  • Department benchmarking report (vs. company average)
  • Quarterly team learning summary for leadership
  • Action triggers: send reminders, reassign courses, escalate
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Progress Tracking Engine (FR-LD-003a): data completion real-time
  • Organization Hierarchy (FR-OD-001): relasi manager-tim
  • Training Assignments (FR-LD-002b): kursus mandatory dan deadline
  • IDP Data (FR-PM-001): tujuan rencana pengembangan individu
  • Progress Tracking Engine (FR-LD-003a): real-time completion data
  • Organization Hierarchy (FR-OD-001): manager-team relationships
  • Training Assignments (FR-LD-002b): mandatory courses and deadlines
  • IDP Data (FR-PM-001): individual development plan goals
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Industry L&D Benchmarks: rata-rata jam belajar per sektor dan peran
  • Push Notification Service: pengingat yang dipicu manager ke tim
  • Industry L&D Benchmarks: average learning hours by sector and role
  • Push Notification Service: manager-triggered reminders to team
Alur 4 dari 5 Flow 4 of 5

Asesmen, Sertifikasi & Pembaruan Skills

Assessment, Certification & Skills Update

Dari adaptive testing berbasis AI yang menyesuaikan kesulitan secara real-time, hingga penerbitan sertifikat digital otomatis dan pembaruan profil kompetensi karyawan yang langsung terhubung ke kesiapan karier dan succession planning.

From AI-powered adaptive testing that adjusts difficulty in real-time, to automatic digital certificate issuance and employee competency profile updates directly linked to career readiness and succession planning.

HC AIFR-LD-004aAsesmen Berbasis AI & Adaptive TestingAI-Powered Assessment & Adaptive Testing
HC AIFR-LD-004bManajemen Sertifikasi & Pembaruan Profil SkillsCertification Management & Skills Profile Update
FR-LD-004aAsesmen Berbasis AI & Adaptive TestingAI-Powered Assessment & Adaptive TestingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D,As an L&D Specialist, saya ingin membuat asesmen menggunakan question bank yang dihasilkan AI, mengonfigurasi passing score dan batas percobaan, menggunakan adaptive testing yang menyesuaikan kesulitan berdasarkan respons, dan menghasilkan analisis kompetensi terperinci per pelajarI want to create assessments using AI-generated question banks, configure passing scores and attempt limits, deploy adaptive testing that adjusts difficulty based on responses, and generate detailed competency analysis per learner sehingga asesmen mengukur akuisisi pengetahuan secara akurat, question bank kaya dan beragam, dan data asesmen langsung memperbarui profil kompetensi.so that assessments accurately measure knowledge acquisition, the question bank is rich and diverse, and assessment data directly feeds competency profiles.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Per penyelesaian kursus; cooling-off 24 jam antara percobaan yang gagalPer course completion; 24-hour cooling-off between failed attempts
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang lulus: skor ≥ passing score memicu penerbitan sertifikat; gagal memicu remediation pathPass gate: score ≥ passing score triggers certificate issuance; fail triggers remediation path
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Pass rate ≥ 80% per kursus; ≥ 25% peningkatan kompetensi pre-test vs post-testPass rate ≥ 80% per course; ≥ 25% competency improvement pre-test vs post-test
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • AI question generator: membuat pertanyaan quiz dari konten kursus (pilihan ganda, benar/salah, berbasis skenario, drag-and-drop)
  • Question bank management: dikategorikan berdasarkan topik, tingkat kesulitan, competency mapping
  • Adaptive testing: menyesuaikan kesulitan pertanyaan secara real-time berdasarkan jawaban benar/salah
  • Anti-cheating: urutan pertanyaan acak, bagian berwaktu, browser lock untuk asesmen high-stakes
  • Analisis tingkat kompetensi: memetakan hasil asesmen ke level profisiensi kompetensi spesifik
  • Rekomendasi remediation: mengidentifikasi area lemah dan menyarankan konten review yang ditargetkan
  • Asesmen multi-bahasa: tes yang sama dalam 8 bahasa dengan adaptasi kultural
  • AI question generator: creates quiz questions from course content (multiple choice, true/false, scenario-based, drag-and-drop)
  • Question bank management: categorised by topic, difficulty level, competency mapped
  • Adaptive testing: adjusts question difficulty in real-time based on correct/incorrect answers
  • Anti-cheating: randomised question order, timed sections, browser lock for high-stakes assessments
  • Competency-level analysis: maps assessment results to specific competency proficiency levels
  • Remediation recommendations: identifies weak areas and suggests targeted review content
  • Multi-language assessments: same test in 8 languages with cultural adaptation
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Hasil Asesmen 'Supply Chain Management Advanced' (42 peserta): Pass rate: 83% (35 lulus, 7 perlu retake). Skor rata-rata: 78/100. Adaptive testing: 15 peserta mendapat skor cukup tinggi untuk skip pertanyaan fondasi (hemat rata-rata 12 menit). Breakdown kompetensi: Demand Planning 82% (kuat), Inventory Management 75% (memadai), Logistics Optimization 68% (perlu perbaikan). HC AI: Rekomendasikan modul tambahan Logistics Optimization untuk 18 peserta yang skor di bawah 70% pada bagian tersebut.Assessment Results for 'Supply Chain Management Advanced' (42 participants): Pass rate: 83% (35 passed, 7 need retake). Average score: 78/100. Adaptive testing: 15 participants scored high enough to skip foundational questions (saved avg 12 minutes). Competency breakdown: Demand Planning 82% (strong), Inventory Management 75% (adequate), Logistics Optimization 68% (needs improvement). HC AI: Recommend supplementary module on Logistics Optimization for the 18 participants who scored below 70% on that section."
ProsesProcess
  1. L&D mengonfigurasi asesmen: jumlah pertanyaan, batas waktu, passing score, batas percobaan
  2. HC AI menghasilkan question bank dari konten kursus (atau L&D upload pertanyaan kustom)
  3. Pertanyaan dikategorikan berdasarkan topik, kesulitan, dan competency mapping
  4. Asesmen di-deploy: pre-test (baseline) atau post-test (verifikasi pengetahuan)
  5. Adaptive mode: sistem menyesuaikan kesulitan berdasarkan respons real-time
  6. Anti-cheating measures diaktifkan untuk sertifikasi high-stakes
  7. Penilaian segera dengan feedback terperinci per pertanyaan
  8. Analisis tingkat kompetensi: memetakan hasil ke level profisiensi skill spesifik
  9. Untuk percobaan yang gagal: remediation path disarankan dengan materi review yang ditargetkan
  10. Data asesmen disinkronkan ke profil kompetensi karyawan
  1. L&D configures assessment: question count, time limit, passing score, attempts allowed
  2. HC AI generates question bank from course content (or L&D uploads custom questions)
  3. Questions categorised by topic, difficulty, and competency mapping
  4. Assessment deployed: pre-test (baseline) or post-test (knowledge verification)
  5. Adaptive mode: system adjusts difficulty based on real-time responses
  6. Anti-cheating measures activated for high-stakes certifications
  7. Immediate scoring with detailed feedback per question
  8. Competency-level analysis: maps results to specific skill proficiency levels
  9. For failed attempts: remediation path suggested with targeted review materials
  10. Assessment data synced to employee competency profile
MasukanInput
  • Konten kursus untuk AI question generation
  • Question bank kustom (jika dibuat manual)
  • Konfigurasi asesmen: passing score, batas waktu, percobaan, adaptive mode
  • Competency mapping: pertanyaan mana memetakan ke kompetensi mana
  • Anti-cheating rules: randomisasi, browser lock, level proctoring
  • Persyaratan multi-bahasa untuk delivery asesmen
  • Course content for AI question generation
  • Custom question bank (if manually created)
  • Assessment configuration: passing score, time limit, attempts, adaptive mode
  • Competency mapping: which questions map to which competencies
  • Anti-cheating rules: randomisation, browser lock, proctoring level
  • Multi-language requirements for assessment delivery
KeluaranOutput
  • Asesmen lengkap dengan pertanyaan AI-generated dan/atau kustom
  • Real-time adaptive scoring selama pengerjaan tes
  • Hasil terperinci: total skor, analisis per pertanyaan, waktu yang dihabiskan
  • Analisis profisiensi kompetensi (per area skill)
  • Rekomendasi remediation untuk area yang gagal
  • Analitik asesmen: pass rates, analisis kesulitan, efektivitas pertanyaan
  • Profil kompetensi karyawan diperbarui dengan data asesmen
  • Complete assessment with AI-generated and/or custom questions
  • Real-time adaptive scoring during test taking
  • Detailed results: total score, per-question analysis, time spent
  • Competency proficiency analysis (per skill area)
  • Remediation recommendations for failed areas
  • Assessment analytics: pass rates, difficulty analysis, question effectiveness
  • Employee competency profile updated with assessment data
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Konten Kursus (FR-LD-001): materi sumber untuk AI question generation
  • Competency Framework: skill-to-question mapping
  • Employee Competency Profile (FR-ECA-001): profisiensi saat ini untuk adaptive baseline
  • Assessment History: percobaan dan skor sebelumnya untuk pelacakan perkembangan
  • Course Content (FR-LD-001): source material for AI question generation
  • Competency Framework: skill-to-question mapping
  • Employee Competency Profile (FR-ECA-001): current proficiency for adaptive baseline
  • Assessment History: previous attempts and scores for progression tracking
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Assessment Standards (Kirkpatrick, Bloom's Taxonomy): framework desain pertanyaan
  • Proctoring Services: remote proctoring untuk sertifikasi high-stakes
  • Assessment Standards (Kirkpatrick, Bloom's Taxonomy): question design frameworks
  • Proctoring Services: remote proctoring for high-stakes certifications
Certify & Update ↓Certify & Update ↓
FR-LD-004bManajemen Sertifikasi & Pembaruan Profil SkillsCertification Management & Skills Profile UpdateHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
