Sebagai Karyawan / Spesialis L&D,As an Employee / L&D Specialist, saya ingin menerima sertifikat digital saat penyelesaian kursus, mengelola sertifikat dengan masa berlaku dan pengingat renewal, serta memiliki skills yang diselesaikan secara otomatis diperbarui di profil talent saya yang menghubungkan hasil pembelajaran ke kesiapan karierI want to receive digital certificates upon course completion, have certificates managed with validity periods and renewal reminders, and have completed skills automatically updated in my talent profile linking learning outcomes to career readiness sehingga kualifikasi saya selalu terkini dan dapat diverifikasi, sertifikasi yang akan expired diperbarui sebelum habis masa berlaku, dan pembelajaran saya langsung meningkatkan profil karier dan kesiapan promosi.so that my qualifications are always current and verifiable, expiring certifications are renewed before they lapse, and my learning directly enhances my career profile and promotion readiness.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Otomatis saat asesmen lulus; pengingat renewal H-60, H-30, H-7 sebelum kadaluarsaAutomatic on assessment pass; renewal reminders D-60, D-30, D-7 before expiry
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang kepatuhan: sertifikat regulatory (BNSP, OSHA) expired memblokir akses sistem terkaitCompliance gate: expired regulatory certificates (BNSP, OSHA) block access to related systems
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
100% sertifikat regulasi valid; career readiness score meningkat rata-rata 15% per tahun per karyawan100% valid regulatory certificates; career readiness score increases avg 15% per year per employee
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Digital certificate generation: auto-diterbitkan saat lulus asesmen dengan kode verifikasi unik dan QR code
  • Certificate validity management: melacak tanggal kadaluarsa, mengirim pengingat renewal H-60/30/7
  • Certification registry: repositori pusat semua sertifikasi karyawan (internal dan eksternal)
  • External certification tracking: karyawan upload sertifikasi eksternal (PMP, CFA, AWS), AI mengekstrak detail
  • Skills auto-update: kursus yang diselesaikan secara otomatis memperbarui skills dan level kompetensi karyawan
  • Career readiness score: menghitung bagaimana penyelesaian training memetakan ke persyaratan grade berikutnya
  • Compliance certification dashboard: melacak sertifikasi regulasi di 9 negara
  • Digital certificate generation: auto-issued upon passing assessment with unique verification code and QR code
  • Certificate validity management: tracks expiry dates, sends renewal reminders D-60/30/7
  • Certification registry: central repository of all employee certifications (internal and external)
  • External certification tracking: employees upload external certs (PMP, CFA, AWS), AI extracts details
  • Skills auto-update: completed courses automatically update employee skills and competency levels
  • Career readiness score: calculates how training completion maps to next-grade requirements
  • Compliance certification dashboard: tracks regulatory certifications across 9 countries
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Sertifikat Diterbitkan: Ahmad Santoso menyelesaikan 'Advanced Forklift Operation & Safety' dengan skor 92/100. Nomor Sertifikat: ONE-LMS-2026-04521. Berlaku: Feb 2026 s/d Feb 2028 (24 bulan). Skills diperbarui: Forklift Operation (L2 ke L3), Warehouse Safety (L2 ke L3). Kepatuhan regulasi: memenuhi persyaratan sertifikasi operator forklift BNSP Indonesia. Pengingat renewal ditetapkan: Jan 2028. Dampak karier: sekarang memenuhi kualifikasi Senior Warehouse Operator (Grade 6). 3 dari 4 persyaratan terpenuhi, tersisa: 2 tahun tenure di grade saat ini.Certificate Issued: Ahmad Santoso completed 'Advanced Forklift Operation & Safety' with score 92/100. Certificate #: ONE-LMS-2026-04521. Valid: Feb 2026 to Feb 2028 (24 months). Skills updated: Forklift Operation (L2 to L3), Warehouse Safety (L2 to L3). Regulatory compliance: meets Indonesian BNSP forklift operator certification requirement. Renewal reminder set: Jan 2028. Career impact: now meets qualification for Senior Warehouse Operator (Grade 6). 3 of 4 requirements met, remaining: 2 years tenure at current grade."
ProsesProcess
  1. Karyawan lulus asesmen dengan skor memenuhi atau melampaui passing threshold
  2. Sertifikat digital auto-generated dengan ID unik, QR code, dan tanggal berlaku
  3. Sertifikat ditambahkan ke certification registry karyawan
  4. Skills dan level kompetensi auto-diperbarui di profil talent karyawan
  5. Career readiness direcalculate: % persyaratan grade berikutnya yang sudah terpenuhi
  6. Untuk sertifikat regulasi: compliance dashboard diperbarui per persyaratan negara
  7. Renewal calendar dibuat: pengingat di H-60, H-30, dan H-7 sebelum kadaluarsa
  8. Sertifikasi eksternal: karyawan upload, HC AI mengekstrak detail dan validasi
  9. Manager diberitahu tentang pencapaian sertifikasi anggota tim
  10. Data sertifikasi masuk ke succession planning dan talent review
  1. Employee passes assessment with score meeting or exceeding passing threshold
  2. Digital certificate auto-generated with unique ID, QR code, and validity dates
  3. Certificate added to employee's certification registry
  4. Skills and competency levels auto-updated in employee talent profile
  5. Career readiness recalculated: % of next-grade requirements now met
  6. For regulatory certificates: compliance dashboard updated per country requirements
  7. Renewal calendar created: reminders at D-60, D-30, and D-7 before expiry
  8. External certifications: employee uploads, HC AI extracts details and validates
  9. Manager notified of team member's certification achievements
  10. Certification data feeds into succession planning and talent review
MasukanInput
  • Hasil asesmen (lulus/gagal, skor, breakdown kompetensi)
  • Template sertifikat dengan branding organisasi
  • Aturan validitas sertifikasi (durasi, persyaratan renewal)
  • Competency framework untuk skills level update mapping
  • Persyaratan career path (sertifikasi yang dibutuhkan per grade)
  • Persyaratan sertifikasi regulasi per negara
  • Upload sertifikasi eksternal dari karyawan
  • Assessment results (pass/fail, score, competency breakdown)
  • Certificate template with organisation branding
  • Certification validity rules (duration, renewal requirements)
  • Competency framework for skills level update mapping
  • Career path requirements (certifications needed per grade)
  • Regulatory certification requirements per country
  • External certification uploads from employees
KeluaranOutput
  • Sertifikat digital dengan ID unik dan QR verification code
  • Profil skills dan kompetensi karyawan yang diperbarui
  • Recalculasi career readiness score
  • Entri certification registry dengan validity tracking
  • Update compliance dashboard (sertifikasi regulasi per negara)
  • Renewal reminder schedule diaktifkan
  • Notifikasi manager tentang pencapaian sertifikasi
  • Data talent review dan succession diperbarui
  • Digital certificate with unique ID and QR verification code
  • Updated employee skills and competency profile
  • Career readiness score recalculation
  • Certification registry entry with validity tracking
  • Compliance dashboard update (regulatory certifications by country)
  • Renewal reminder schedule activated
  • Manager notification of certification achievements
  • Talent review and succession data updated
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Assessment Results (FR-LD-004a): data pass/fail dan skor kompetensi
  • Employee Competency Profile (FR-ECA-001): skills yang akan diperbarui
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): persyaratan sertifikasi per grade
  • Compliance Config: aturan sertifikasi regulasi per negara
  • Succession Planning (FR-CM-003): data talent readiness
  • Assessment Results (FR-LD-004a): pass/fail data and competency scores
  • Employee Competency Profile (FR-ECA-001): skills to be updated
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): certification requirements per grade
  • Compliance Config: regulatory certification rules per country
  • Succession Planning (FR-CM-003): talent readiness data
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Certificate Verification Services: validasi sertifikasi pihak ketiga
  • Regulatory Bodies (BNSP, SHRM, PMI, ISO): persyaratan sertifikasi eksternal
  • Digital Badging Platforms (Credly): penerbitan digital badge eksternal
  • Certificate Verification Services: third-party cert validation
  • Regulatory Bodies (BNSP, SHRM, PMI, ISO): external certification requirements
  • Digital Badging Platforms (Credly): external badge issuance
Alur 5 dari 5 Flow 5 of 5

Analitik Pembelajaran & Pengukuran ROI

Learning Analytics & ROI Measurement

Dari dashboard analitik global real-time yang menunjukkan heatmap kompetensi dan tren pembelajaran, hingga evaluasi ROI Kirkpatrick 4-level yang menghubungkan investasi L&D ke dampak bisnis yang terukur dan dapat dipertahankan ke CPO dan Finance Director.

From a real-time global analytics dashboard showing competency heatmaps and learning trends, to Kirkpatrick 4-level ROI evaluation linking L&D investment to measurable business impact defensible to the CPO and Finance Director.

HC AIFR-LD-005aDashboard Analitik Pembelajaran KomprehensifComprehensive Learning Analytics Dashboard
HC AIFR-LD-005bPengukuran ROI & Analisis Dampak BisnisROI Measurement & Business Impact Analysis
FR-LD-005aDashboard Analitik Pembelajaran KomprehensifComprehensive Learning Analytics DashboardHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Director / CPO,As an L&D Director / CPO, saya ingin mengakses dashboard analitik pembelajaran komprehensif yang menampilkan jam belajar yang diinvestasikan, completion rates, peningkatan kompetensi, cakupan sertifikasi, dan tren keterlibatan pembelajaran di semua 9 negara dan 32.000+ karyawanI want to access a comprehensive learning analytics dashboard showing learning hours invested, completion rates, competency improvements, certification coverage, and learning engagement trends across all 9 countries and 32,000+ employees sehingga saya dapat mendemonstrasikan dampak L&D ke board, mengoptimalkan alokasi investasi pembelajaran, mengidentifikasi capability gap di tingkat organisasi, dan membuat keputusan berbasis data tentang strategi pembelajaran kami.so that I can demonstrate L&D impact to the board, optimise learning investment allocation, identify capability gaps at organisational level, and make data-driven decisions about our learning strategy.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; insight strategis dan anomali didorong proaktif oleh HC AIReal-time; strategic insights and anomalies proactively pushed by HC AI
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Pemicu tindakan: gap kompetensi kritis atau penurunan tren memicu rekomendasi strategis HC AIAction trigger: critical competency gaps or declining trends trigger HC AI strategic recommendations
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
50+ jam belajar/karyawan/tahun; avg course rating ≥ 4.2/5.0; 70%+ katalog aktif digunakan50+ learning hours/employee/year; avg course rating ≥ 4.2/5.0; 70%+ active catalog utilization
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Global learning dashboard: metrik real-time di semua entitas dan negara
  • Key metrics: total jam belajar, avg jam per karyawan, completion rates, skor asesmen
  • Competency heatmap: gambaran visual cakupan skill per departemen dan entitas
  • Engagement analytics: frekuensi login, titik drop-off kursus, waktu dan format belajar yang disukai
  • Trending topics: kursus paling populer, area skill yang tumbuh paling cepat, kebutuhan belajar yang muncul
  • Natural language queries: 'HC AI, berapa completion rate training compliance di Thailand?'
  • Benchmarking: internal (entitas vs entitas) dan eksternal (vs rata-rata industri jam belajar)
  • Global learning dashboard: real-time metrics across all entities and countries
  • Key metrics: total learning hours, avg hours per employee, completion rates, assessment scores
  • Competency heatmap: visual overview of skill coverage across departments and entities
  • Engagement analytics: login frequency, course drop-off points, preferred learning times and formats
  • Trending topics: most popular courses, fastest-growing skill areas, emerging learning needs
  • Natural language queries: 'HC AI, what is the compliance training completion rate in Thailand?'
  • Benchmarking: internal (entity vs entity) and external (vs industry average learning hours)
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Dashboard L&D Q1 2026: Total jam belajar: 485.000 (avg 14,9 per karyawan, naik 18% YoY). Completion rate: 87% untuk mandatory, 62% untuk opsional. Kursus teratas: Anti-Penyuapan (100% mandate selesai), Leadership Foundations (2.400 enroll), Digital Skills (1.800 enroll). Competency heatmap: Kuat di Operations (hijau), Manufacturing (hijau). Gap di Digital Marketing (kuning), Data Analytics (merah, hanya 45% target skill level). Per negara: Indonesia memimpin (16,2 jam/karyawan), Singapura (15,8), Vietnam tertinggal (10,4). HC AI: Rekomendasikan tingkatkan investasi data analytics 40% dan luncurkan kampanye keterlibatan belajar Vietnam.L&D Dashboard Q1 2026: Total learning hours: 485,000 (avg 14.9 per employee, up 18% YoY). Completion rate: 87% for mandatory, 62% for optional. Top courses: Anti-Bribery (100% mandate complete), Leadership Foundations (2,400 enrolled), Digital Skills (1,800 enrolled). Competency heatmap: Strong in Operations (green), Manufacturing (green). Gaps in Digital Marketing (yellow), Data Analytics (red, only 45% target skill level). By country: Indonesia leads (16.2 hrs/emp), Singapore (15.8), Vietnam lagging (10.4). HC AI: Recommend increasing data analytics investment by 40% and launching Vietnam learning engagement campaign."
ProsesProcess
  1. Sistem mengagregasi data belajar di semua entitas dan negara
  2. Key metrics dihitung: jam, completion, skor, keterlibatan secara real-time
  3. Competency heatmap dibuat: cakupan skill vs target per departemen
  4. Pola keterlibatan dianalisis: waktu belajar puncak, format yang disukai, titik drop-off
  5. Trending analysis: kursus paling populer, permintaan skill yang muncul
  6. Natural language query support untuk pertanyaan ad-hoc
  7. Benchmarking: bandingkan entitas secara internal dan terhadap industri
  8. HC AI menghasilkan insights dan rekomendasi untuk strategi L&D
  9. Laporan eksekutif kuartalan auto-generate untuk presentasi ke board
  10. Rekomendasi alokasi anggaran berdasarkan ROI dan analisis gap
  1. System aggregates learning data across all entities and countries
  2. Key metrics calculated: hours, completions, scores, engagement in real-time
  3. Competency heatmap generated: skill coverage vs. targets by department
  4. Engagement patterns analysed: peak learning times, preferred formats, drop-off points
  5. Trending analysis: most popular courses, emerging skill demands
  6. Natural language query support for ad-hoc questions
  7. Benchmarking: compare entities internally and against industry
  8. HC AI generates insights and recommendations for L&D strategy
  9. Quarterly executive report auto-generated for board presentation
  10. Budget allocation recommendations based on ROI and gap analysis
MasukanInput
  • Semua data aktivitas belajar (enrollment, completion, asesmen, waktu yang dihabiskan)
  • Target kompetensi per departemen dan entitas
  • Data populasi karyawan untuk kalkulasi per kapita
  • Data alokasi anggaran untuk kalkulasi ROI
  • Data benchmark industri untuk perbandingan eksternal
  • Data keterlibatan (frekuensi login, durasi sesi, penggunaan perangkat)
  • All learning activity data (enrollment, completion, assessment, time spent)
  • Competency targets by department and entity
  • Employee population data for per-capita calculations
  • Budget allocation data for ROI calculations
  • Industry benchmark data for external comparison
  • Engagement data (login frequency, session duration, device usage)
KeluaranOutput
  • Global learning dashboard dengan drill-down per entitas, negara, departemen
  • Competency heatmap: cakupan skill vs target
  • Engagement analytics: pola belajar, analisis drop-off, preferensi format
  • Trending topics dan permintaan skill yang muncul
  • Laporan benchmarking: perbandingan internal dan eksternal
  • AI-generated insights dan rekomendasi strategi
  • Laporan belajar kuartalan siap board
  • Global learning dashboard with drill-down by entity, country, department
  • Competency heatmap: skill coverage vs. targets
  • Engagement analytics: learning patterns, drop-off analysis, format preferences
  • Trending topics and emerging skill demands
  • Benchmarking report: internal and external comparisons
  • AI-generated insights and strategy recommendations
  • Board-ready quarterly learning report
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Progress Tracking Engine (FR-LD-003): semua data aktivitas belajar
  • Competency Framework: target skill per peran dan departemen
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): data populasi untuk metrik per kapita
  • Budget Data (FR-CB-001): alokasi anggaran L&D untuk ROI
  • Progress Tracking Engine (FR-LD-003): all learning activity data
  • Competency Framework: skill targets by role and department
  • Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001): population data for per-capita metrics
  • Budget Data (FR-CB-001): L&D budget allocation for ROI
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Industry L&D Benchmarks (ATD, LinkedIn Workplace Learning Report): data perbandingan eksternal
  • Market Skills Demand Data: tren skill yang muncul dan kebutuhan masa depan
  • Industry L&D Benchmarks (ATD, LinkedIn Workplace Learning Report): external comparison data
  • Market Skills Demand Data: emerging skill trends and future needs
Ukur Dampak ↓Measure Impact ↓
FR-LD-005bPengukuran ROI Pembelajaran & Analisis Dampak BisnisLearning ROI Measurement & Business Impact AnalysisHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Director / CFO,As an L&D Director / CFO, saya ingin mengukur return on investment (ROI) program pembelajaran dengan menghubungkan penyelesaian training ke outcome bisnis (peningkatan kinerja, produktivitas, pengurangan error, dampak retensi, kesiapan promosi), menggunakan framework evaluasi Kirkpatrick 4-levelI want to measure the return on investment (ROI) of learning programs by linking training completion to business outcomes (performance improvement, productivity gains, error reduction, retention impact, promotion readiness), with Kirkpatrick 4-level evaluation framework sehingga anggaran L&D dibenarkan dengan data keras, program yang tidak efektif diidentifikasi dan diperbaiki, dan kami dapat mendemonstrasikan bahwa setiap rupiah yang diinvestasikan dalam pembelajaran menghasilkan nilai bisnis yang terukur.so that L&D budget is justified with hard data, ineffective programs are identified and improved, and we can demonstrate that every rupiah invested in learning generates measurable business value.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Per program (L1-L2 segera); L3 90 hari post-training; L4 6-12 bulan post-trainingPer program (L1-L2 immediate); L3 90 days post-training; L4 6-12 months post-training
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gerbang anggaran: program dengan ROI di bawah threshold mendapat rekomendasi redesign atau discontinueBudget gate: programs with ROI below threshold get redesign or discontinue recommendation
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Training ROI ≥ 300% per tahun; 25%+ peningkatan kompetensi pasca training program unggulanTraining ROI ≥ 300% per year; 25%+ competency improvement post high-priority training programs
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Evaluasi Kirkpatrick 4-level: Reaction (kepuasan), Learning (pengetahuan diperoleh), Behavior (penerapan skill), Results (dampak bisnis)
  • Correlation analysis: menghubungkan penyelesaian training ke perubahan performance rating, metrik produktivitas, tingkat error
  • Retention impact: mengukur apakah karyawan yang dilatih memiliki turnover lebih rendah dari rekan yang tidak dilatih
  • Promotion readiness: melacak bagaimana training mempercepat kemajuan karier
  • Cost-per-competency: menghitung investasi yang diperlukan untuk membangun setiap skill ke level target
  • Program effectiveness ranking: mengurutkan semua program berdasarkan ROI untuk optimasi anggaran
  • Budget recommendation: AI menyarankan alokasi anggaran L&D optimal per departemen dan area skill
  • Kirkpatrick 4-level evaluation: Reaction (satisfaction), Learning (knowledge gained), Behavior (skill application), Results (business impact)
  • Correlation analysis: links training completion to performance rating changes, productivity metrics, error rates
  • Retention impact: measures whether trained employees have lower turnover than untrained peers
  • Promotion readiness: tracks how training accelerates career progression
  • Cost-per-competency: calculates investment needed to build each skill to target level
  • Program effectiveness ranking: ranks all programs by ROI for budget optimisation
  • Budget recommendation: AI suggests optimal L&D budget allocation per department and skill area
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Analisis ROI: 'Leadership Development Program' (12 bulan, 180 peserta, investasi IDR 2,8M). Level 1 (Reaction): 4,6/5 kepuasan. Level 2 (Learning): 92% pass rate pada asesmen kepemimpinan (+38% dari pre-test). Level 3 (Behavior): peningkatan 360-feedback rata-rata +0,6 poin pada kompetensi kepemimpinan. Level 4 (Results): Dipromosikan ke grade berikutnya dalam 18 bulan: 67% (vs 41% non-peserta). Team engagement +12% untuk manager yang dilatih. Turnover direct reports: 8% (vs 14% rata-rata perusahaan). Estimasi nilai produktivitas: IDR 8,4M. ROI: 200%. HC AI: Rekomendasikan perluas program ke manager Grade 8-9 di 2027.ROI Analysis: 'Leadership Development Program' (12-month, 180 participants, investment IDR 2.8B). Level 1 (Reaction): 4.6/5 satisfaction. Level 2 (Learning): 92% pass rate on leadership assessment (+38% from pre-test). Level 3 (Behavior): 360-feedback improvement avg +0.6 points in leadership competencies. Level 4 (Results): Promoted to next grade within 18 months: 67% (vs 41% for non-participants). Team engagement +12% for trained managers. Turnover of direct reports: 8% (vs 14% company avg). Estimated productivity value: IDR 8.4B. ROI: 200%. HC AI: Recommend expanding program to Grade 8-9 managers in 2027."
ProsesProcess
  1. Definisikan framework evaluasi per program (level Kirkpatrick mana yang diukur)
  2. Level 1: kumpulkan survey kepuasan pasca-training (auto-dikirim setelah completion)
  3. Level 2: bandingkan skor asesmen pre-test vs post-test (learning gain)
  4. Level 3: lacak perubahan perilaku via 360-feedback, observasi manager, data kinerja
  5. Level 4: korelasikan penyelesaian training dengan outcome bisnis (produktivitas, kualitas, retensi)
  6. Kalkulasi biaya: total biaya program (konten, delivery, waktu, perjalanan, opportunity cost)
  7. Formula ROI: (Manfaat - Biaya) / Biaya x 100
  8. HC AI menghasilkan program effectiveness ranking di semua program aktif
  9. Optimasi anggaran: rekomendasikan realokasi berdasarkan ROI per program
  10. Laporan dampak L&D tahunan untuk board dan leadership
  1. Define evaluation framework per program (which Kirkpatrick levels to measure)
  2. Level 1: collect post-training satisfaction surveys (auto-sent after completion)
  3. Level 2: compare pre-test vs post-test assessment scores (learning gain)
  4. Level 3: track behavioural changes via 360-feedback, manager observations, performance data
  5. Level 4: correlate training completion with business outcomes (productivity, quality, retention)
  6. Cost calculation: total program cost (content, delivery, time, travel, opportunity cost)
  7. ROI formula: (Benefits - Costs) / Costs x 100
  8. HC AI generates program effectiveness ranking across all active programs
  9. Budget optimisation: recommend reallocation based on ROI per program
  10. Annual L&D impact report for board and leadership
MasukanInput
  • Data biaya program: pengembangan konten, delivery, fasilitator, perjalanan, waktu karyawan
  • Respons survey kepuasan (Level 1)
  • Skor asesmen pre-test dan post-test (Level 2)
  • Data kinerja dan perilaku: 360-feedback, performance ratings (Level 3)
  • Data outcome bisnis: produktivitas, kualitas, turnover, tingkat promosi (Level 4)
  • Data control group: outcome non-peserta untuk perbandingan
  • Program cost data: content development, delivery, facilitator, travel, employee time
  • Satisfaction survey responses (Level 1)
  • Pre-test and post-test assessment scores (Level 2)
  • Performance and behavioural data: 360-feedback, performance ratings (Level 3)
  • Business outcome data: productivity, quality, turnover, promotion rates (Level 4)
  • Control group data: outcomes for non-participants for comparison
KeluaranOutput
  • Laporan evaluasi Kirkpatrick 4-level per program
  • Kalkulasi ROI: investasi vs returns dengan confidence interval
  • Correlation analysis: dampak training pada kinerja, retensi, produktivitas
  • Program effectiveness ranking (semua program berdasarkan ROI)
  • Rekomendasi optimasi anggaran per departemen dan area skill
  • Analisis cost-per-competency
  • Laporan dampak L&D tahunan siap board
  • Kirkpatrick 4-level evaluation report per program
  • ROI calculation: investment vs. returns with confidence interval
  • Correlation analysis: training impact on performance, retention, productivity
  • Program effectiveness ranking (all programs by ROI)
  • Budget optimisation recommendations per department and skill area
  • Cost-per-competency analysis
  • Annual L&D impact report for board presentation
INTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Learning Activity Data (FR-LD-003): data completion dan asesmen
  • Performance Management (FR-PM-001): performance ratings, 360-feedback data
  • People Analytics (FR-PA-001): turnover, produktivitas, metrik keterlibatan
  • Compensation (FR-CB-001): data biaya program dan alokasi anggaran L&D
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): data promosi peserta vs non-peserta
  • Learning Activity Data (FR-LD-003): completion and assessment data
  • Performance Management (FR-PM-001): performance ratings, 360-feedback data
  • People Analytics (FR-PA-001): turnover, productivity, engagement metrics
  • Compensation (FR-CB-001): program cost data and L&D budget allocation
  • Career Management (FR-CM-001): promotion data for trained vs. untrained
EXTERNAL Sumber DataData Source
  • Business Performance Data (ERP/SAP): produktivitas, kualitas, revenue per karyawan
  • Industry ROI Benchmarks: ekspektasi ROI L&D standar per sektor
  • Kirkpatrick Partners Framework: standar metodologi evaluasi
  • Business Performance Data (ERP/SAP): productivity, quality, revenue per employee
  • Industry ROI Benchmarks: standard L&D ROI expectations by sector
  • Kirkpatrick Partners Framework: evaluation methodology standards
Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Analisis Skill Gap & Skill Matrix

Skill Gap Analysis & Skill Matrix

Karyawan melihat skill matrix-nya vs kebutuhan posisi saat ini dan posisi di atasnya. HC AI menghitung gap dari data performance, job requirement, dan aspirasi karier, lalu memprioritaskan & merekomendasikan learning path.

Employees see their skill matrix vs the requirements of their current and next-up positions. HC AI computes gaps from performance, job requirements, and career aspiration, then prioritises & recommends a learning path.

FR-LD-008PRD: FR-SMITH-001Analisis Skill Gap Cerdas & Skill MatrixIntelligent Skill Gap Analysis & Skill MatrixHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (dan Atasan/HRBP),As an Employee (and Manager/HRBP), saya ingin melihat skill matrix saya vs kebutuhan posisi saat ini dan posisi di atasnya, dengan gap yang diprioritaskan otomatis oleh HC AI dari data performance, job requirement, learning history, dan aspirasi karierI want to see my skill matrix vs the requirements of my current and next-up positions, with gaps auto-prioritised by HC AI from performance, job requirements, learning history, and career aspiration sehingga saya tahu persis skill apa yang harus dikembangkan untuk berkinerja optimal di peran sekarang dan untuk naik ke jenjang berikutnya.so that I know exactly which skills to develop to perform in my current role and to move up to the next level.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; gap dihitung ulang saat data performance/karier/learning berubahReal-time; gaps recomputed whenever performance/career/learning data changes
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gap dengan business impact tinggi & mendekati kebutuhan peran dieskalasi sebagai prioritasHigh-business-impact gaps close to role requirements are escalated as priorities
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Time-to-competency turun 40%; 90% karyawan punya skill gap report aktif40% reduction in time-to-competency; 90% of employees have an active skill gap report
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Integrasi data: performance (competency rating, goal, feedback), career path & aspirasi, job requirement, learning history, benchmark eksternal
  • Identifikasi gap: kompetensi saat ini vs kebutuhan peran sekarang; vs peran target (jenjang atas); skill emerging; risiko obsolescence skill
  • Prioritisasi gap berdasarkan business impact & urgensi
  • Output: skill gap report personal + rekomendasi learning path
  • Proactive alert: notifikasi karyawan, alert atasan saat tim ada shortfall, flag gap organisasi ke L&D
  • Data integration: performance (competency ratings, goals, feedback), career path & aspiration, job requirements, learning history, external benchmarks
  • Gap identification: current competencies vs current-role needs; vs target role (next level); emerging skills; skill-obsolescence risk
  • Prioritise gaps by business impact & urgency
  • Output: a personal skill gap report + learning-path recommendations
  • Proactive alerts: notify employees, alert managers on team shortfalls, flag org-wide gaps to L&D
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "HC AI mendeteksi Anda akan memimpin proyek yang membutuhkan skill SQL. Skill ini belum Anda miliki (saat ini L0, dibutuhkan L3). Berikut learning path 3 minggu yang direkomendasikan, dan saya bisa jadwalkan di kalender Anda.HC AI noticed you'll be leading a project requiring SQL skills. You don't have this yet (currently L0, L3 required). Here's a recommended 3-week learning path, and I can schedule it on your calendar."
ProsesProcess
  1. HC AI menarik data performance, job requirement, learning history, & aspirasi karier
  2. Bandingkan level kompetensi saat ini vs kebutuhan peran sekarang
  3. Bandingkan vs kebutuhan peran target (jenjang di atas)
  4. Prioritisasi gap berdasarkan business impact & urgensi
  5. Susun skill gap report + rekomendasi learning path
  6. Kirim alert ke karyawan & atasan; sinkron ke learning path (FR-LD-002a)
  1. HC AI pulls performance, job requirements, learning history, & career aspiration
  2. Compare current competency levels vs current-role needs
  3. Compare vs target-role needs (the next level up)
  4. Prioritise gaps by business impact & urgency
  5. Build skill gap report + learning-path recommendations
  6. Alert employee & manager; sync to learning path (FR-LD-002a)
MasukanInput
  • Data performance & competency rating
  • Competency framework & job requirement per peran
  • Career path & aspirasi karier
  • Learning history & benchmark eksternal
  • Performance data & competency ratings
  • Competency framework & job requirements per role
  • Career path & career aspiration
  • Learning history & external benchmarks
KeluaranOutput
  • Skill matrix: level saat ini vs dibutuhkan
  • Skill gap report terprioritisasi
  • Rekomendasi learning path per gap
  • Alert proaktif ke karyawan & atasan
  • Skill matrix: current vs required levels
  • Prioritised skill gap report
  • Per-gap learning-path recommendations
  • Proactive alerts to employee & manager

Skill Matrix Interaktif — Anda vs PosisiInteractive Skill Matrix — You vs Position

Bandingkan dengan:Compare against:
KompetensiCompetency Level Anda (L1–L5)Your level (L1–L5) DibutuhkanRequired GapGap Rekomendasi HC AIHC AI recommendation
Level AndaYour level GapGap Level dibutuhkanRequired level

Demo ilustratif dengan data contoh — di sistem nyata, level & kebutuhan ditarik HC AI dari performance, job requirement, dan career path.Illustrative demo with sample data — in the real system, levels & requirements are pulled by HC AI from performance, job requirements, and career paths.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Authoring Studio — Module Builder Berpandu

Authoring Studio — Guided Module Builder

Trainer/SME membuat modul sendiri tanpa keahlian instructional design. Tidak harus video: presentasi berjeda pertanyaan, workbook, kuis, hingga SCORM — dipandu HC AI dengan saran outline, auto-generate kuis, dan template materi.

Trainers/SMEs build their own modules without instructional-design expertise. Not only video: question-paced slides, workbooks, quizzes, and SCORM — guided by HC AI with outline suggestions, auto-generated quizzes, and material templates.

FR-LD-009PRD: FR-LCMS-003Authoring & Pembuatan Konten (No-Code + HC AI)Content Authoring & Creation (No-Code + HC AI)HC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Trainer / Subject Matter Expert,As a Trainer / Subject Matter Expert, saya ingin membuat modul sendiri dengan builder no-code multi-format (presentasi berjeda kuis, video, workbook, kuis, SCORM), dipandu HC AI lewat saran outline & pertanyaan panduan, plus download/upload template materiI want to build my own modules with a no-code multi-format builder (question-paced slides, video, workbook, quiz, SCORM), guided by HC AI via outline suggestions & guiding questions, plus download/upload of material templates sehingga saya bisa menangkap & membagikan keahlian dengan investasi waktu minimal, tanpa perlu skill instructional design.so that I can capture & share my expertise with minimal time investment, without needing instructional-design skills.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Berkelanjutan; draft → review workflow (FR-LCMS-004) dalam 48 jamContinuous; draft → review workflow (FR-LCMS-004) within 48h
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Modul tanpa asesmen atau quality score rendah dikembalikan dengan saran HC AIModules without assessment or with low quality score are returned with HC AI suggestions
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
500+ kursus dibuat internal/tahun; waktu pembuatan kursus turun 60%500+ internally-created courses/year; course creation time down 60%
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • No-code course builder: blok konten multi-format (teks, gambar, video, presentasi berjeda kuis, workbook, kuis, SCORM), mobile-responsive otomatis
  • Saran outline kursus dari topik & learning objective
  • Auto-generate kuis & asesmen dari konten sumber; ringkasan & key takeaways
  • Workbook: dapat diunduh atau dikerjakan langsung di web
  • Template materi ajar: download & upload
  • Auto-translasi 8+ bahasa, voice-over & closed caption (dengan review)
  • No-code course builder: multi-format content blocks (text, image, video, question-paced slides, workbook, quiz, SCORM), auto mobile-responsive
  • Course-outline suggestions from topic & learning objective
  • Auto-generate quizzes & assessments from source content; summaries & key takeaways
  • Workbook: downloadable or completed in-site
  • Teaching-material templates: download & upload
  • Auto-translation to 8+ languages, voice-over & closed captions (with review)
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Topik ‘Food Safety & HACCP’. HC AI menyarankan outline 5 blok: Presentasi berjeda kuis (Pengantar) → Video (5 prinsip) → Workbook (latihan terbimbing) → Kuis (auto-generated, 6 soal) → Ringkasan. Estimasi 39 menit. Mau saya buat draft & kirim ke review?Topic ‘Food Safety & HACCP’. HC AI suggests a 5-block outline: Question-paced slides (Intro) → Video (5 principles) → Workbook (guided practice) → Quiz (auto-generated, 6 items) → Summary. Est. 39 min. Shall I create a draft & send to review?"
ProsesProcess
  1. Trainer memasukkan topik & learning objective
  2. HC AI menyarankan outline multi-format; trainer menyesuaikan
  3. Tambah/atur blok: slides berjeda kuis, video, workbook, kuis, dll.
  4. Auto-generate kuis & ringkasan dari konten
  5. Quality gate & cek kelengkapan asesmen
  6. Simpan draft → review & approval (FR-LCMS-004) → publish
  1. Trainer enters topic & learning objective
  2. HC AI suggests a multi-format outline; trainer adjusts
  3. Add/arrange blocks: question-paced slides, video, workbook, quiz, etc.
  4. Auto-generate quizzes & summaries from content
  5. Quality gate & assessment-coverage check
  6. Save draft → review & approval (FR-LCMS-004) → publish
MasukanInput
  • Topik & learning objective
  • Materi sumber (dokumen, video, slide)
  • Template materi ajar
  • Competency framework untuk pemetaan
  • Topic & learning objective
  • Source material (documents, video, slides)
  • Teaching-material templates
  • Competency framework for mapping
KeluaranOutput
  • Modul multi-format siap review
  • Kuis & asesmen auto-generated
  • Workbook (download/in-site)
  • Estimasi durasi & struktur modul
  • Multi-format module ready for review
  • Auto-generated quizzes & assessments
  • Workbook (download/in-site)
  • Estimated duration & module structure

Authoring Studio Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Authoring Studio (Demo)

HC AI — Pandu PembuatanHC AI — Authoring Guide

Demo ilustratif — modul hanya disusun di browser, tidak disimpan atau diunggah.Illustrative demo — the module is assembled in your browser only; nothing is saved or uploaded.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Event & Workshop — Penjadwalan & Submission

Event & Workshop — Scheduling & Submissions

L&D/LMS Specialist menjadwalkan event & menugaskannya: tentukan format (daring/luring/hybrid), venue/platform, kapasitas, dan instruktur. Untuk training berbasis workshop, trainer meninjau submission tugas peserta.

L&D/LMS Specialist schedules & assigns events: set the format (online/offline/hybrid), venue/platform, capacity, and instructor. For workshop-based training, the trainer reviews participants' submissions.

FR-LD-010PRD: FR-ADMIN-007 · FR-DELIVERY-002 · FR-LXP-004Kalender Pembelajaran, Penjadwalan Event & Review SubmissionLearning Calendar, Event Scheduling & Submission ReviewHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D / LMS Specialist (dan Trainer),As an L&D / LMS Specialist (and Trainer), saya ingin menjadwalkan & menugaskan event pembelajaran — menentukan format (daring/luring/hybrid), venue/platform, kapasitas, instruktur, dan reminder — serta meninjau submission tugas untuk training berbasis workshopI want to schedule & assign learning events — set format (online/offline/hybrid), venue/platform, capacity, instructor, and reminders — and review assignment submissions for workshop-based training sehingga event terkelola rapi (termasuk waitlist & kehadiran) dan pembelajaran berbasis praktik terukur lewat submission yang divalidasi.so that events are well-managed (incl. waitlist & attendance) and practice-based learning is measured through validated submissions.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Reminder otomatis H-7, H-1, H-1 jam; review submission dalam 3 hari kerjaAuto reminders 7d, 1d, 1h before; submission review within 3 working days
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Kapasitas penuh → waitlist otomatis & saran tambah sesi; bentrok jadwal terdeteksiFull capacity → auto waitlist & suggest extra session; schedule conflicts detected
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Utilisasi kapasitas event; tingkat kehadiran; on-time submission & reviewEvent capacity utilisation; attendance rate; on-time submission & review
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Penjadwalan sesi: tanggal, durasi, zona waktu, instruktur, venue/platform (Zoom/Teams), kapasitas
  • Master learning calendar dengan deteksi bentrok & booking ruang/AV
  • Undangan kalender otomatis + reminder berjenjang (H-7, H-1, H-1 jam)
  • Manajemen kapasitas & waitlist otomatis; promosi dari waitlist saat slot kosong
  • Tracking kehadiran (sign-in fisik / join virtual) & follow-up no-show
  • Workshop: distribusi pre-work, kumpulkan & tinjau submission tugas peserta
  • Session scheduling: date, duration, time zone, instructor, venue/platform (Zoom/Teams), capacity
  • Master learning calendar with conflict detection & room/AV booking
  • Auto calendar invites + tiered reminders (7d, 1d, 1h before)
  • Capacity & auto-waitlist management; promote from waitlist when a slot opens
  • Attendance tracking (physical sign-in / virtual join) & no-show follow-up
  • Workshop: distribute pre-work, collect & review participants' submissions
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Workshop ‘Leadership Lab’ (Luring, Auditorium HQ, kapasitas 25) penuh dengan 8 orang di waitlist. HC AI menyarankan membuka sesi kedua hybrid. 22 dari 25 submission tugas masuk; 3 menunggu review. Mau saya kirim reminder ke yang belum submit?Workshop ‘Leadership Lab’ (Offline, HQ Auditorium, capacity 25) is full with 8 on the waitlist. HC AI suggests opening a second hybrid session. 22 of 25 submissions are in; 3 await review. Shall I remind those who haven't submitted?"
ProsesProcess
  1. Specialist membuat event: judul, tanggal, format, venue/platform, kapasitas, instruktur
  2. HC AI cek bentrok jadwal & ketersediaan ruang/instruktur
  3. Peserta di-assign/registrasi; kapasitas penuh → waitlist
  4. Undangan & reminder otomatis dikirim
  5. Kehadiran ditrack; no-show di-follow up
  6. Workshop: peserta submit tugas → trainer review (approve/revisi)
  1. Specialist creates an event: title, date, format, venue/platform, capacity, instructor
  2. HC AI checks schedule conflicts & room/instructor availability
  3. Participants assigned/registered; at capacity → waitlist
  4. Invites & reminders sent automatically
  5. Attendance tracked; no-shows followed up
  6. Workshop: participants submit work → trainer reviews (approve/revise)
MasukanInput
  • Detail event & format (daring/luring/hybrid)
  • Venue/ruang & platform virtual
  • Daftar peserta & kapasitas
  • Tugas/pre-work workshop
  • Event details & format (online/offline/hybrid)
  • Venue/room & virtual platform
  • Participant list & capacity
  • Workshop tasks/pre-work
KeluaranOutput
  • Event terjadwal di kalender + waitlist
  • Undangan & reminder terkirim
  • Rekap kehadiran
  • Submission tugas tervalidasi (approve/revisi)
  • Scheduled event on the calendar + waitlist
  • Invites & reminders sent
  • Attendance summary
  • Validated submissions (approve/revise)

Penjadwal Event Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Event Scheduler (Demo)

Review Submission Workshop (Demo)Workshop Submission Review (Demo)

Trainer meninjau tugas peserta untuk training berbasis workshop.The trainer reviews participants' work for workshop-based training.

Demo ilustratif — data hanya di browser, tidak disimpan atau diunggah.Illustrative demo — data stays in your browser only; nothing is saved or uploaded.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Cockpit Dashboard Progress Belajar

Learning-Progress Cockpit Dashboard

Manager, HCBP, dan L&D Specialist memantau progress belajar dalam satu cockpit: jam belajar, completion, status compliance (hijau/kuning/merah), top & at-risk learner, dengan rekomendasi intervensi dari HC AI — sesuai cakupan masing-masing.

Managers, HRBPs, and L&D Specialists monitor learning progress in one cockpit: learning hours, completion, compliance status (green/yellow/red), top & at-risk learners, with HC AI intervention recommendations — scoped to each role.

FR-LD-011PRD: FR-ANALYTICS-001 · FR-ANALYTICS-002Dashboard Analitik Pembelajaran (Learner, Manager, Divisi)Learning Analytics Dashboard (Learner, Manager, Division)HC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Manager, HCBP, & L&D Specialist,As a Manager, HRBP, & L&D Specialist, saya ingin cockpit dashboard yang menampilkan progress belajar sesuai cakupan saya (tim / divisi / organisasi): jam belajar, completion, status compliance, top & at-risk learner, plus rekomendasi intervensi HC AII want a cockpit dashboard showing learning progress scoped to me (team / division / org): learning hours, completion, compliance status, top & at-risk learners, plus HC AI intervention recommendations sehingga saya dapat mengambil keputusan pengembangan berbasis data dan menutup gap sebelum berdampak ke kinerja.so that I can make data-driven development decisions and close gaps before they impact performance.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; refresh data < 5 menit; alert harian untuk at-riskReal-time; data refresh < 5 min; daily alerts for at-risk learners
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Compliance kuning/merah & learner at-risk memicu rekomendasi intervensiYellow/red compliance & at-risk learners trigger intervention recommendations
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Active learner 85%+; completion 85%+; compliance 100% on-time85%+ active learners; 85%+ completion; 100% on-time compliance
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Dashboard berlapis cakupan: individu, tim (Manager), divisi (HCBP), organisasi (L&D)
  • KPI: active learner, jam belajar, completion rate, status compliance
  • Status compliance hijau/kuning/merah per orang/unit; drill-down
  • Identifikasi top learner & at-risk learner otomatis
  • Rekomendasi intervensi (check-in, microlearning, reminder compliance)
  • Insight: learning velocity, perbandingan peer, gap kapabilitas tim
  • Scoped dashboards: individual, team (Manager), division (HRBP), org (L&D)
  • KPIs: active learners, learning hours, completion rate, compliance status
  • Green/yellow/red compliance per person/unit; drill-down
  • Auto-identify top learners & at-risk learners
  • Intervention recommendations (check-in, microlearning, compliance reminder)
  • Insights: learning velocity, peer comparison, team capability gaps
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Divisi Anda: 79% active learner, completion 74%. Tim Produksi B di bawah target (48%) dengan 2 compliance merah. HC AI menyarankan microlearning compliance + check-in manajer minggu ini. Top performer: tim QA (85%).Your division: 79% active learners, 74% completion. Team Production B is below target (48%) with 2 red compliance items. HC AI recommends compliance microlearning + a manager check-in this week. Top performer: QA team (85%)."

Cockpit Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Cockpit (Demo)

Jam belajarLearning hours ProgressProgress ComplianceCompliance StatusStatus

Demo ilustratif dengan data contoh — di sistem nyata, data ditarik real-time dari aktivitas belajar, compliance, dan performance.Illustrative demo with sample data — in the real system, data is pulled in real time from learning activity, compliance, and performance.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Asisten Percakapan HC AI

HC AI Conversational Assistant

Antarmuka percakapan bahasa alami: tanya jawab materi, rekomendasi & enrollment kursus, cek status sertifikat, jelaskan konsep, hingga cek progress goal — semua lewat chat, dalam 8+ bahasa.

A natural-language conversational interface: ask about content, get course recommendations & enrolment, check certificate status, explain concepts, and check goal progress — all via chat, in 8+ languages.

FR-LD-012PRD: FR-SMITH-005Asisten Pembelajaran PercakapanConversational Learning AssistantHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar),As an Employee (Learner), saya ingin berbicara dengan HC AI dalam bahasa alami untuk bertanya materi, mendapat rekomendasi & enroll kursus, mengecek sertifikat, dan menjalankan tugas administrasi belajar — tanpa perlu menu yang rumitI want to talk to HC AI in natural language to ask about content, get recommendations & enroll, check certificates, and run learning admin tasks — without complex menus sehingga belajar terasa seperti mengobrol dengan coach pribadi yang selalu tersedia dan paham konteks saya.so that learning feels like chatting with an always-available personal coach who understands my context.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
24/7; respons < 2 detik (query sederhana), < 5 detik (analitik)24/7; response < 2s (simple), < 5s (analytics)
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Query kompleks/sensitif dieskalasi ke L&D help desk (Tier 2)Complex/sensitive queries escalate to the L&D help desk (Tier 2)
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
90%+ query resolved tanpa eskalasi; 90% karyawan pakai HC AI/bulan90%+ queries resolved without escalation; 90% of employees use HC AI monthly
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Natural language support: menjawab pertanyaan materi, menjelaskan konsep dengan analogi, kuis penguat
  • Otomasi administrasi: enroll, jadwalkan, cek sertifikat, rekomendasi, cek progress, atur learning tim
  • Sadar konteks: peran, gap skill, proyek berjalan, aspirasi karier
  • Multi-bahasa 8+: memahami & merespons, termasuk code-switching
  • Eskalasi ke human (Tier 2) untuk kasus kompleks/sensitif
  • Natural-language support: answers content questions, explains concepts with analogies, reinforcement quizzes
  • Admin automation: enroll, schedule, check certificates, recommend, check progress, set up team learning
  • Context-aware: role, skill gaps, current projects, career aspiration
  • 8+ languages: understands & responds, including code-switching
  • Escalation to a human (Tier 2) for complex/sensitive cases
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Karyawan: ‘HC AI, saya mau belajar Python untuk analisis data.’ HC AI: ‘Saya temukan 3 kursus yang cocok: 1) Python Basics (3 jam), 2) Python for Data Analysis (8 jam, rating 4.7), 3) Pandas in Practice (4 jam). Mau saya buatkan learning path & enroll?’Employee: ‘HC AI, I want to learn Python for data analysis.’ HC AI: ‘I found 3 matching courses: 1) Python Basics (3h), 2) Python for Data Analysis (8h, rated 4.7), 3) Pandas in Practice (4h). Shall I build a learning path & enroll you?’"

Chat HC AI Interaktif (Demo)Interactive HC AI Chat (Demo)

Demo ilustratif — balasan dari skenario contoh di browser, bukan model AI sungguhan.Illustrative demo — replies come from sample scenarios in the browser, not a real AI model.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Gamifikasi & Engagement

Gamification & Engagement

Poin, level & rank, badge, streak, dan leaderboard membuat belajar menyenangkan dan kompetitif secara sehat — mendorong kebiasaan belajar harian dan pengakuan antar-rekan.

Points, levels & ranks, badges, streaks, and leaderboards make learning fun and healthily competitive — driving daily learning habits and peer recognition.

FR-LD-013PRD: FR-DELIVERY-006Gamifikasi, Badge & RecognitionGamification, Badges & RecognitionHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar),As an Employee (Learner), saya ingin mendapat poin, naik level & rank, mengumpulkan badge, menjaga streak, dan melihat posisi saya di leaderboard (opsional, tidak dipaksakan)I want to earn points, level up in rank, collect badges, keep a streak, and see my leaderboard standing (optional, not forced) sehingga belajar terasa memotivasi, ada rasa pencapaian, dan terbentuk kebiasaan belajar berkelanjutan.so that learning feels motivating, gives a sense of achievement, and builds a sustainable learning habit.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; poin & badge diberikan langsung saat aksi selesaiReal-time; points & badges awarded instantly on action completion
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gamifikasi opsional & etis; leaderboard bisa di-opt-out, fokus motivasi intrinsikOptional & ethical gamification; leaderboards opt-out, focus on intrinsic motivation
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Active learner 85%+; partisipasi social learning 40%+; learning streak85%+ active learners; 40%+ social-learning participation; learning streaks
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Poin untuk completion, skor asesmen, & partisipasi
  • Level & rank: Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced → Expert → Master
  • Badge untuk pencapaian (completion, skor sempurna, streak, milestone)
  • Leaderboard: global, departemen, peer group (opsional)
  • Learning streak & daily goal; unlockable content
  • Recognition: shout-out manager, recognition wall, reward tangible
  • Points for completion, assessment scores, & participation
  • Levels & ranks: Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced → Expert → Master
  • Badges for achievements (completion, perfect scores, streaks, milestones)
  • Leaderboards: global, department, peer group (optional)
  • Learning streak & daily goal; unlockable content
  • Recognition: manager shout-outs, recognition wall, tangible rewards
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Selamat! Anda mencapai 50 jam belajar tahun ini & meraih badge ‘Emerging Leader’. Streak 7 hari 🔥 — Anda naik ke rank Expert dan masuk 10% teratas departemen. Siap untuk tantangan berikutnya?Congratulations! You hit 50 learning hours this year & earned the ‘Emerging Leader’ badge. 7-day streak 🔥 — you've reached Expert rank and the top 10% of your department. Ready for the next challenge?"

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Forum Diskusi & Komunitas

Discussion Forums & Communities

Social learning: forum diskusi per kursus dengan Q&A, voting, dan jawaban terverifikasi instruktur; serta komunitas praktik berbasis topik — dengan rekomendasi komunitas dari HC AI.

Social learning: per-course discussion forums with Q&A, voting, and instructor-verified answers; plus topic-based communities of practice — with HC AI community recommendations.

FR-LD-014PRD: FR-SOCIAL-001Forum Diskusi & Komunitas PraktikDiscussion Forums & Communities of PracticeHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar),As an Employee (Learner), saya ingin berdiskusi di forum kursus, bertanya ke peer & instruktur, mengupvote jawaban terbaik, melihat jawaban terverifikasi, dan bergabung ke komunitas praktik sesuai minatI want to discuss in course forums, ask peers & instructors, upvote the best answers, see verified answers, and join communities of practice that match my interests sehingga pengetahuan mengalir antar-rekan, pertanyaan terjawab cepat, dan terbentuk komunitas belajar yang hidup.so that knowledge flows between peers, questions are answered quickly, and a living learning community forms.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; notifikasi balasan; instruktur menandai jawaban benarReal-time; reply notifications; instructor marks the correct answer
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Konten tidak pantas di-flag & dimoderasi; jawaban terverifikasi disorotInappropriate content is flagged & moderated; verified answers highlighted
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
40%+ karyawan ikut forum/komunitas; waktu jawab pertanyaan turun40%+ of employees in forums/communities; question response time reduced
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Forum diskusi terthread per kursus: Q&A peer & instruktur
  • Voting jawaban; jawaban ‘benar’ terverifikasi instruktur disorot
  • Moderasi: flag konten tidak pantas, notifikasi balasan
  • Komunitas praktik berbasis topik (publik/privat) + resource bersama
  • Rekomendasi komunitas berdasarkan profil & minat
  • Forum ‘Ask an Expert’ + office hours SME
  • Threaded per-course discussion forums: peer & instructor Q&A
  • Answer voting; instructor-verified ‘correct’ answers highlighted
  • Moderation: flag inappropriate content, reply notifications
  • Topic-based communities of practice (public/private) + shared resources
  • Community recommendations based on profile & interests
  • ‘Ask an Expert’ forums + SME office hours
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "5 orang di kantor Jakarta sedang belajar Digital Marketing. Mau saya buatkan grup studi? Saya juga melihat komunitas ‘Data Science’ cocok dengan minat Anda — 1.240 anggota aktif.5 people in the Jakarta office are learning Digital Marketing. Shall I create a study group? I also see the ‘Data Science’ community matches your interests — 1,240 active members."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Jalur Karier & Perencanaan Suksesi

Career Path & Succession Planning

Pembelajaran terhubung ke karier: setiap peran punya learning wajib, progress kesiapan terlacak, dan HC AI merekomendasikan path menuju peran target — serta mendukung perencanaan suksesi dan pengembangan high-potential.

Learning linked to careers: each role has required learning, readiness is tracked, and HC AI recommends a path to the target role — plus support for succession planning and high-potential development.

FR-LD-015PRD: FR-INTEGRATION-002Integrasi Pengembangan Karier & SuksesiCareer Development & Succession IntegrationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & HRBP,As an Employee & HRBP, saya ingin melihat learning yang dibutuhkan untuk peran target di jalur karier, melacak kesiapan, dan (sebagai HRBP) mengelola kesiapan successor — dengan path yang direkomendasikan HC AII want to see the learning required for the target role in my career path, track readiness, and (as HRBP) manage successor readiness — with HC AI-recommended paths sehingga pengembangan terarah ke tujuan karier dan pipeline suksesi siap sebelum dibutuhkan.so that development is aimed at career goals and the succession pipeline is ready before it's needed.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Sinkron dengan Career & Performance; readiness diperbarui real-timeSynced with Career & Performance; readiness updated real-time
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Prasyarat learning ditegakkan: tidak bisa apply peran sebelum lengkapLearning prerequisites enforced: can't apply for a role until complete
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
80%+ successor menyelesaikan development plan; mobilitas internal naik80%+ successors complete development plans; internal mobility up
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Menampilkan learning wajib per peran di jalur karier & melacak progress kesiapan
  • Menegakkan prasyarat: tidak bisa apply peran sebelum learning lengkap
  • Merekomendasikan learning berdasarkan aspirasi & gap karier
  • Suksesi: identifikasi gap pipeline, auto-assign path ke successor, lacak progress
  • High-potential: kurasi program premium, stretch assignment, mentoring eksekutif
  • Shows required learning per role in the career path & tracks readiness progress
  • Enforces prerequisites: can't apply for a role until learning is complete
  • Recommends learning based on aspiration & career gaps
  • Succession: identifies pipeline gaps, auto-assigns paths to successors, tracks progress
  • High-potential: curates premium programs, stretch assignments, executive mentoring
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Untuk jalur ‘Senior Data Scientist’, Anda perlu menyelesaikan: 1) Advanced ML, 2) Big Data Technologies, 3) Cloud Computing. Estimasi 6 bulan. Mau saya buatkan path & jadwalkan? — Untuk HRBP: successor VP Operations kurang ‘Supply Chain’; saya sarankan path 3 bulan.For the ‘Senior Data Scientist’ path, you need: 1) Advanced ML, 2) Big Data Technologies, 3) Cloud Computing. ~6 months. Shall I build the path & schedule it? — For HRBP: the VP Operations successor lacks ‘Supply Chain’; I recommend a 3-month path."

Jalur Karier & Suksesi Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Career Path & Succession (Demo)

Posisi saat ini:Current position: Data Analyst (Grade 8)
Pipeline suksesi untuk:Succession pipeline for: VP Operations

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Sertifikasi & Digital Badge

Certification & Digital Badges

Sertifikasi internal & eksternal, digital badge (Open Badges), verifikasi via ID unik/QR, pelacakan kadaluarsa & renewal, plus transcript belajar yang bisa dibagikan ke LinkedIn.

Internal & external certifications, digital badges (Open Badges), verification via unique ID/QR, expiration & renewal tracking, plus a shareable learning transcript (LinkedIn).

FR-LD-016PRD: FR-DELIVERY-005Sertifikasi, Badge & Transcript BelajarCertification, Badges & Learning TranscriptHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan,As an Employee, saya ingin sertifikat & digital badge otomatis saat menyelesaikan program, dapat diverifikasi (ID unik/QR), dengan pelacakan kadaluarsa & renewal, dan bisa saya bagikan ke LinkedInI want certificates & digital badges issued automatically on program completion, verifiable (unique ID/QR), with expiry & renewal tracking, and shareable to LinkedIn sehingga pencapaian saya terdokumentasi, kredibel, dan mendukung mobilitas karier internal maupun eksternal.so that my achievements are documented, credible, and support both internal and external career mobility.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Sertifikat & badge terbit otomatis saat completion; reminder renewal H-90/60/30Certificates & badges auto-issued on completion; renewal reminders 90/60/30d
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Sertifikat kadaluarsa → akses area tertentu dibatasi sampai recertificationExpired certificate → access to certain areas restricted until recertification
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
100% sertifikasi diperbarui sebelum kadaluarsa; verifikasi instan100% certifications renewed before expiry; instant verification
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Sertifikasi internal: definisi program + prasyarat, generate sertifikat & digital badge (Open Badges) otomatis
  • Verifikasi: QR code / ID unik; pihak eksternal bisa verifikasi real-time
  • Pelacakan kadaluarsa & workflow recertification; reminder berjenjang
  • Sertifikasi eksternal (PMP, SHRM, CPA): import & tracking CPE credit
  • Transcript belajar: riwayat, jam, skills; ekspor PDF & share ke LinkedIn
  • Internal certifications: program definition + prerequisites, auto-generate certificate & digital badge (Open Badges)
  • Verification: QR code / unique ID; external parties can verify in real time
  • Expiry tracking & recertification workflow; tiered reminders
  • External certifications (PMP, SHRM, CPA): import & CPE credit tracking
  • Learning transcript: history, hours, skills; export PDF & share to LinkedIn
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Selamat! Anda meraih sertifikat ‘Food Safety (HACCP)’ + digital badge (berlaku 1 tahun, ID NB-HACCP-8842). Sertifikat ‘Forklift’ Anda kadaluarsa dalam 2,5 bulan — saya sudah menjadwalkan recertification. Mau bagikan badge ke LinkedIn?Congratulations! You earned the ‘Food Safety (HACCP)’ certificate + digital badge (valid 1 year, ID NB-HACCP-8842). Your ‘Forklift’ certificate expires in 2.5 months — I've scheduled recertification. Share your badge to LinkedIn?"

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Compliance Training Multi-Negara

Multi-Country Compliance Training

Persyaratan training regulasi per negara (15+ negara): auto-assign berdasarkan lokasi & peran, pelacakan status compliance hijau/kuning/merah, reminder renewal, dan laporan siap-audit — dipantau HC AI.

Country-specific regulatory training (15+ countries): auto-assignment by location & role, green/yellow/red compliance tracking, renewal reminders, and audit-ready reports — monitored by HC AI.

FR-LD-017PRD: FR-COMPLIANCE-001 · FR-SMITH-008 · FR-ADMIN-005Manajemen Compliance Training Lintas NegaraCross-Country Compliance Training ManagementHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Compliance & Risk Manager,As a Compliance & Risk Manager, saya ingin training wajib regulasi otomatis ter-assign sesuai negara & peran, status compliance terlacak real-time, reminder renewal berjenjang, dan laporan siap-audit untuk 15+ negaraI want mandatory regulatory training auto-assigned by country & role, compliance status tracked in real time, tiered renewal reminders, and audit-ready reports across 15+ countries sehingga compliance terjaga 100% on-time dengan usaha manual minimal dan risiko audit tertangani.so that compliance stays 100% on-time with minimal manual effort and audit risk is managed.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Auto-assign saat hire/transfer; reminder H-90/60/30/14/7; eskalasi ke manajerAuto-assign on hire/transfer; reminders 90/60/30/14/7d; escalate to manager
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Sertifikasi overdue → akses area kerja tertentu dibatasi otomatisOverdue certification → access to certain work areas auto-restricted
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
100% compliance training on-time; nol insiden akibat gap training100% on-time compliance training; zero incidents from training gaps
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Database persyaratan regulasi per negara, industri, & peran (15+ negara)
  • Auto-assign saat hire, perubahan peran, atau transfer lokasi
  • Monitor perubahan regulasi & assign training baru secara proaktif
  • Dashboard compliance real-time hijau/kuning/merah per orang/unit/negara
  • Reminder renewal berjenjang & eskalasi ke manajer/HRBP/compliance officer
  • Laporan siap-audit dengan timestamp & tanda tangan digital
  • Regulatory requirement database by country, industry, & role (15+ countries)
  • Auto-assign on hire, role change, or location transfer
  • Monitor regulatory changes & proactively assign new training
  • Real-time green/yellow/red compliance dashboard per person/unit/country
  • Tiered renewal reminders & escalation to manager/HRBP/compliance officer
  • Audit-ready reports with timestamps & digital signatures
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "12 karyawan manufacturing di Malaysia memiliki sertifikat Forklift yang kadaluarsa bulan depan. Saya sudah meng-assign renewal training. Mau saya jadwalkan sesi classroom? Indonesia: Data Privacy (PDP) 1 item overdue — eskalasi ke manajer dikirim.12 manufacturing employees in Malaysia have Forklift certifications expiring next month. I've assigned renewal training. Shall I schedule classroom sessions? Indonesia: Data Privacy (PDP) has 1 overdue item — manager escalation sent."

Dashboard Compliance Multi-Negara (Demo)Multi-Country Compliance Dashboard (Demo)

15+ negara didukung15+ countries supported

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Beranda Personal — “Untuk Anda”

Personalized Homepage — “For You”

Pengalaman ala Netflix: HC AI mengkurasi konten berdasarkan peran, skill gap, riwayat, & aktivitas rekan — rail Untuk Anda, Lanjutkan Belajar, Trending, & Quick Wins, plus goal & streak belajar.

A Netflix-like experience: HC AI curates content by role, skill gaps, history, & peer activity — For You, Continue Learning, Trending, & Quick Wins rails, plus learning goal & streak.

FR-LD-018PRD: FR-LXP-001Beranda Pembelajaran TerpersonalisasiPersonalized Learning HomepageHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar),As an Employee (Learner), saya ingin beranda yang dikurasi HC AI — rekomendasi ‘Untuk Anda’, lanjutkan kursus, trending, quick wins — plus goal jam belajar & streak, tanpa perlu mencari manualI want an HC AI-curated homepage — ‘For You’ recommendations, continue learning, trending, quick wins — plus learning-hours goal & streak, without manual searching sehingga konten relevan langsung tersaji, mudah masuk ke jadwal sibuk, dan kebiasaan belajar terbentuk.so that relevant content is served instantly, fits a busy schedule, and a learning habit forms.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Real-time; rekomendasi diperbarui saat profil/progress berubahReal-time; recommendations update as profile/progress change
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Prioritaskan mandatory & gap berdampak tinggi di posisi teratas railPrioritise mandatory & high-impact gaps at the top of the rails
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Active learner 85%+; 50+ jam/karyawan/tahun; streak harian85%+ active learners; 50+ hours/employee/year; daily streaks
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Rail ‘Untuk Anda’: rekomendasi dari peran, skill gap, riwayat, & aktivitas rekan
  • ‘Lanjutkan Belajar’: resume kursus dari posisi terakhir
  • Trending, New Arrivals, Quick Wins (<30 menit), Skill Spotlights
  • ‘Karena Anda menonton…’ (collaborative filtering ala Netflix)
  • Goal jam belajar tahunan + progress; streak & daily goal
  • Saran waktu belajar optimal & pengingat di waktu favorit
  • ‘For You’ rail: recommendations from role, skill gaps, history, & peer activity
  • ‘Continue Learning’: resume courses from the last position
  • Trending, New Arrivals, Quick Wins (<30 min), Skill Spotlights
  • ‘Because you watched…’ (Netflix-style collaborative filtering)
  • Annual learning-hours goal + progress; streak & daily goal
  • Optimal study-time suggestions & reminders at your preferred time
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Untuk Anda hari ini: ‘Advanced SQL’ (menutup gap Data Analysis Anda) & ‘Storytelling with Data’ (untuk target Senior Analyst). Anda 31/50 jam tahun ini — 19 jam lagi. Anda belajar paling baik pukul 08–10; saya blok 30 menit besok?For you today: ‘Advanced SQL’ (closes your Data Analysis gap) & ‘Storytelling with Data’ (for your Senior Analyst target). You're at 31/50 hours this year — 19 to go. You learn best 8–10am; shall I block 30 minutes tomorrow?"

Beranda “Untuk Anda” Interaktif (Demo)Interactive “For You” Homepage (Demo)

Target belajar 2026: 31 / 50 jam (62%)2026 learning goal: 31 / 50 hours (62%)
🔥 6 haridays

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Mobile & Offline Learning

Mobile & Offline Learning

Aplikasi mobile native dengan kemampuan offline: unduh kursus untuk belajar tanpa internet, sinkron otomatis saat online; plus microlearning, QR enroll, upload kamera, voice, dan sertifikat di wallet.

Native mobile apps with offline capability: download courses to learn without internet, auto-sync when online; plus microlearning, QR enroll, camera upload, voice, and wallet certificates.

FR-LD-019PRD: FR-DELIVERY-003 · MOBILE-LMS-001 · MOBILE-LMS-002Pengalaman Belajar Mobile & OfflineMobile & Offline Learning ExperienceHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar mobile),As an Employee (mobile learner), saya ingin mengunduh kursus untuk belajar offline (mis. di pabrik/lapangan tanpa sinyal), progres tersinkron otomatis saat online, plus fitur mobile-first seperti QR enroll & upload tugas dari kameraI want to download courses to learn offline (e.g. on the factory floor/field without signal), with progress auto-synced when online, plus mobile-first features like QR enroll & camera assignment upload sehingga belajar bisa kapan saja & di mana saja, dan 60%+ pembelajaran terjadi via mobile.so that learning happens anytime, anywhere, and 60%+ of learning is on mobile.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Offline penuh; sync background < 2 detik saat online; auto-download via Wi-FiFull offline; background sync < 2s when online; auto-download on Wi-Fi
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Konflik progres online vs offline diselesaikan otomatis (terbaru menang)Online vs offline progress conflicts auto-resolved (latest wins)
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
60%+ jam belajar via mobile; load app < 2 detik60%+ learning hours on mobile; app load < 2s
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Aplikasi native iOS & Android dengan offline penuh (download kursus, video, PDF, SCORM)
  • Penyelesaian kursus & asesmen offline; sync otomatis saat online (resolusi konflik)
  • Manajemen penyimpanan: lihat ruang terpakai, hapus unduhan; auto-download via Wi-Fi
  • Microlearning 2–5 menit, push notification, daily streak, navigasi swipe
  • Mobile-first: QR enroll, upload tugas dari kamera, voice note, GPS check-in
  • Sertifikat di digital wallet (Apple/Google), voice control hands-free
  • Native iOS & Android apps with full offline (download courses, video, PDF, SCORM)
  • Offline course & assessment completion; auto-sync when online (conflict resolution)
  • Storage management: see space used, delete downloads; auto-download on Wi-Fi
  • 2–5 min microlearning, push notifications, daily streak, swipe navigation
  • Mobile-first: QR enroll, camera assignment upload, voice notes, GPS check-in
  • Certificates in a digital wallet (Apple/Google), hands-free voice control
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda akan ke pabrik tanpa sinyal besok. HC AI sudah mengunduh 3 modul wajib (175 MB) ke ponsel Anda untuk belajar offline. Progres akan tersinkron otomatis saat kembali online. Punya 10 menit sebelum meeting? Coba 1 modul microlearning.You're heading to a no-signal factory tomorrow. HC AI has downloaded 3 mandatory modules (175 MB) to your phone for offline learning. Progress will auto-sync when you're back online. Got 10 minutes before a meeting? Try a microlearning module."

Mobile & Offline Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Mobile & Offline (Demo)

Koneksi:Connection:
🔄 Menyinkronkan progress…Syncing progress…
Belajar MobileMobile Learning
📷 QR enrollQR enroll 🎥 Upload kameraCamera upload 🎙️ Voice noteVoice note 📍 GPS check-inGPS check-in 👛 Wallet sertifikatWallet certificate

Demo ilustratif — unduhan & koneksi disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — downloads & connectivity are simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Anggaran & ROI L&D

L&D Budget & ROI

Kelola anggaran pelatihan per kategori, pantau utilisasi real-time, dan buktikan nilai investasi belajar. HC AI menghitung ROI, payback, dan cost-per-completion otomatis — dari biaya pelatihan ke dampak bisnis terukur.

Manage training budget by category, monitor utilization in real-time, and prove the value of learning investment. HC AI computes ROI, payback, and cost-per-completion automatically — from training cost to measurable business impact.

FR-LD-020PRD: FR-ADMIN-004 · FR-SMITH-007Manajemen Anggaran & Analitik ROI L&DL&D Budget Management & ROI AnalyticsHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Manager / Director (P4–P7),As an L&D Manager / Director (P4–P7), saya ingin melihat utilisasi anggaran pelatihan per kategori secara real-time dan menghitung ROI tiap program (biaya vs dampak bisnis)I want to see training budget utilization by category in real-time and compute ROI per program (cost vs business impact) sehingga setiap rupiah belajar terjustifikasi ke leadership dan alokasi anggaran tahun depan berbasis bukti.so that every learning rupiah is justified to leadership and next year's budget allocation is evidence-based.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Utilisasi anggaran ter-update real-time; alert otomatis saat kategori > 85% terpakaiBudget utilization updated real-time; auto-alert when a category exceeds 85% spent
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Realokasi anggaran antar kategori butuh approval L&D Director; program ROI < 100% ditandai untuk reviewBudget reallocation across categories needs L&D Director approval; programs with ROI < 100% are flagged for review
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Utilisasi anggaran 90–100%; ROI rata-rata program > 150%; cost-per-completion turun YoY90–100% budget utilization; avg program ROI > 150%; cost-per-completion down YoY
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Dashboard anggaran: total, terpakai, sisa — breakdown per kategori (training internal, kursus eksternal, sertifikasi, konferensi, tools)
  • Alert proaktif saat kategori mendekati/melebihi pagu; rekomendasi realokasi otomatis
  • Kalkulator ROI: biaya program vs benefit terukur (produktivitas, retensi, kualitas) → ROI %, net benefit, payback period
  • Cost-per-completion & cost-per-hour per program, BU, dan negara untuk benchmarking
  • Justifikasi otomatis untuk leadership: narasi ROI siap presentasi dengan sumber data
  • Forecast anggaran tahun depan berbasis pipeline pembelajaran & tren utilisasi
  • Budget dashboard: total, spent, remaining — breakdown by category (internal training, external courses, certifications, conferences, tools)
  • Proactive alerts when a category nears/exceeds its cap; automatic reallocation recommendations
  • ROI calculator: program cost vs measurable benefit (productivity, retention, quality) → ROI %, net benefit, payback period
  • Cost-per-completion & cost-per-hour by program, BU, and country for benchmarking
  • Automatic leadership justification: presentation-ready ROI narrative with data sources
  • Next-year budget forecast based on the learning pipeline & utilization trends
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Program 'Sales Excellence' menelan biaya $50K dan mendorong kenaikan penjualan $2,0 jt yang teratribusi — ROI 3.900%, payback 0,3 bulan. Kategori 'Kursus Eksternal' sudah 88% terpakai (sisa $36K); saya sarankan realokasi $20K dari 'Konferensi' yang baru 41% terpakai.The 'Sales Excellence' program cost $50K and drove $2.0M in attributed sales uplift — ROI 3,900%, payback 0.3 months. The 'External Courses' category is already 88% spent ($36K left); I recommend reallocating $20K from 'Conferences', which is only 41% utilized."
