Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Kelas Virtual & Blended

Virtual & Blended Classroom

Pelatihan langsung instruktur (ILT), kelas virtual (vILT via Zoom/Teams), dan jalur blended yang memadukan prework online, sesi live, dan asesmen pasca. HC AI mengelola jadwal, kapasitas, absensi otomatis, rekaman, dan breakout — satu konsol untuk semua modalitas.

Instructor-led training (ILT), virtual classrooms (vILT via Zoom/Teams), and blended journeys combining online prework, live sessions, and post-assessment. HC AI manages scheduling, capacity, auto-attendance, recordings, and breakouts — one console for every modality.

FR-LD-021PRD: FR-DELIVERY-002 · FR-INTEGRATION-003Penyelenggaraan Kelas Virtual, ILT & BlendedVirtual, ILT & Blended Class DeliveryHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D / Trainer (P4),As an L&D Specialist / Trainer (P4), saya ingin menjadwalkan & menyelenggarakan sesi ILT, vILT, dan hybrid dengan integrasi Zoom/Teams, absensi otomatis, dan rekaman, dalam satu jalur blendedI want to schedule & run ILT, vILT, and hybrid sessions with Zoom/Teams integration, auto-attendance, and recording, within one blended journey sehingga peserta belajar mulus lintas modalitas dan kehadiran serta penyelesaian tercatat otomatis ke LMS.so that learners flow seamlessly across modalities and attendance plus completion are logged automatically to the LMS.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Link meeting ter-generate otomatis saat dijadwalkan; absensi tersinkron < 5 menit setelah sesi selesaiMeeting link auto-generated on scheduling; attendance synced < 5 min after session ends
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Kursi penuh → waitlist otomatis; kehadiran < 80% → sesi belum dianggap selesaiSeats full → auto-waitlist; attendance < 80% → session not marked complete
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Kehadiran > 90%; utilisasi kursi > 85%; penyelesaian jalur blended > 80%Attendance > 90%; seat utilization > 85%; blended journey completion > 80%
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Jadwalkan sesi ILT (ruang fisik), vILT (Zoom/Teams), & hybrid; link meeting & kalender ter-generate otomatis
  • Manajemen kapasitas: kursi, waitlist otomatis, daftar tunggu, & reminder H-1/H-1 jam
  • Absensi otomatis dari Zoom/Teams (join/leave time); tandai < 80% sebagai tidak hadir penuh
  • Alat kelas live: rekaman otomatis, breakout room, polling, hand-raise, share materi
  • Jalur blended: prework online → sesi live → asesmen pasca, semua dilacak satu progres
  • Pasca-sesi: rekaman & materi tersimpan, sertifikat diterbitkan, feedback (NPS) dikumpulkan
  • Schedule ILT (physical room), vILT (Zoom/Teams), & hybrid sessions; meeting link & calendar auto-generated
  • Capacity management: seats, auto-waitlist, standby list, & H-1 day / H-1 hour reminders
  • Auto-attendance from Zoom/Teams (join/leave times); flag < 80% as not fully present
  • Live classroom tools: auto-recording, breakout rooms, polling, hand-raise, material sharing
  • Blended journey: online prework → live session → post-assessment, all tracked as one progress
  • Post-session: recording & materials stored, certificate issued, feedback (NPS) collected
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Sesi 'Leadership Essentials (vILT)' besok pukul 09.00 — 24/30 kursi terisi. Link Teams sudah dikirim ke semua peserta + reminder H-1 jam. Prework online sudah diselesaikan 21 dari 24 peserta. Setelah sesi, absensi & rekaman akan otomatis masuk LMS, dan asesmen pasca terbuka.The 'Leadership Essentials (vILT)' session is tomorrow at 09:00 — 24/30 seats filled. The Teams link is sent to all participants + an H-1 hour reminder. Online prework is completed by 21 of 24 participants. After the session, attendance & recording auto-flow into the LMS, and the post-assessment opens."

Konsol Kelas Virtual & Blended Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Virtual & Blended Classroom Console (Demo)

Demo ilustratif — sesi, absensi & integrasi meeting disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — sessions, attendance & meeting integration are simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Intervensi Pembelajar Berisiko

At-Risk Learner Intervention

HC AI memantau sinyal risiko secara proaktif — keterlambatan, engagement rendah, deadline mepet, sertifikat kedaluwarsa, percobaan gagal — lalu memberi skor risiko dan merekomendasikan intervensi tepat waktu sebelum karyawan benar-benar tertinggal.

HC AI proactively monitors risk signals — overdue items, low engagement, tight deadlines, expiring certifications, failed attempts — then scores risk and recommends timely interventions before an employee actually falls behind.

FR-LD-022PRD: FR-SMITH-004 · FR-ANALYTICS-002Deteksi & Intervensi Proaktif Pembelajar BerisikoProactive At-Risk Learner Detection & InterventionHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Manager / Atasan (P2, P4),As an L&D Manager / Manager (P2, P4), saya ingin HC AI mendeteksi lebih awal siapa yang berisiko tidak menyelesaikan pelatihan dan menyarankan intervensi (nudge, reschedule, eskalasi, buddy), bukan sekadar lapor setelah gagalI want HC AI to detect early who is at risk of not completing training and suggest interventions (nudge, reschedule, escalation, buddy), not just report after they fail sehingga tingkat penyelesaian & kepatuhan terjaga tinggi dan tidak ada karyawan yang “jatuh dari radar”.so that completion & compliance stay high and no employee “falls off the radar”.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Skor risiko dihitung ulang harian; risiko tinggi memicu intervensi dalam < 24 jamRisk score recomputed daily; high risk triggers intervention within < 24h
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Risiko tinggi 2× berturut → eskalasi otomatis ke atasan; kepatuhan → eskalasi HCBPHigh risk twice in a row → auto-escalation to manager; compliance → HCBP escalation
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Penyelesaian on-time > 90%; kepatuhan wajib 100%; rasio recovery pasca-intervensi > 70%On-time completion > 90%; mandatory compliance 100%; post-intervention recovery rate > 70%
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Skor risiko per pembelajar dari sinyal: hari terlambat, engagement, jarak deadline, percobaan gagal, status sertifikat
  • Radar real-time dengan banding High / Medium / Low & alasan “mengapa ditandai” yang transparan
  • Rekomendasi intervensi berperingkat: nudge personal, reschedule deadline, eskalasi atasan, buddy/mentor, pecah jadi microlearning
  • Eskalasi otomatis bertahap (karyawan → atasan → HCBP) sesuai keparahan & jenis (wajib vs pengembangan)
  • Lacak efektivitas: skor turun setelah intervensi, recovery rate, intervensi mana yang paling ampuh per segmen
  • Nada empatik & kontekstual — mendukung, bukan menghukum; hormati beban kerja & jadwal shift
  • Per-learner risk score from signals: days overdue, engagement, deadline proximity, failed attempts, certificate status
  • Real-time radar with High / Medium / Low bands & transparent “why flagged” reasons
  • Ranked intervention recommendations: personal nudge, reschedule deadline, manager escalation, buddy/mentor, break into microlearning
  • Staged auto-escalation (employee → manager → HCBP) by severity & type (mandatory vs developmental)
  • Track effectiveness: score drop after intervention, recovery rate, which intervention works best per segment
  • Empathetic, contextual tone — supportive, not punitive; respects workload & shift schedules
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Andi Pratama berisiko TINGGI (skor 88): ‘K3 Wajib’ terlambat 5 hari, engagement 18%, sertifikat lama kedaluwarsa. Rekomendasi: (1) reschedule deadline +7 hari, (2) pecah jadi 4 microlearning, (3) eskalasi ke atasan untuk alokasi waktu. Setelah nudge minggu lalu, 12 dari 17 karyawan berisiko kembali on-track (recovery 71%).Andi Pratama is HIGH risk (score 88): ‘Mandatory HSE’ is 5 days overdue, engagement 18%, prior certificate expired. Recommend: (1) reschedule deadline +7 days, (2) break into 4 microlearnings, (3) escalate to manager for time allocation. After last week's nudges, 12 of 17 at-risk employees returned on-track (71% recovery)."

Radar Risiko & Intervensi Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Risk Radar & Intervention (Demo)

DipantauMonitored
BerisikoAt-risk
Risiko TinggiHigh Risk
IntervensiInterventions

Demo ilustratif — skor risiko, pembelajar & intervensi disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — risk scores, learners & interventions are simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Pustaka Konten Terpusat

Central Content Library

Repositori tunggal untuk semua aset belajar — kursus SCORM, video, microlearning, dokumen — dengan metadata kaya, versioning, status approval, rating, dan reusability. HC AI mengindeks, menandai (auto-tag), dan membuat konten mudah ditemukan & dipakai ulang lintas BU.

A single repository for all learning assets — SCORM courses, videos, microlearning, documents — with rich metadata, versioning, approval status, ratings, and reusability. HC AI indexes, auto-tags, and makes content easy to find & reuse across BUs.

FR-LD-023PRD: FR-LCMS-001 · FR-LCMS-002Repositori & Manajemen Pustaka KontenContent Library Repository & ManagementHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Content Owner / Spesialis L&D (P4, P6),As a Content Owner / L&D Specialist (P4, P6), saya ingin satu pustaka terpusat untuk menyimpan, mencari, mem-versioning, dan memakai ulang aset belajar dengan metadata & status approval yang jelasI want one central library to store, search, version, and reuse learning assets with clear metadata & approval status sehingga konten tidak terduplikasi, selalu versi terbaru yang dipakai, dan reusability lintas BU maksimal.so that content is not duplicated, the latest version is always used, and cross-BU reusability is maximized.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Pencarian < 1 detik; auto-tag saat unggah; indeks penuh-teks & metadataSearch < 1s; auto-tag on upload; full-text & metadata indexing
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Konten wajib & compliance perlu approval Content Owner sebelum Published; versi lama diarsipkan otomatisMandatory & compliance content needs Content Owner approval before Published; old versions auto-archived
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Reuse rate > 60%; konten usang < 5%; rata-rata rating aset > 4,3Reuse rate > 60%; stale content < 5%; avg asset rating > 4.3
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Repositori terpusat: kursus SCORM/xAPI, video, microlearning, dokumen, dengan metadata kaya (tipe, format, bahasa, pemilik, BU)
  • Pencarian penuh-teks & filter (tipe, bahasa, status, tag); auto-tag & auto-kategori saat unggah
  • Versioning & riwayat versi: lacak perubahan, arsip versi lama otomatis, selalu sajikan versi aktif
  • Alur approval: Draft → Review → Published; konten wajib butuh sign-off Content Owner/Compliance
  • Reusability: satu aset dipakai di banyak learning path; hitung reuse & deteksi duplikasi
  • Tata kelola: deteksi konten usang/kedaluwarsa, rating & feedback, kontrol akses per BU
  • Central repository: SCORM/xAPI courses, videos, microlearning, documents, with rich metadata (type, format, language, owner, BU)
  • Full-text search & filters (type, language, status, tag); auto-tag & auto-categorize on upload
  • Versioning & version history: track changes, auto-archive old versions, always serve the active version
  • Approval flow: Draft → Review → Published; mandatory content needs Content Owner/Compliance sign-off
  • Reusability: one asset used across many learning paths; count reuse & detect duplication
  • Governance: detect stale/expired content, ratings & feedback, per-BU access control
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda mengunggah ‘Forklift Operation Safety.mp4’. HC AI menandai otomatis: tipe Video, bahasa ID, tag [forklift, praktik, safety], dan menautkan ke kompetensi ‘Operasi Alat Berat’. Aset serupa v1.0 sudah dipakai di 8 learning path — mau pakai ulang alih-alih buat baru? Konten ini perlu approval Compliance sebelum Published.You uploaded ‘Forklift Operation Safety.mp4’. HC AI auto-tagged: type Video, language ID, tags [forklift, hands-on, safety], and linked it to the ‘Heavy Equipment Operation’ competency. A similar v1.0 asset is already used in 8 learning paths — reuse it instead of creating new? This content needs Compliance approval before Published."

Pustaka Konten Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Content Library (Demo)

Total AsetTotal Assets
TerpublikasiPublished
Dalam ReviewIn Review
Total Jam KontenTotal Content Hours
🔍

Demo ilustratif — katalog konten, versi & metadata disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — content catalog, versions & metadata are simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Asesmen & Proctoring

Assessment & Proctoring

Ujian online dengan bank soal, pengacakan, batas waktu, dan proctoring berbasis AI — verifikasi identitas & wajah, deteksi perpindahan tab, monitoring audio/visual, dan skor integritas. HC AI menjaga kredibilitas sertifikasi tanpa perlu pengawas manual.

Online exams with question banks, randomization, time limits, and AI-based proctoring — identity & face verification, tab-switch detection, audio/visual monitoring, and an integrity score. HC AI safeguards certification credibility without manual invigilators.

FR-LD-024PRD: FR-DELIVERY-004 · FR-COMPLIANCE-003Asesmen Online & Proctoring AIOnline Assessment & AI ProctoringHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D / Content Owner (P4, P6),As an L&D Specialist / Content Owner (P4, P6), saya ingin menyelenggarakan ujian/sertifikasi online yang terproktor dengan bank soal teracak, batas waktu, dan deteksi kecurangan otomatisI want to run proctored online exams/certifications with randomized question banks, time limits, and automatic cheating detection sehingga hasil sertifikasi kredibel & dapat diaudit, tanpa biaya pengawas manual di tiap lokasi.so that certification results are credible & auditable, without manual invigilator cost at each site.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Penilaian otomatis instan; laporan integritas < 1 menit setelah submit; rekaman tersimpan untuk auditInstant auto-grading; integrity report < 1 min after submit; recording stored for audit
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Integritas “Ditandai” → hasil ditahan untuk review manusia; ≥ 3 pelanggaran → ujian dihentikan“Flagged” integrity → result held for human review; ≥ 3 violations → exam halted
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Ujian terproktor 100% untuk sertifikasi wajib; false-flag < 3%; hemat biaya pengawas100% proctored exams for mandatory certs; false-flag < 3%; invigilator cost savings
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Bank soal dengan banyak tipe (pilihan ganda, benar/salah, menjodohkan, esai) & pengacakan soal/opsi per peserta
  • Ujian berwaktu dengan auto-save, auto-submit saat waktu habis, dan lockdown browser
  • Proctoring AI: verifikasi identitas & wajah, deteksi tab-switch, wajah hilang/ganda, suara mencurigakan
  • Skor integritas real-time & log pelanggaran berstempel waktu; rekaman sesi untuk audit
  • Penilaian otomatis instan + analitik butir soal (tingkat kesulitan, daya beda) untuk perbaikan bank soal
  • Alur keputusan: hasil bersih lolos otomatis; ditandai → review manusia sebelum sertifikat terbit
  • Question bank with many types (multiple choice, true/false, matching, essay) & per-learner question/option randomization
  • Timed exams with auto-save, auto-submit on timeout, and browser lockdown
  • AI proctoring: identity & face verification, tab-switch detection, missing/multiple faces, suspicious audio
  • Real-time integrity score & timestamped violation log; session recording for audit
  • Instant auto-grading + item analytics (difficulty, discrimination) to improve the question bank
  • Decision flow: clean results pass automatically; flagged → human review before certificate issuance
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Ujian ‘Sertifikasi K3’ selesai: skor 88% (LULUS). Integritas: 1 pelanggaran terdeteksi (perpindahan tab pada menit ke-4, 12 detik) — status ‘Perlu Review’. Sertifikat ditahan sementara menunggu konfirmasi HCBP. Rekaman sesi tersimpan untuk audit.The ‘HSE Certification’ exam is done: score 88% (PASS). Integrity: 1 violation detected (tab switch at minute 4, 12 seconds) — status ‘Needs Review’. Certificate held pending HCBP confirmation. Session recording stored for audit."

Ujian Terproktor Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Proctored Exam (Demo)

Demo ilustratif — kamera, proctoring & penilaian disimulasikan di browser; tidak ada akses kamera nyata.Illustrative demo — camera, proctoring & grading are simulated in the browser; no real camera access.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Marketplace Mentoring

Mentoring Marketplace

Hubungkan mentee dengan mentor lintas BU berdasarkan keahlian, tujuan pengembangan, dan ketersediaan. HC AI mencocokkan (smart matching) mentor terbaik dengan skill gap & aspirasi karier Anda, lalu mengelola booking, log sesi, dan sign-off — ini lapisan 20% dari filosofi 70:20:10.

Connect mentees with mentors across BUs by expertise, development goals, and availability. HC AI smart-matches the best mentor to your skill gaps & career aspirations, then manages booking, session logs, and sign-off — this is the 20% layer of the 70:20:10 philosophy.

FR-LD-025PRD: FR-SOCIAL-002 · FR-SMITH-006Marketplace & Smart-Matching MentoringMentoring Marketplace & Smart-MatchingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (mentee) & Mentor (P1, P3),As an Employee (mentee) & Mentor (P1, P3), saya ingin menemukan & memesan mentor yang tepat berdasarkan tujuan pengembangan saya, dengan pencocokan otomatis, booking slot, dan pencatatan sesiI want to find & book the right mentor based on my development goals, with automatic matching, slot booking, and session logging sehingga pembelajaran sosial (20%) terstruktur, terukur, dan terhubung ke IDP & jalur karier.so that social learning (20%) is structured, measurable, and linked to the IDP & career path.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Rekomendasi match instan; konfirmasi booking < 24 jam; reminder sesi otomatisInstant match recommendations; booking confirmed < 24h; auto session reminders
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Mentor penuh (kuota mentee) → waitlist; sesi butuh sign-off kedua pihak untuk tercatatMentor full (mentee quota) → waitlist; sessions need both parties' sign-off to be logged
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Match rate > 85%; rata-rata rating mentor > 4,5; sesi mentoring tercatat/triwulanMatch rate > 85%; avg mentor rating > 4.5; logged mentoring sessions/quarter
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Direktori mentor lintas BU dengan profil: keahlian, rating, jumlah sesi, kuota mentee, ketersediaan slot
  • Smart-matching: cocokkan mentor ke skill gap, tujuan pengembangan, & aspirasi karier (skor kecocokan)
  • Booking slot mandiri + kalender; reminder otomatis; rescheduling; manajemen kuota & waitlist
  • Log sesi mentoring dengan catatan, action item, & sign-off dua arah (terhubung ke lapisan 20%)
  • Rating & feedback dua arah; lencana mentor; pelacakan jam mentoring untuk pengakuan
  • Integrasi ke IDP, career path, & succession — mentoring jadi bagian rencana pengembangan resmi
  • Cross-BU mentor directory with profiles: expertise, rating, session count, mentee quota, slot availability
  • Smart-matching: match mentors to skill gaps, development goals, & career aspirations (match score)
  • Self-service slot booking + calendar; auto reminders; rescheduling; quota & waitlist management
  • Mentoring session logs with notes, action items, & two-way sign-off (linked to the 20% layer)
  • Two-way ratings & feedback; mentor badges; mentoring-hours tracking for recognition
  • Integration with IDP, career path, & succession — mentoring becomes part of the formal development plan
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Tujuan Anda: ‘Leadership’. HC AI merekomendasikan Dr. Sari W. (kecocokan 94%) — ahli Leadership & People Management, rating 4,9, 2 slot tersedia minggu ini. Setelah 3 sesi tercatat & sign-off, jam mentoring otomatis masuk ke IDP Anda dan dihitung untuk lapisan 20%.Your goal: ‘Leadership’. HC AI recommends Dr. Sari W. (94% match) — expert in Leadership & People Management, rated 4.9, 2 slots open this week. After 3 logged & signed-off sessions, mentoring hours auto-flow into your IDP and count toward the 20% layer."

Marketplace Mentoring Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Mentoring Marketplace (Demo)

Mentor AktifActive Mentors
Mentoring BerjalanActive Mentorships
Rating Rata-rataAvg Rating
Match UntukmuYour Matches
Tujuan pengembangan sayaMy development goal — HC AI mencocokkan & mengurutkan mentor— HC AI matches & ranks mentors

Demo ilustratif — profil mentor, kecocokan & booking disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — mentor profiles, matching & booking are simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Prediksi Kebutuhan Skill

Predictive Skills Forecast

HC AI memproyeksikan permintaan skill masa depan vs ketersediaan saat ini di seluruh organisasi — mengidentifikasi gap yang muncul, skill kritis & emerging, serta skill yang menuju usang. Hasilnya: strategi upskilling/hiring proaktif (build-buy-borrow) sebelum gap menjadi krisis.

HC AI projects future skill demand vs current supply across the organization — surfacing emerging gaps, critical & emerging skills, and skills heading toward obsolescence. The result: proactive upskilling/hiring strategy (build-buy-borrow) before a gap becomes a crisis.

FR-LD-026PRD: FR-ANALYTICS-003 · FR-SMITH-001Peramalan Kebutuhan Skill & Perencanaan Tenaga KerjaSkills Demand Forecasting & Workforce PlanningHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Director / CPO / Organization Development (P4, P7),As an L&D Director / CPO / Organization Development (P4, P7), saya ingin memproyeksikan skill apa yang akan kritis 12–36 bulan ke depan vs kesiapan tenaga kerja kini, dengan rekomendasi build-buy-borrowI want to project which skills will be critical in the next 12–36 months vs current workforce readiness, with build-buy-borrow recommendations sehingga investasi belajar & rekrutmen diarahkan ke depan (proaktif), bukan menambal gap setelah terjadi.so that learning & hiring investment is directed forward (proactive), not patching gaps after they appear.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Forecast diperbarui triwulanan; horizon 12/24/36 bulan; sinyal dari tren industri & strategi bisnisForecast refreshed quarterly; 12/24/36-month horizons; signals from industry trends & business strategy
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Gap kritis (≥ 25%) → masuk rencana strategis L&D; skill usang → program reskilling/redeployCritical gap (≥ 25%) → enters strategic L&D plan; obsolescing skill → reskilling/redeploy program
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Gap kritis ditutup sebelum tenggat; akurasi forecast > 80%; coverage skill strategis > 75%Critical gaps closed before deadline; forecast accuracy > 80%; strategic-skill coverage > 75%
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Proyeksikan permintaan skill (12/24/36 bln) dari tren industri, strategi bisnis, & data internal
  • Bandingkan dengan supply saat ini (proficiency tenaga kerja) untuk hitung gap masa depan per skill
  • Klasifikasi: skill kritis, emerging (baru muncul), sehat, & menuju usang (surplus)
  • Rekomendasi strategi build-buy-borrow + jumlah orang yang perlu di-upskill/rekrut per BU
  • Skenario what-if: ubah horizon & lihat perubahan gap, prioritas, & biaya intervensi
  • Integrasi ke perencanaan tenaga kerja, suksesi, & anggaran L&D untuk keputusan proaktif
  • Project skill demand (12/24/36 mo) from industry trends, business strategy, & internal data
  • Compare against current supply (workforce proficiency) to compute future gaps per skill
  • Classify: critical skills, emerging (newly appearing), healthy, & obsolescing (surplus)
  • Recommend build-buy-borrow strategy + number of people to upskill/hire per BU
  • What-if scenarios: change the horizon & see shifts in gaps, priorities, & intervention cost
  • Integration with workforce planning, succession, & L&D budget for proactive decisions
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Horizon 24 bulan: ‘AI & Data Analytics’ akan jadi gap KRITIS (supply 22% vs demand 81%, gap 59%). Saya rekomendasikan strategi Build+Buy: upskill ~7.300 karyawan via learning path + rekrut 40 spesialis. Sebaliknya ‘Entri Data Manual’ surplus (demand turun) — siapkan reskilling 60% pemegang skill ke peran analitik.24-month horizon: ‘AI & Data Analytics’ will be a CRITICAL gap (supply 22% vs demand 81%, gap 59%). I recommend a Build+Buy strategy: upskill ~7,300 employees via a learning path + hire 40 specialists. Conversely ‘Manual Data Entry’ is surplus (demand falling) — prepare reskilling of 60% of holders into analytics roles."

Prediksi Skill Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Skills Forecast (Demo)

Skill DilacakSkills Tracked
Gap KritisCritical Gaps
Skill EmergingEmerging Skills
Coverage Tenaga KerjaWorkforce Coverage

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

SSO & Sinkronisasi HRIS

SSO & HRIS Sync

Login sekali (SSO via SAML/OIDC) dan data karyawan selalu sinkron antara core HCMS dan LMS. HC AI mengelola provisioning otomatis (JIT), sinkron master data dua arah, dan trigger siklus hidup karyawan — new hire auto-enroll, mutasi update learning path, offboarding deaktivasi.

Single sign-on (SSO via SAML/OIDC) and always-synced employee data between the HCMS core and LMS. HC AI manages just-in-time provisioning, two-way master-data sync, and employee-lifecycle triggers — new-hire auto-enroll, transfers update learning paths, offboarding deactivation.

FR-LD-027PRD: FR-INTEGRATION-001 · FR-INTEGRATION-004SSO, Provisioning & Sinkronisasi Data HRISSSO, Provisioning & HRIS Data SyncHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Admin Sistem & Karyawan (RBAC, P1),As a System Admin & Employee (RBAC, P1), saya ingin login sekali (SSO) dan data karyawan/organisasi otomatis sinkron dari HRIS tanpa entri manual, dengan trigger siklus hidupI want single sign-on and employee/org data auto-synced from the HRIS without manual entry, with lifecycle triggers sehingga tidak ada duplikasi data, akses aman & konsisten, dan onboarding/offboarding berjalan otomatis.so that there's no data duplication, access is secure & consistent, and onboarding/offboarding runs automatically.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
SSO < 2 detik; sync master data real-time/terjadwal; provisioning JIT saat login pertamaSSO < 2s; master-data sync real-time/scheduled; JIT provisioning on first login
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Karyawan nonaktif di HRIS → akun LMS deaktivasi otomatis; konflik data → HRIS jadi sumber kebenaranInactive in HRIS → LMS account auto-deactivated; data conflict → HRIS is source of truth
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Adopsi SSO 100%; akurasi data > 99%; entri manual nol; uptime integrasi > 99,9%100% SSO adoption; data accuracy > 99%; zero manual entry; integration uptime > 99.9%
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • SSO via SAML 2.0 / OIDC (Azure AD, Okta, Google) dengan MFA & provisioning JIT saat login pertama
  • Sinkron master data dua arah: profil, struktur organisasi, jabatan/grade, status — HRIS sebagai sumber kebenaran
  • Konektor terjadwal & real-time dengan pemantauan kesehatan, retry, & log audit
  • Trigger siklus hidup: new hire → auto-enroll onboarding; mutasi → update learning path; resign → deaktivasi
  • Pemetaan field & transformasi data; resolusi konflik; deduplikasi otomatis
  • Integrasi keluar: hasil belajar & sertifikat dikirim balik ke profil HRIS & modul kinerja/karier
  • SSO via SAML 2.0 / OIDC (Azure AD, Okta, Google) with MFA & JIT provisioning on first login
  • Two-way master-data sync: profiles, org structure, job/grade, status — HRIS as source of truth
  • Scheduled & real-time connectors with health monitoring, retries, & audit logs
  • Lifecycle triggers: new hire → auto-enroll onboarding; transfer → update learning path; resignation → deactivation
  • Field mapping & data transformation; conflict resolution; automatic deduplication
  • Outbound integration: learning results & certificates pushed back to HRIS profile & performance/career modules
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "12 karyawan baru masuk via konektor Talent Acquisition pagi ini — akun LMS ter-provision otomatis (JIT SSO) & ter-enroll ke learning path onboarding sesuai jabatan. 3 karyawan resign di HRIS → akun dinonaktifkan. Total 60 perubahan tersinkron, kesehatan integrasi 100%.12 new employees arrived via the Talent Acquisition connector this morning — LMS accounts auto-provisioned (JIT SSO) & enrolled into the role-based onboarding path. 3 resignations in the HRIS → accounts deactivated. 60 changes synced in total, integration health 100%."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Pembuatan Konten dengan AI

AI Content Authoring

Ubah topik, dokumen, atau transkrip video menjadi kursus lengkap dalam hitungan detik. HC AI menyusun learning objectives, outline modul, kuis, ringkasan, dan slide secara otomatis — lalu kirim ke pustaka konten untuk di-review & publish. Dari ide ke draf kursus 90% lebih cepat.

Turn a topic, document, or video transcript into a full course in seconds. HC AI auto-drafts learning objectives, module outlines, quizzes, summaries, and slides — then sends them to the content library for review & publish. From idea to course draft 90% faster.

FR-LD-028PRD: FR-LCMS-002 · FR-SMITH-008Pembuatan Konten Generatif dengan AIGenerative AI Content AuthoringHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Content Owner / Spesialis L&D (P4, P6),As a Content Owner / L&D Specialist (P4, P6), saya ingin AI menghasilkan draf kursus (objectives, outline, kuis, ringkasan, slide) dari sebuah topik/dokumen, lalu saya tinggal review & sempurnakanI want AI to generate a course draft (objectives, outline, quiz, summary, slides) from a topic/document, then I just review & refine sehingga waktu pembuatan konten turun drastis dan tim L&D fokus pada kualitas & konteks, bukan pekerjaan manual.so that content creation time drops dramatically and the L&D team focuses on quality & context, not manual work.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Draf kursus ter-generate < 30 detik; mendukung input topik, dokumen (PDF/DOCX), & transkrip videoCourse draft generated < 30s; supports topic, document (PDF/DOCX), & video transcript inputs
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Konten AI selalu masuk sebagai Draft → wajib review manusia sebelum Published; sumber dikutipAI content always enters as Draft → mandatory human review before Published; sources cited
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Waktu pembuatan turun > 80%; output konten/bulan naik; rating konten AI ≥ konten manualCreation time down > 80%; content output/month up; AI-content rating ≥ manual content
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Generate dari topik, dokumen (PDF/DOCX/PPT), atau transkrip video — auto-strukturkan jadi kursus
  • Susun learning objectives, outline modul & lesson, kuis (banyak tipe), ringkasan, & draf slide
  • Sesuaikan audiens (pemula/menengah/lanjut), bahasa (ID/EN + 15 negara), & durasi target
  • Selaras gaya & brand Nabati; kutip sumber; deteksi konten sensitif/compliance
  • Regenerate per-bagian, edit inline, lalu kirim ke pustaka konten sebagai Draft untuk review
  • Localization & terjemahan otomatis; pembuatan varian microlearning dari kursus panjang
  • Generate from a topic, document (PDF/DOCX/PPT), or video transcript — auto-structure into a course
  • Draft learning objectives, module & lesson outline, quiz (multiple types), summary, & slide deck
  • Tailor to audience (beginner/intermediate/advanced), language (ID/EN + 15 countries), & target duration
  • Align to Nabati style & brand; cite sources; detect sensitive/compliance content
  • Regenerate per section, edit inline, then push to the content library as a Draft for review
  • Auto localization & translation; generate microlearning variants from a long course
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Dari topik ‘Keselamatan Kerja Forklift’, HC AI membuat draf kursus: 3 learning objectives, 4 modul (12 lesson), 5 soal kuis, ringkasan, & 14 slide — dalam 9 detik (setara ~6 jam kerja manual). Draf dikirim ke pustaka konten, status Draft, menunggu review Compliance.From the topic ‘Forklift Operation Safety’, HC AI drafted a course: 3 learning objectives, 4 modules (12 lessons), 5 quiz questions, a summary, & 14 slides — in 9 seconds (~6 hours of manual work). The draft was sent to the content library as Draft, pending Compliance review."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Course Player & SCORM

Course Player & SCORM

Mesin pemutar kursus yang menjalankan konten SCORM/xAPI, video, dokumen, & kuis dalam satu antarmuka konsisten. Lacak progres & penyelesaian, bookmark/resume, skor, sequencing antar-lesson, dan rekam data SCORM (cmi.*) untuk pelaporan akurat.

A course runtime that plays SCORM/xAPI content, video, documents, & quizzes in one consistent interface. Tracks progress & completion, bookmark/resume, score, inter-lesson sequencing, and records SCORM data (cmi.*) for accurate reporting.

FR-LD-029PRD: FR-DELIVERY-001 · FR-DELIVERY-007Course Player, Sequencing & Pelacakan SCORM/xAPICourse Player, Sequencing & SCORM/xAPI TrackingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin memutar kursus (SCORM/video/dokumen/kuis) dalam satu player yang melacak progres, menyimpan bookmark, & melanjutkan dari tempat terakhirI want to play courses (SCORM/video/document/quiz) in one player that tracks progress, saves a bookmark, & resumes from where I left off sehingga belajar mulus, tidak ada progres hilang, dan penyelesaian tercatat akurat ke transkrip saya.so that learning is seamless, no progress is lost, and completion is accurately recorded to my transcript.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Auto-save progres tiap aksi; resume instan; SCORM 1.2/2004 & xAPI; load < 2 detikAuto-save progress on each action; instant resume; SCORM 1.2/2004 & xAPI; load < 2s
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Sequencing: lesson terkunci sampai prasyarat selesai; completion butuh skor & progres terpenuhiSequencing: lessons locked until prerequisites complete; completion needs score & progress met
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Penyelesaian tercatat 100% akurat; resume rate tinggi; nol progres hilang100% accurate completion tracking; high resume rate; zero lost progress
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Putar SCORM 1.2/2004, xAPI (Tin Can), video, PDF/dokumen, & kuis dalam satu player responsif
  • Lacak status (cmi.completion_status, success_status), skor, lokasi/bookmark, & total_time
  • Bookmark & resume otomatis: lanjut dari lesson & posisi terakhir lintas perangkat
  • Sequencing & prasyarat: kunci lesson sampai sebelumnya selesai; aturan penyelesaian per modul
  • Outline navigasi dengan status penyelesaian; kontrol pemutaran; aksesibilitas (caption, keyboard)
  • Sinkron progres ke transkrip, sertifikat, & analitik — auto-save tahan gangguan jaringan
  • Play SCORM 1.2/2004, xAPI (Tin Can), video, PDF/documents, & quizzes in one responsive player
  • Track status (cmi.completion_status, success_status), score, location/bookmark, & total_time
  • Auto bookmark & resume: continue from the last lesson & position across devices
  • Sequencing & prerequisites: lock lessons until prior ones complete; per-module completion rules
  • Navigation outline with completion status; playback controls; accessibility (captions, keyboard)
  • Sync progress to transcript, certificates, & analytics — auto-save survives network drops
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Selamat datang kembali! Anda berhenti di Lesson 3 ‘SOP Pengoperasian’ (SCORM) pada menit ke-4. HC AI memulihkan bookmark Anda — lanjut dari sana. Progres kursus 40%, cmi.completion_status: incomplete. Selesaikan 2 lesson lagi untuk membuka Ujian Akhir.Welcome back! You stopped at Lesson 3 ‘Operating SOP’ (SCORM) at minute 4. HC AI restored your bookmark — resume from there. Course progress 40%, cmi.completion_status: incomplete. Finish 2 more lessons to unlock the Final Exam."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

RBAC & Manajemen Pengguna

RBAC & User Management

Kontrol akses berbasis peran (RBAC) yang granular: setiap peran (P1–P7 + Admin) punya matriks izin per kapabilitas LMS. Admin mengelola pengguna, menetapkan peran, dan mengatur akses Tidak ada / Lihat / Edit / Kelola — selaras prinsip least-privilege & segregation of duties.

Granular role-based access control (RBAC): each role (P1–P7 + Admin) has a permission matrix per LMS capability. Admins manage users, assign roles, and set None / View / Edit / Manage access — aligned with least-privilege & segregation-of-duties principles.

FR-LD-030PRD: FR-ADMIN-001 · FR-ADMIN-002Kontrol Akses Berbasis Peran & Manajemen PenggunaRole-Based Access Control & User ManagementHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Admin Sistem / Master Admin (RBAC),As a System Admin / Master Admin (RBAC), saya ingin mengelola pengguna & peran dengan matriks izin granular per kapabilitas, plus audit trail perubahan aksesI want to manage users & roles with a granular permission matrix per capability, plus an access-change audit trail sehingga setiap orang hanya punya akses yang diperlukan (least-privilege), aman, & sesuai kebijakan tata kelola.so that everyone has only the access they need (least-privilege), securely, & per governance policy.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Perubahan peran berlaku instan; provisioning/deprovisioning < 5 menit; audit trail penuhRole changes apply instantly; provisioning/deprovisioning < 5 min; full audit trail
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Akses sensitif (anggaran, user mgmt, settings) butuh peran tinggi; SoD cegah konflik peranSensitive access (budget, user mgmt, settings) needs high roles; SoD prevents role conflicts
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
100% akses sesuai peran; nol akses berlebih; audit lulus; review akses berkala100% role-appropriate access; zero over-provisioning; audit pass; periodic access reviews
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Definisi peran (P1–P7 + Admin) dengan matriks izin granular: Tidak ada / Lihat / Edit / Kelola per kapabilitas
  • Manajemen pengguna: undang, aktifkan, suspend, reset, & tetapkan peran (single & bulk)
  • Least-privilege & segregation of duties; deteksi akses berlebih & konflik peran otomatis
  • Provisioning/deprovisioning otomatis dari trigger HRIS (new hire, mutasi, resign)
  • Audit trail penuh setiap perubahan akses; review akses berkala (access certification)
  • Peran kustom & pewarisan; scoping per BU/wilayah; rekomendasi peran berbasis jabatan
  • Role definitions (P1–P7 + Admin) with a granular permission matrix: None / View / Edit / Manage per capability
  • User management: invite, activate, suspend, reset, & assign roles (single & bulk)
  • Least-privilege & segregation of duties; automatic over-provisioning & role-conflict detection
  • Automatic provisioning/deprovisioning from HRIS triggers (new hire, transfer, resignation)
  • Full audit trail of every access change; periodic access reviews (access certification)
  • Custom roles & inheritance; per-BU/region scoping; job-based role recommendations
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Eko Wijaya berpindah dari Content Owner ke L&D Manager. HC AI memperbarui peran: akses Anggaran naik ke Kelola, Manajemen User ke Edit. Terdeteksi potensi konflik SoD (authoring + approval) — saya sarankan pemisahan. Semua perubahan tercatat di audit trail.Eko Wijaya moved from Content Owner to L&D Manager. HC AI updated the role: Budget access raised to Manage, User Management to Edit. A potential SoD conflict (authoring + approval) was detected — I recommend separation. All changes are recorded in the audit trail."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Audit & Pelaporan Kepatuhan

Compliance Audit & Reporting

Jejak audit yang tamper-evident untuk setiap aksi penting (login, enrollment, publish konten, perubahan akses, penyelesaian) plus pembuat laporan kepatuhan siap-audit. HC AI menjaga log immutable dengan hash-chain, retensi jangka panjang, dan ekspor regulator (PDF/CSV/XBRL).

A tamper-evident audit trail for every significant action (login, enrollment, content publish, access change, completion) plus an audit-ready compliance report builder. HC AI keeps an immutable hash-chained log with long-term retention and regulator exports (PDF/CSV/XBRL).

FR-LD-031PRD: FR-COMPLIANCE-002 · FR-ANALYTICS-004Jejak Audit Immutable & Pelaporan KepatuhanImmutable Audit Trail & Compliance ReportingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Content Owner / Compliance & L&D Director (P6, P7),As a Content Owner / Compliance & L&D Director (P6, P7), saya ingin jejak audit lengkap & tamper-evident plus laporan kepatuhan siap-ekspor untuk regulator/internal audit kapan sajaI want a complete, tamper-evident audit trail plus export-ready compliance reports for regulators/internal audit anytime sehingga setiap audit lulus tanpa scramble, & bukti kepatuhan tersedia instan & kredibel.so that every audit passes without a scramble, & compliance evidence is instant & credible.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Log real-time & immutable; laporan ter-generate < 1 menit; retensi 7–10 tahunReal-time & immutable logging; reports generated < 1 min; 7–10 year retention
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Log tidak bisa diubah/dihapus (hash-chain); akses log butuh peran audit; anomali ditandaiLogs cannot be altered/deleted (hash-chain); log access needs an audit role; anomalies flagged
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
100% aksi tercatat; audit lulus tanpa temuan kritis; waktu siapkan laporan turun > 90%100% actions logged; audits pass with no critical findings; report prep time down > 90%
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Catat setiap aksi penting (siapa, apa, kapan, hasil) ke log immutable ber-hash-chain (tamper-evident)
  • Filter & cari audit trail per kategori, aktor, entitas, periode; tampilan siap-audit
  • Pembuat laporan: Status Kepatuhan, Penyelesaian, Perubahan Akses, Kedaluwarsa Sertifikasi, Ekspor Trail
  • Ekspor regulator: PDF, CSV, XBRL; laporan terjadwal otomatis ke auditor/stakeholder
  • Deteksi anomali & pelanggaran (akses ditolak berulang, perubahan mencurigakan) → alert
  • Retensi & legal hold sesuai kebijakan 15+ negara; bukti kepatuhan siap untuk audit eksternal
  • Log every significant action (who, what, when, result) to an immutable hash-chained log (tamper-evident)
  • Filter & search the audit trail by category, actor, entity, period; audit-ready view
  • Report builder: Compliance Status, Completion, Access Changes, Certification Expiry, Trail Export
  • Regulator exports: PDF, CSV, XBRL; scheduled reports auto-sent to auditors/stakeholders
  • Anomaly & violation detection (repeated denied access, suspicious changes) → alerts
  • Retention & legal hold per 15+ country policies; compliance evidence ready for external audit
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Auditor minta bukti pelatihan K3 wajib 2026. HC AI menghasilkan laporan dalam 38 detik: 1.560 penyelesaian, 230 terlambat, hash-chain terverifikasi (tidak ada manipulasi). Ekspor PDF + CSV siap dikirim. Terdeteksi 8 akses ditolak & 5 sertifikat kedaluwarsa — ditandai untuk tindak lanjut.An auditor requested 2026 mandatory HSE training evidence. HC AI produced the report in 38 seconds: 1,560 completions, 230 overdue, hash-chain verified (no tampering). PDF + CSV exports ready to send. 8 denied accesses & 5 expired certificates detected — flagged for follow-up."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Notifikasi & Pengingat

Notifications & Reminders

Mesin notifikasi multi-channel: in-app, email, push, WhatsApp, & Teams. HC AI memicu pengingat cerdas (deadline, terlambat, sertifikat kedaluwarsa, sesi live) dengan smart timing & preferensi per pengguna — menjaga engagement tanpa membanjiri.

A multi-channel notification engine: in-app, email, push, WhatsApp, & Teams. HC AI triggers smart reminders (deadline, overdue, certificate expiry, live sessions) with smart timing & per-user preferences — sustaining engagement without overwhelming.

FR-LD-032PRD: FR-DELIVERY-008 · FR-SMITH-004Notifikasi Multi-Channel & Pengingat CerdasMulti-Channel Notifications & Smart RemindersHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & Spesialis L&D (P1, P4),As an Employee & L&D Specialist (P1, P4), saya ingin pengingat tepat waktu di channel pilihan saya (in-app/email/push/WA/Teams) untuk deadline, sesi, & sertifikat, dengan kontrol preferensiI want timely reminders on my preferred channels (in-app/email/push/WA/Teams) for deadlines, sessions, & certificates, with preference controls sehingga tidak ada yang terlewat, engagement tinggi, & saya tidak terganggu notifikasi berlebihan.so that nothing is missed, engagement stays high, & I'm not disrupted by notification overload.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Kirim < 30 detik dari trigger; smart timing hormati jam kerja/shift & quiet hours; digest opsionalSent < 30s from trigger; smart timing respects work/shift hours & quiet hours; optional digest
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Eskalasi channel jika tak dibaca; frekuensi dibatasi (anti-spam); pengguna kontrol preferensiChannel escalation if unread; frequency capped (anti-spam); users control preferences
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Open rate > 70%; penyelesaian on-time naik; opt-out rendah; nol deadline wajib terlewatOpen rate > 70%; on-time completion up; low opt-out; zero missed mandatory deadlines
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Kirim notifikasi multi-channel: in-app, email, push, WhatsApp/SMS, Teams/Slack — sesuai preferensi
  • Trigger otomatis: enrollment, deadline (H-3), terlambat (harian), selesai, sertifikat kedaluwarsa (H-30), sesi live (H-1 jam)
  • Smart timing: kirim saat kemungkinan dibaca tinggi; hormati jam kerja/shift & quiet hours
  • Anti-overload: frekuensi dibatasi, digest harian/mingguan, dedup, prioritas notifikasi
  • Eskalasi channel: jika in-app tak dibaca → email → push; konten wajib dieskalasi ke atasan
  • Personalisasi: bahasa, nada, & CTA per pengguna; A/B test & pelacakan open/click rate
  • Send multi-channel notifications: in-app, email, push, WhatsApp/SMS, Teams/Slack — per preferences
  • Automatic triggers: enrollment, deadline (D-3), overdue (daily), completion, certificate expiry (D-30), live session (H-1 hour)
  • Smart timing: send when read-likelihood is high; respect work/shift hours & quiet hours
  • Anti-overload: capped frequency, daily/weekly digest, dedup, notification priority
  • Channel escalation: if in-app unread → email → push; mandatory content escalated to manager
  • Personalization: language, tone, & CTA per user; A/B testing & open/click-rate tracking
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "'Sertifikasi K3' Anda jatuh tempo dalam 3 hari. HC AI mengirim pengingat via in-app + email pukul 09:15 (jam baca tertinggi Anda). Karena belum dibuka dalam 24 jam, saya eskalasi ke push. Untuk pekerja shift malam, pengingat ditahan hingga jam aktif — bukan tengah malam.Your 'HSE Certification' is due in 3 days. HC AI sent a reminder via in-app + email at 09:15 (your peak read time). Since it wasn't opened within 24 hours, I escalated to push. For night-shift workers, reminders are held until active hours — not midnight."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Perancang Laporan Kustom

Custom Report Designer

Bangun laporan sendiri tanpa coding: pilih sumber data, tentukan kolom & metrik, pilih visualisasi (tabel/bar/line/donut), lihat pratinjau langsung, lalu simpan, jadwalkan & ekspor. HC AI bahkan bisa menyarankan laporan dari pertanyaan bahasa natural.

Build your own reports with no code: pick a data source, choose columns & metrics, select a visualization (table/bar/line/donut), see a live preview, then save, schedule & export. HC AI can even suggest reports from a natural-language question.

FR-LD-033PRD: FR-ANALYTICS-005 · FR-SMITH-009Perancang Laporan Kustom Self-ServiceSelf-Service Custom Report DesignerHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Manager / HCBP / Analytics (P4, P5),As an L&D Manager / HCBP / Analytics (P4, P5), saya ingin merancang laporan sendiri (pilih sumber, kolom, metrik, visualisasi) tanpa minta tim IT, dengan pratinjau langsung & penjadwalanI want to design my own reports (pick source, columns, metrics, visualization) without asking IT, with live preview & scheduling sehingga keputusan berbasis data lebih cepat & mandiri, tanpa antre permintaan laporan.so that data-driven decisions are faster & self-served, without queuing report requests.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Pratinjau real-time saat konfigurasi; jadwal harian/mingguan/bulanan; ekspor multi-formatReal-time preview while configuring; daily/weekly/monthly schedule; multi-format export
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Akses data dibatasi RBAC & scoping BU; data sensitif disamarkan; laporan dibagikan terkontrolData access bounded by RBAC & BU scoping; sensitive data masked; reports shared with control
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Laporan self-service > 70%; waktu buat laporan turun drastis; adopsi analitik naikSelf-service reports > 70%; report build time down sharply; analytics adoption up
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Perancang drag-and-drop: pilih sumber data, dimensi, metrik, filter, & urutan tanpa coding
  • Visualisasi: tabel, bar, line, donut, KPI card, pivot — pratinjau langsung saat konfigurasi
  • Filter & segmentasi: BU, wilayah, periode, status; perhitungan (kalkulasi) & agregasi kustom
  • Simpan, bagikan (terkontrol RBAC), & jadwalkan kirim otomatis ke email/dashboard
  • Ekspor: PDF, Excel/CSV, gambar; sematkan ke dashboard atau distribusikan ke stakeholder
  • NL-to-report: tanya dalam bahasa natural ("penyelesaian per BU kuartal ini") → HC AI rancang laporannya
  • Drag-and-drop designer: pick data source, dimensions, metrics, filters, & sorting with no code
  • Visualizations: table, bar, line, donut, KPI card, pivot — live preview while configuring
  • Filtering & segmentation: BU, region, period, status; custom calculations & aggregations
  • Save, share (RBAC-controlled), & schedule auto-delivery to email/dashboards
  • Export: PDF, Excel/CSV, image; embed into dashboards or distribute to stakeholders
  • NL-to-report: ask in natural language ("completion by BU this quarter") → HC AI designs the report
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda minta ‘tingkat penyelesaian per BU kuartal ini’. HC AI merancang laporan: sumber Penyelesaian, dimensi BU, metrik Terdaftar/Selesai/Rate, visualisasi bar. Pratinjau siap — Operations tertinggi (88%). Mau saya jadwalkan kirim tiap Senin ke L&D Director?You asked for ‘completion rate by BU this quarter’. HC AI designed the report: source Completion, dimension BU, metrics Enrolled/Completed/Rate, bar visualization. Preview ready — Operations highest (88%). Shall I schedule it every Monday to the L&D Director?"

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Waitlist & Alur Persetujuan

Waitlist & Approval Workflow

Alur persetujuan enrollment bertingkat (atasan → L&D → budget) plus manajemen waitlist otomatis untuk kursus berkapasitas terbatas. HC AI merutekan permintaan ke approver yang tepat, mempromosikan waitlist saat kursi kosong, dan menjaga SLA persetujuan.

Multi-step enrollment approval (manager → L&D → budget) plus automatic waitlist management for capacity-limited courses. HC AI routes requests to the right approver, auto-promotes from the waitlist when a seat opens, and enforces approval SLAs.

FR-LD-034PRD: FR-DELIVERY-009 · FR-ADMIN-005Alur Persetujuan Enrollment & Manajemen WaitlistEnrollment Approval Flow & Waitlist ManagementHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Atasan / L&D Manager (P2, P4),As a Manager / L&D Manager (P2, P4), saya ingin menyetujui/menolak permintaan enrollment lewat alur bertingkat & mengelola waitlist kursus penuh secara otomatisI want to approve/reject enrollment requests via a multi-step flow & manage full-course waitlists automatically sehingga akses pelatihan adil & terkontrol anggaran, dan kursi kosong langsung terisi tanpa manual.so that training access is fair & budget-controlled, and open seats are filled instantly without manual work.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Persetujuan < 48 jam; promosi waitlist otomatis & instan saat kursi kosong; reminder approverApproval < 48h; instant automatic waitlist promotion when a seat opens; approver reminders
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Berbiaya/eksternal → perlu approval budget; kursus penuh → masuk waitlist (FIFO/prioritas)Paid/external → needs budget approval; course full → enters waitlist (FIFO/priority)
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
SLA persetujuan terpenuhi > 95%; utilisasi kursi > 90%; nol kursi terbuangApproval SLA met > 95%; seat utilization > 90%; zero wasted seats
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Alur persetujuan bertingkat & kondisional: atasan, L&D, & budget sesuai biaya/jenis kursus
  • Routing otomatis ke approver yang tepat; eskalasi & reminder bila melewati SLA
  • Manajemen waitlist: antrean FIFO/prioritas, promosi otomatis saat kursi kosong, notifikasi
  • Kontrol kapasitas & anggaran; cegah over-enroll; reservasi kursi sementara saat menunggu
  • Delegasi approver, persetujuan massal, & jejak audit setiap keputusan
  • Rekomendasi HC AI: alternatif jadwal/kursus serupa bila penuh atau ditolak
  • Multi-step & conditional approval: manager, L&D, & budget based on cost/course type
  • Automatic routing to the right approver; escalation & reminders if SLA is breached
  • Waitlist management: FIFO/priority queue, automatic promotion when a seat opens, notifications
  • Capacity & budget control; prevent over-enrollment; temporary seat reservation while pending
  • Approver delegation, bulk approval, & audit trail of every decision
  • HC AI recommendations: alternative schedules/similar courses when full or rejected
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Permintaan Siti Rahma untuk 'Leadership Path' ($1.200) lolos approval atasan & L&D, lalu budget. Kursus penuh (30/30) — HC AI menempatkannya di waitlist posisi #4 & mereservasi kursi. Saat 1 peserta mengundurkan diri, Siti otomatis dipromosikan & diberi tahu. SLA persetujuan: 6 jam (target < 48 jam).Siti Rahma's request for 'Leadership Path' ($1,200) cleared manager & L&D approval, then budget. The course is full (30/30) — HC AI placed her on the waitlist at position #4 & reserved a seat. When one participant withdraws, Siti is auto-promoted & notified. Approval SLA: 6 hours (target < 48h)."

Persetujuan & Waitlist Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Approval & Waitlist (Demo)

✅ Antrean PersetujuanApproval Queue
⏳ Waitlist: Leadership PathWaitlist: Leadership Path

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

API Publik & Webhook

Public API & Webhooks

API REST terdokumentasi & webhook untuk integrasi sistem eksternal (BI, LXP, HRIS, aplikasi mitra). Developer portal dengan API key, explorer endpoint, & langganan event real-time — LMS jadi platform terbuka yang aman & ber-rate-limit.

A documented REST API & webhooks for external system integration (BI, LXP, HRIS, partner apps). A developer portal with API keys, an endpoint explorer, & real-time event subscriptions — the LMS as a secure, rate-limited open platform.

FR-LD-035PRD: FR-INTEGRATION-005 · FR-INTEGRATION-006API Publik REST, Webhook & Developer PortalPublic REST API, Webhooks & Developer PortalHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Admin Sistem / Developer Integrasi (RBAC),As a System Admin / Integration Developer (RBAC), saya ingin API REST & webhook yang terdokumentasi & aman untuk menghubungkan LMS ke BI, LXP, & sistem mitra tanpa integrasi custom yang rapuhI want a documented & secure REST API & webhooks to connect the LMS to BI, LXP, & partner systems without brittle custom integrations sehingga data belajar mengalir otomatis & real-time ke ekosistem, dengan kontrol akses & rate limit.so that learning data flows automatically & in real-time to the ecosystem, with access control & rate limits.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Latensi API p95 < 200ms; webhook terkirim < 5 detik dari event; retry & backoff otomatisAPI p95 latency < 200ms; webhooks delivered < 5s from event; automatic retry & backoff
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Auth via API key/OAuth2; rate limit per key; webhook ditandatangani (HMAC) & idempotenAuth via API key/OAuth2; per-key rate limits; webhooks signed (HMAC) & idempotent
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Uptime API > 99,9%; sukses webhook > 99%; adopsi integrasi mitra naikAPI uptime > 99.9%; webhook success > 99%; partner integration adoption up
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • API REST versi (v1) terdokumentasi (OpenAPI): courses, users, enrollments, transcript, reports
  • Developer portal: API key & OAuth2, rotasi key, scoping & rate limit per aplikasi
  • Webhook event real-time: course.completed, user.enrolled, certificate.issued, assessment.failed, dll
  • Pengiriman andal: tanda tangan HMAC, retry & exponential backoff, idempotency, log pengiriman
  • Sandbox & explorer interaktif (try-it), contoh kode (SDK), & pagination/filtering standar
  • Keamanan: TLS, izin granular, audit pemakaian API, & deteksi anomali/abuse
  • Versioned (v1) documented REST API (OpenAPI): courses, users, enrollments, transcript, reports
  • Developer portal: API keys & OAuth2, key rotation, scoping & per-app rate limits
  • Real-time webhook events: course.completed, user.enrolled, certificate.issued, assessment.failed, etc.
  • Reliable delivery: HMAC signatures, retry & exponential backoff, idempotency, delivery logs
  • Interactive sandbox & explorer (try-it), code samples (SDKs), & standard pagination/filtering
  • Security: TLS, granular permissions, API usage audit, & anomaly/abuse detection
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Tim BI berlangganan webhook 'course.completed'. Saat Andi menyelesaikan 'Sertifikasi K3', HC AI mengirim payload bertanda-tangan HMAC ke endpoint BI dalam 1,2 detik (HTTP 200). Bila gagal, retry hingga 5× dengan backoff. Pemakaian API key mereka: 142.580 panggilan hari ini (limit 5.000/jam, sehat).The BI team subscribed to the 'course.completed' webhook. When Andi finished 'HSE Certification', HC AI delivered an HMAC-signed payload to the BI endpoint in 1.2 seconds (HTTP 200). On failure, it retries up to 5× with backoff. Their API key usage: 142,580 calls today (limit 5,000/hour, healthy)."

Panggilan API (hari ini)API Calls (today)
Webhook AktifActive Webhooks
Uptime API
Rate Limit

🔌 Explorer Endpoint RESTREST Endpoint Explorer

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Perancang Learning Path

Learning Path Builder

Rangkai kursus jadi jalur belajar bertahap: tambahkan dari katalog, atur urutan & prasyarat, tandai wajib/opsional, dan tetapkan ke peran/audiens. HC AI menyarankan jalur ideal per peran & menautkannya ke IDP, career path, & filosofi 70:20:10.

Assemble courses into a staged learning journey: add from the catalog, set sequence & prerequisites, mark required/optional, and assign to a role/audience. HC AI suggests the ideal path per role & links it to the IDP, career path, & the 70:20:10 philosophy.

FR-LD-036PRD: FR-DELIVERY-010 · FR-SMITH-002Perancang & Penugasan Learning PathLearning Path Builder & AssignmentHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D / L&D Manager (P4),As an L&D Specialist / L&D Manager (P4), saya ingin merangkai kursus menjadi learning path bertahap (urutan, prasyarat, wajib/opsional) & menugaskannya ke peran, dengan saran otomatisI want to assemble courses into a staged learning path (sequence, prerequisites, required/optional) & assign it to a role, with automatic suggestions sehingga pengembangan terstruktur per peran, konsisten, & selaras IDP/career path tanpa menyusun manual berulang.so that development is structured per role, consistent, & aligned to IDP/career paths without repetitive manual assembly.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Rancang & tugaskan dalam menit; auto-enroll saat ditugaskan; update path tersinkron ke pembelajarDesign & assign in minutes; auto-enroll on assignment; path updates sync to learners
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Item wajib mengunci kelulusan path; prasyarat mengatur sequencing; opsional fleksibelRequired items gate path completion; prerequisites drive sequencing; optionals are flexible
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Cakupan path per peran > 80%; penyelesaian path naik; waktu susun turun drastisRole path coverage > 80%; path completion up; assembly time down sharply
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Perancang visual: tambah kursus dari katalog, atur urutan (drag/naik-turun), & prasyarat antar-langkah
  • Tandai item wajib/opsional; tetapkan milestone, durasi target, & estimasi penyelesaian
  • Saran otomatis: HC AI menyusun path ideal dari peran/skill gap/aspirasi karier
  • Penugasan ke peran/BU/individu dengan auto-enroll & sinkron pembaruan path
  • Tautkan ke IDP, career path, succession, & 70:20:10 (training/coaching/praktik)
  • Versi & kloning path; analitik penyelesaian & titik putus (drop-off) untuk perbaikan
  • Visual builder: add courses from the catalog, set order (drag/up-down), & inter-step prerequisites
  • Mark items required/optional; set milestones, target duration, & completion estimate
  • Auto-suggestions: HC AI assembles the ideal path from role/skill gap/career aspiration
  • Assign to role/BU/individual with auto-enroll & path-update sync
  • Link to IDP, career path, succession, & 70:20:10 (training/coaching/practice)
  • Path versioning & cloning; completion & drop-off analytics for improvement
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Untuk peran 'Karyawan Baru', HC AI menyusun path: Onboarding Nabati Way → K3 Forklift (wajib) → Anti-Bribery (wajib) → Data Literacy (opsional). Total ~2,5 jam, estimasi 2 minggu. Ditugaskan ke 47 hire baru dengan auto-enroll; progres tersinkron ke transkrip & IDP.For the 'New Hire' role, HC AI assembled a path: Onboarding Nabati Way → Forklift HSE (required) → Anti-Bribery (required) → Data Literacy (optional). Total ~2.5 hours, est. 2 weeks. Assigned to 47 new hires with auto-enroll; progress syncs to transcript & IDP."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Multi-Tenant & Branding

Multi-Tenant & Branding

Satu platform, banyak tenant terisolasi — per negara, BU, atau anak usaha — masing-masing dengan branding sendiri (logo, warna, domain), konfigurasi, & data terpisah. Studio branding dengan pratinjau langsung membuat setiap tenant terasa seperti aplikasi miliknya sendiri.

One platform, many isolated tenants — per country, BU, or subsidiary — each with its own branding (logo, colors, domain), configuration, & separate data. A branding studio with live preview makes every tenant feel like its own app.

FR-LD-037PRD: FR-ADMIN-006 · FR-ADMIN-003Manajemen Multi-Tenant & White-Label BrandingMulti-Tenant Management & White-Label BrandingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Admin Sistem / Master Admin (RBAC),As a System Admin / Master Admin (RBAC), saya ingin mengelola banyak tenant (negara/BU/anak usaha) dengan branding, domain, & data terpisah dari satu konsol, plus pratinjau langsungI want to manage many tenants (countries/BUs/subsidiaries) with separate branding, domains, & data from one console, with live preview sehingga tiap entitas punya identitas & isolasi sendiri, namun tata kelola & biaya tetap terpusat & efisien.so that each entity has its own identity & isolation, while governance & cost stay centralized & efficient.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Provisioning tenant baru < 1 hari; perubahan branding berlaku instan; isolasi data penuhNew tenant provisioning < 1 day; branding changes apply instantly; full data isolation
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Data antar-tenant terisolasi ketat; konfigurasi global vs per-tenant; domain & SSO per tenantCross-tenant data strictly isolated; global vs per-tenant config; per-tenant domain & SSO
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Nol kebocoran data antar-tenant; konsistensi brand per entitas; biaya operasi per tenant turunZero cross-tenant data leakage; per-entity brand consistency; per-tenant ops cost down
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Kelola banyak tenant (negara/BU/anak usaha) dengan isolasi data & konfigurasi terpisah
  • Studio branding white-label: logo, warna primer/aksen, nama aplikasi, tema — pratinjau langsung
  • Domain kustom per tenant (mis. lms.nabati.vn) & SSO/IdP terpisah per entitas
  • Konfigurasi berjenjang: kebijakan global yang bisa di-override per tenant (bahasa, compliance, katalog)
  • Provisioning & suspend tenant; kuota lisensi, pemantauan pemakaian, & billing per tenant
  • Konsistensi merek otomatis & tata kelola terpusat; audit lintas-tenant untuk master admin
  • Manage many tenants (countries/BUs/subsidiaries) with isolated data & separate configuration
  • White-label branding studio: logo, primary/accent colors, app name, theme — live preview
  • Per-tenant custom domains (e.g. lms.nabati.vn) & separate SSO/IdP per entity
  • Tiered config: global policies that can be overridden per tenant (language, compliance, catalog)
  • Provision & suspend tenants; license quotas, usage monitoring, & per-tenant billing
  • Automatic brand consistency & centralized governance; cross-tenant audit for master admins
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Tenant 'Nabati Vietnam' diprovisioning: domain lms.nabati.vn, warna merek oranye, SSO Azure AD lokal, bahasa default VN. Data terisolasi penuh dari tenant lain. 1.820 pengguna ter-provision otomatis dari HRIS. Branding berlaku instan — lihat pratinjau di sebelah.Tenant 'Nabati Vietnam' provisioned: domain lms.nabati.vn, orange brand color, local Azure AD SSO, default VN language. Data fully isolated from other tenants. 1,820 users auto-provisioned from the HRIS. Branding applies instantly — see the preview alongside."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Leaderboard Tim & Gamifikasi

Team Leaderboard & Gamification

Kompetisi belajar yang sehat: papan peringkat individu, tim, & BU; challenge musiman; poin, lencana, & streak. HC AI menjaga gamifikasi tetap memotivasi & adil (handicap antar-tim), menautkan capaian ke pengakuan & budaya belajar.

Healthy learning competition: individual, team, & BU leaderboards; seasonal challenges; points, badges, & streaks. HC AI keeps gamification motivating & fair (cross-team handicaps), linking achievements to recognition & a learning culture.

FR-LD-038PRD: FR-DELIVERY-011 · FR-SOCIAL-003Leaderboard Tim, Challenge & Gamifikasi SosialTeam Leaderboards, Challenges & Social GamificationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & Atasan (P1, P2),As an Employee & Manager (P1, P2), saya ingin bersaing sehat lewat leaderboard tim/BU & challenge musiman dengan poin, lencana, & streak yang adilI want healthy competition via team/BU leaderboards & seasonal challenges with fair points, badges, & streaks sehingga belajar terasa menyenangkan, kolaboratif, & konsisten — bukan kewajiban yang membosankan.so that learning feels fun, collaborative, & consistent — not a boring obligation.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Poin ter-update real-time; leaderboard mingguan/bulanan/musiman; reset musim otomatisPoints update real-time; weekly/monthly/seasonal boards; automatic season reset
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Handicap antar-tim agar adil (ukuran berbeda); anti-gaming; reward terhubung pengakuan resmiCross-team handicaps for fairness (different sizes); anti-gaming; rewards tied to formal recognition
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Partisipasi challenge > 70%; engagement & streak naik; penyelesaian sukarela meningkatChallenge participation > 70%; engagement & streaks up; voluntary completion rises
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Leaderboard multi-level: individu, tim, & BU; periode mingguan/bulanan/musiman dengan reset
  • Challenge & turnamen: sprint belajar, kompetisi antar-BU, misi kolaboratif tim
  • Poin, lencana, level, & streak; handicap otomatis agar tim besar/kecil bersaing adil
  • Anti-gaming: deteksi pola tidak wajar; poin tertaut pada penyelesaian & kualitas, bukan klik
  • Pengakuan: shout-out otomatis, reward terhubung ke recognition resmi & profil
  • Notifikasi sosial: perubahan peringkat, pencapaian rekan, & ajakan challenge
  • Multi-level leaderboards: individual, team, & BU; weekly/monthly/seasonal periods with resets
  • Challenges & tournaments: learning sprints, cross-BU competitions, collaborative team missions
  • Points, badges, levels, & streaks; automatic handicaps so large/small teams compete fairly
  • Anti-gaming: detect abnormal patterns; points tied to completion & quality, not clicks
  • Recognition: automatic shout-outs, rewards linked to formal recognition & profiles
  • Social notifications: rank changes, peers' achievements, & challenge invites
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Challenge 'Sprint Belajar Q2' tinggal 12 hari. Tim Anda 'Sales Jakarta' naik ke peringkat #2 (1.240 poin) — hanya 150 poin di belakang 'Digital Team'. Selesaikan 3 modul lagi minggu ini untuk menyalip! HC AI menerapkan handicap +8% karena tim Anda lebih besar, agar adil.The 'Q2 Learning Sprint' challenge has 12 days left. Your team 'Sales Jakarta' rose to rank #2 (1,240 points) — just 150 points behind 'Digital Team'. Finish 3 more modules this week to overtake! HC AI applied an +8% handicap because your team is larger, for fairness."

Demo ilustratif — poin, peringkat & challenge disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — points, ranks & challenges are simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Rekomendasi Konten Lanjutan

Advanced Content Recommendations

Mesin rekomendasi yang transparan & bisa dijelaskan: HC AI menimbang banyak sinyal — skill gap, aktivitas rekan, tren, tujuan karier, & riwayat — lalu menjelaskan “mengapa direkomendasikan”. Umpan balik Anda (suka / tidak tertarik) melatih model secara real-time.

A transparent, explainable recommendation engine: HC AI weighs many signals — skill gap, peer activity, trends, career goals, & history — then explains “why recommended”. Your feedback (like / not interested) trains the model in real-time.

FR-LD-039PRD: FR-LXP-002 · FR-SMITH-003Mesin Rekomendasi Konten Multi-Sinyal & ExplainableMulti-Signal Explainable Content Recommendation EngineHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin rekomendasi belajar yang relevan & jelas alasannya, serta bisa saya koreksi (suka/tidak tertarik) agar makin tepatI want learning recommendations that are relevant & clearly explained, and that I can correct (like/not interested) so they get sharper sehingga saya menemukan konten paling berguna tanpa mencari manual, & percaya pada sarannya.so that I find the most useful content without manual searching, & trust the suggestions.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Rekomendasi diperbarui real-time; umpan balik langsung memengaruhi peringkat; refresh harianRecommendations update real-time; feedback instantly affects ranking; daily refresh
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Setiap rekomendasi wajib disertai alasan (explainable); konten wajib diprioritaskan; hormati privasiEvery recommendation must include a reason (explainable); mandatory content prioritized; respect privacy
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
CTR rekomendasi > 30%; penyelesaian dari rekomendasi naik; relevansi (rating) tinggiRecommendation CTR > 30%; completion from recommendations up; high relevance rating
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Rekomendasi multi-sinyal: skill gap, aktivitas rekan, tren, tujuan karier, riwayat, & kemiripan konten
  • Explainable: setiap saran menampilkan “mengapa” (sinyal yang memicu) & skor kecocokan
  • Hybrid: collaborative filtering + content-based + knowledge graph kompetensi
  • Umpan balik real-time: suka / tidak tertarik / sembunyikan → model menyesuaikan instan
  • Bobot sinyal dapat disetel; konten wajib & compliance tetap diprioritaskan
  • Anti-filter-bubble: selipkan eksplorasi & konten lintas-fungsi untuk pertumbuhan luas
  • Multi-signal recommendations: skill gap, peer activity, trends, career goals, history, & content similarity
  • Explainable: each suggestion shows “why” (the signals that fired) & a match score
  • Hybrid: collaborative filtering + content-based + a competency knowledge graph
  • Real-time feedback: like / not interested / hide → the model adjusts instantly
  • Tunable signal weights; mandatory & compliance content still prioritized
  • Anti-filter-bubble: inject exploration & cross-functional content for broad growth
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Kami merekomendasikan 'Advanced Data Analytics' (kecocokan 91%) karena: menutup skill gap utama Anda (95%), sedang tren di perusahaan (88%), & selaras tujuan karier (80%). Anda menandai 'tidak tertarik' pada konten serupa minggu lalu? HC AI menurunkan bobot tren & menaikkan relevansi peran. Semua saran selalu disertai alasan.We recommend 'Advanced Data Analytics' (91% match) because: it closes your top skill gap (95%), is trending company-wide (88%), & matches your career goal (80%). Marked similar content 'not interested' last week? HC AI lowered the trend weight & raised role relevance. Every suggestion always carries a reason."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Konten Buatan Karyawan & Berbagi Pengetahuan

Employee-Generated Content & Knowledge Sharing

Setiap karyawan bisa jadi pengajar: buat & bagikan tips, artikel how-to, video pendek, & micro-lesson. HC AI mengkurasi, memoderasi, & mempromosikan konten terbaik jadi materi resmi — mengubah pengetahuan tacit di lapangan menjadi aset belajar (lapisan 70% & 20%).

Every employee can teach: create & share tips, how-to articles, short videos, & micro-lessons. HC AI curates, moderates, & promotes the best content into official material — turning frontline tacit knowledge into learning assets (the 70% & 20% layers).

FR-LD-040PRD: FR-SOCIAL-004 · FR-LCMS-004Konten Buatan Pengguna (UGC) & Kurasi PengetahuanUser-Generated Content (UGC) & Knowledge CurationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (kontributor) & Content Owner (P1, P6),As an Employee (contributor) & Content Owner (P1, P6), saya ingin berbagi pengetahuan praktis (tips/artikel/video) dengan mudah, lalu yang terbaik dikurasi & dipromosikan jadi materi resmiI want to easily share practical knowledge (tips/articles/videos), then have the best curated & promoted into official material sehingga keahlian lapangan tersebar cepat, kontributor diakui, & perpustakaan belajar tumbuh organik.so that frontline expertise spreads fast, contributors are recognized, & the learning library grows organically.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Publikasi dalam menit; moderasi AI instan; kurasi ke resmi < 3 hari kerjaPublish in minutes; instant AI moderation; curation to official < 3 business days
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
UGC masuk sebagai “komunitas”; moderasi & cek akurasi sebelum dipromosikan jadi resmi/wajibUGC enters as “community”; moderation & accuracy check before promotion to official/mandatory
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Kontributor aktif naik; UGC dipromosikan/bulan; engagement & upvote tinggiActive contributors up; UGC promoted/month; high engagement & upvotes
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Pembuatan UGC mudah: tips, artikel how-to, video pendek, & micro-lesson dari ponsel/desktop
  • Moderasi AI: cek konten sensitif/keliru, deteksi duplikat, & saran perbaikan otomatis
  • Kurasi sosial: upvote, komentar, simpan; sinyal kualitas mengangkat konten terbaik
  • Promosi ke resmi: konten unggul dipromosikan jadi materi kurasi/wajib dengan kredit penulis
  • Pengakuan kontributor: lencana “Knowledge Sharer”, poin, & profil keahlian
  • Auto-tagging, transkripsi video, & terjemahan agar pengetahuan lintas-negara dapat ditemukan
  • Easy UGC creation: tips, how-to articles, short videos, & micro-lessons from mobile/desktop
  • AI moderation: check sensitive/incorrect content, detect duplicates, & auto-suggest improvements
  • Social curation: upvotes, comments, saves; quality signals surface the best content
  • Promotion to official: top content promoted to curated/mandatory material with author credit
  • Contributor recognition: “Knowledge Sharer” badges, points, & expertise profiles
  • Auto-tagging, video transcription, & translation so cross-country knowledge is discoverable
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Budi S. membagikan 'Tips cepat input data SAP' — 142 upvote & 1.2k views dalam seminggu. HC AI memverifikasi akurasi, menandai topik 'SAP/Finance', & merekomendasikan promosi jadi micro-lesson resmi. Budi mendapat lencana 'Knowledge Sharer' & poin pengakuan. 8 konten komunitas dipromosikan bulan ini.Budi S. shared 'Quick SAP data entry tips' — 142 upvotes & 1.2k views in a week. HC AI verified accuracy, tagged it 'SAP/Finance', & recommended promotion into an official micro-lesson. Budi earned a 'Knowledge Sharer' badge & recognition points. 8 community items were promoted this month."
