Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Manajemen Kebijakan & Atestasi

Policy Management & Attestation

Kelola kebijakan perusahaan (Code of Conduct, Anti-Suap, K3, Privasi Data), terbitkan versi, tugaskan ke audiens, & kumpulkan atestasi “baca & setuju” dari karyawan. HC AI melacak siapa sudah atestasi, mengelola siklus re-atestasi, & menjaga bukti kepatuhan siap-audit.

Manage company policies (Code of Conduct, Anti-Bribery, HSE, Data Privacy), publish versions, assign to audiences, & collect employee “read & acknowledge” attestations. HC AI tracks who has attested, manages re-attestation cycles, & keeps audit-ready compliance evidence.

FR-LD-041PRD: FR-COMPLIANCE-004 · FR-COMPLIANCE-002Manajemen Kebijakan, Atestasi & Re-atestasiPolicy Management, Attestation & Re-attestationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Compliance / Content Owner & Karyawan (P6, P1),As Compliance / Content Owner & Employee (P6, P1), saya ingin menerbitkan kebijakan & mengumpulkan atestasi “baca & setuju” dengan pelacakan otomatis & pengingat ke yang belumI want to publish policies & collect “read & acknowledge” attestations with automatic tracking & reminders to those pending sehingga setiap karyawan paham & menyetujui kebijakan terbaru, & bukti kepatuhan selalu siap audit.so that every employee understands & agrees to the latest policy, & compliance evidence is always audit-ready.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Atestasi dilacak real-time; reminder otomatis bertahap; re-atestasi tahunan / saat versi baruAttestation tracked real-time; staged auto-reminders; re-attestation yearly / on new version
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Versi baru → atestasi lama batal, wajib re-atestasi; lewat tenggat → eskalasi ke atasan/HCBPNew version → old attestation voided, re-attestation required; past deadline → escalate to manager/HCBP
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Atestasi kebijakan wajib 100% sebelum tenggat; jejak atestasi lengkap; nol temuan audit100% mandatory-policy attestation before deadline; complete attestation trail; zero audit findings
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Repositori kebijakan ber-versi: terbit, revisi, arsip; tautkan ke kursus/asesmen terkait
  • Atestasi “baca & setuju” dengan stempel waktu, versi, & tanda tangan elektronik
  • Penugasan ke audiens (semua/BU/peran); pelacakan rate atestasi real-time per kebijakan
  • Reminder otomatis bertahap ke yang belum; eskalasi ke atasan saat lewat tenggat
  • Re-atestasi otomatis saat versi baru atau siklus tahunan; atestasi lama tercatat di arsip
  • Bukti siap-audit: laporan siapa-atestasi-kapan-versi-berapa; ekspor untuk regulator
  • Versioned policy repository: publish, revise, archive; link to related courses/assessments
  • “Read & acknowledge” attestation with timestamp, version, & e-signature
  • Assignment to audiences (all/BU/role); real-time attestation-rate tracking per policy
  • Staged automatic reminders to those pending; escalation to managers past deadline
  • Automatic re-attestation on new version or yearly cycle; old attestations kept in archive
  • Audit-ready evidence: who-attested-when-which-version reports; regulator export
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Kebijakan 'Anti-Suap v2.0' diterbitkan — atestasi lama (v1.x) otomatis batal. 10.912 dari 12.400 karyawan (88%) sudah atestasi ulang. HC AI mengirim reminder ke 1.488 sisanya & mengeskalasi 142 yang lewat tenggat ke atasan. Bukti atestasi (siapa/kapan/versi) siap untuk audit.The 'Anti-Bribery v2.0' policy was published — old (v1.x) attestations auto-voided. 10,912 of 12,400 employees (88%) have re-attested. HC AI sent reminders to the remaining 1,488 & escalated 142 past deadline to managers. Attestation evidence (who/when/version) is audit-ready."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Benchmarking Eksekutif

Executive Benchmarking

Scorecard strategis L&D untuk BOD/CPO: bandingkan metrik kunci terhadap target internal, periode lalu, antar-BU, & benchmark industri. HC AI menyoroti kesenjangan, kekuatan, & rekomendasi tindakan tingkat eksekutif — bukti dampak L&D pada bisnis.

A strategic L&D scorecard for the BOD/CPO: compare key metrics against internal targets, prior periods, across BUs, & industry benchmarks. HC AI surfaces gaps, strengths, & executive-level action recommendations — proof of L&D's business impact.

FR-LD-042PRD: FR-ANALYTICS-006 · FR-ANALYTICS-001Benchmarking & Scorecard Eksekutif L&DExecutive L&D Benchmarking & ScorecardHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Director / CPO / Group CEO (P7),As an L&D Director / CPO / Group CEO (P7), saya ingin membandingkan kinerja L&D terhadap target, periode lalu, antar-BU, & industri dalam satu scorecard ringkasI want to compare L&D performance against targets, prior periods, across BUs, & industry in one concise scorecard sehingga keputusan strategis & alokasi investasi belajar berbasis bukti komparatif, bukan asumsi.so that strategic decisions & learning-investment allocation rest on comparative evidence, not assumptions.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Scorecard diperbarui bulanan; benchmark industri disegarkan triwulanan; siap untuk board packScorecard refreshed monthly; industry benchmarks refreshed quarterly; board-pack ready
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Metrik di bawah benchmark → rencana aksi; di atas → praktik baik di-scale; normalisasi antar-BUBelow-benchmark metrics → action plan; above → scale best practice; cross-BU normalization
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Mayoritas metrik di atas benchmark; peringkat industri naik; korelasi L&D–kinerja bisnis jelasMajority of metrics above benchmark; industry ranking up; clear L&D–business performance correlation
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Scorecard eksekutif: metrik kunci (penyelesaian, jam/karyawan, biaya/pembelajar, coverage skill, ROI, eNPS)
  • Benchmarking multi-basis: vs target internal, periode lalu (YoY), antar-BU, & industri
  • Normalisasi antar-BU (ukuran/jenis) untuk perbandingan adil; deteksi outlier & tren
  • Insight naratif tingkat eksekutif & rekomendasi aksi (tutup gap / scale praktik unggul)
  • Korelasi L&D dengan kinerja bisnis (produktivitas, retensi, kualitas, penjualan)
  • Ekspor board pack otomatis (PDF/slide) & alert saat metrik kunci menyimpang dari target
  • Executive scorecard: key metrics (completion, hours/employee, cost/learner, skill coverage, ROI, eNPS)
  • Multi-basis benchmarking: vs internal target, prior period (YoY), across BUs, & industry
  • Cross-BU normalization (size/type) for fair comparison; outlier & trend detection
  • Executive-level narrative insights & action recommendations (close gaps / scale top practices)
  • Correlation of L&D with business performance (productivity, retention, quality, sales)
  • Automatic board-pack export (PDF/slides) & alerts when key metrics deviate from target
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Q2: 4 dari 6 metrik kunci di atas benchmark industri. ROI L&D 215% (industri 140%) — terbaik di kelasnya. Perhatian: Skill Coverage 74% (target 80%) & jam belajar/karyawan 38 (target 40). HC AI merekomendasikan re-alokasi anggaran ke skill kritis. Peringkat industri: Top 12%. Board pack siap diekspor.Q2: 4 of 6 key metrics above industry benchmark. L&D ROI 215% (industry 140%) — best-in-class. Watch: Skill Coverage 74% (target 80%) & learning hours/employee 38 (target 40). HC AI recommends reallocating budget to critical skills. Industry ranking: Top 12%. Board pack ready to export."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Manajemen Lisensi & Vendor Konten

License & Content-Vendor Management

Kelola langganan vendor konten (LinkedIn Learning, Coursera, Udemy, provider lokal): lacak lisensi seat (terpakai/aktif), utilisasi, perpanjangan, & biaya. HC AI mendeteksi seat nganggur, menyarankan reclaim & optimasi, serta menjaga renewal tepat waktu — hemat biaya, maksimalkan nilai.

Manage content-vendor subscriptions (LinkedIn Learning, Coursera, Udemy, local providers): track seat licenses (assigned/active), utilization, renewals, & cost. HC AI detects idle seats, recommends reclaim & optimization, & keeps renewals on time — saving cost, maximizing value.

FR-LD-043PRD: FR-ADMIN-008 · FR-ADMIN-004Manajemen Lisensi Seat & Vendor Konten EksternalSeat License & External Content-Vendor ManagementHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Admin Sistem / L&D Manager (RBAC, P4),As a System Admin / L&D Manager (RBAC, P4), saya ingin mengelola lisensi seat & langganan vendor konten dengan visibilitas utilisasi, biaya, & perpanjangan, plus rekomendasi optimasiI want to manage seat licenses & content-vendor subscriptions with visibility into utilization, cost, & renewals, plus optimization recommendations sehingga tidak ada seat terbuang, biaya langganan optimal, & renewal tidak pernah terlewat.so that no seats are wasted, subscription cost is optimized, & renewals are never missed.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Utilisasi seat ter-update real-time; alert renewal H-60/H-30; review optimasi triwulananSeat utilization updated real-time; renewal alerts D-60/D-30; quarterly optimization review
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Utilisasi < 50% → reclaim/turunkan seat; mendekati pagu → tambah seat; renewal butuh approval budgetUtilization < 50% → reclaim/reduce seats; near cap → add seats; renewal needs budget approval
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Utilisasi seat > 75%; nol renewal terlewat; biaya/pembelajar aktif turun; ROI vendor jelasSeat utilization > 75%; zero missed renewals; cost/active learner down; clear vendor ROI
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Registry vendor & lisensi: seat total, terpakai, aktif/bulan, biaya/seat, tanggal & syarat perpanjangan
  • Pantau utilisasi real-time; deteksi seat nganggur & rekomendasi reclaim/realokasi otomatis
  • Alert renewal bertahap (H-60/H-30); cegah auto-renew yang tidak perlu; bandingkan vendor
  • Biaya/pembelajar aktif & ROI per vendor; negosiasi berbasis data saat perpanjangan
  • Provisioning/deprovisioning seat otomatis dari aktivitas & status karyawan (HRIS)
  • Integrasi katalog vendor (LTI/LRS) & pelaporan konsumsi untuk tata kelola anggaran
  • Vendor & license registry: total seats, assigned, active/month, cost/seat, renewal date & terms
  • Real-time utilization monitoring; idle-seat detection & automatic reclaim/realloc recommendations
  • Staged renewal alerts (D-60/D-30); prevent unnecessary auto-renew; compare vendors
  • Cost/active learner & per-vendor ROI; data-driven negotiation at renewal
  • Automatic seat provisioning/deprovisioning from activity & employee status (HRIS)
  • Vendor catalog integration (LTI/LRS) & consumption reporting for budget governance
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Coursera Business: 980 seat terpakai tapi hanya 540 aktif/bulan (utilisasi 36%). HC AI menyarankan reclaim 386 seat saat perpanjangan (sisakan 10% buffer) — hemat ~$18.500/tahun. Renewal jatuh tempo 20 hari lagi; saya siapkan paket negosiasi berbasis data konsumsi.Coursera Business: 980 seats assigned but only 540 active/month (36% utilization). HC AI recommends reclaiming 386 seats at renewal (keep a 10% buffer) — saving ~$18,500/year. Renewal is due in 20 days; I've prepared a negotiation pack based on consumption data."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Blended Journey & Kalender Belajar

Blended Journey & Learning Calendar

Jadwalkan perjalanan belajar blended dalam satu kalender: modul mandiri, sesi live, coaching dengan atasan, praktik, & asesmen — semua di waktu yang tepat. HC AI menyusun jadwal optimal, menghormati jam kerja/shift, menyeimbangkan beban, & menjaga ritme 70:20:10.

Schedule a blended learning journey in one calendar: self-paced modules, live sessions, manager coaching, practice, & assessments — all at the right time. HC AI builds an optimal schedule, respects work/shift hours, balances load, & keeps a 70:20:10 rhythm.

FR-LD-044PRD: FR-DELIVERY-012 · FR-INTEGRATION-003Kalender Belajar & Orkestrasi Blended JourneyLearning Calendar & Blended Journey OrchestrationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin semua aktivitas belajar blended (modul, live, coaching, praktik, asesmen) terjadwal di satu kalender dengan pengingat & penjadwalan otomatisI want all blended learning activities (modules, live, coaching, practice, assessments) scheduled in one calendar with reminders & auto-scheduling sehingga saya belajar dengan ritme teratur, tidak menumpuk di akhir, & tetap seimbang dengan pekerjaan.so that I learn at a steady rhythm, don't cram at the end, & stay balanced with work.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Auto-jadwal saat enroll path; sinkron ke kalender pribadi (Outlook/Google); reminder otomatisAuto-scheduled on path enroll; sync to personal calendar (Outlook/Google); auto reminders
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Hormati jam kerja/shift & quiet hours; seimbangkan beban; sesi live & coaching butuh slot bersamaRespect work/shift hours & quiet hours; balance load; live & coaching need shared slots
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Penyelesaian on-time naik; kepatuhan jadwal > 80%; cramming & deadline terlewat turunOn-time completion up; schedule adherence > 80%; cramming & missed deadlines down
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Kalender belajar terpadu: modul mandiri, sesi live, coaching, praktik, & asesmen dalam satu tampilan
  • Auto-scheduling cerdas: distribusikan aktivitas sepanjang waktu, hindari menumpuk, hormati jam kerja
  • Sinkron dua arah ke kalender pribadi (Outlook/Google) & blok waktu fokus belajar
  • Penyeimbang beban & ritme 70:20:10; reschedule otomatis saat bentrok atau terlewat
  • Reminder & nudge tepat waktu; tampilan harian/mingguan/journey dengan progres blended
  • Koordinasi slot bersama untuk sesi live & coaching (atasan/mentor) lewat ketersediaan
  • Unified learning calendar: self-paced modules, live sessions, coaching, practice, & assessments in one view
  • Smart auto-scheduling: distribute activities over time, avoid cramming, respect work hours
  • Two-way sync to personal calendars (Outlook/Google) & focus-time blocking
  • Load balancing & 70:20:10 rhythm; automatic rescheduling on conflicts or misses
  • Timely reminders & nudges; daily/weekly/journey views with blended progress
  • Shared-slot coordination for live & coaching sessions (manager/mentor) via availability
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda enroll 'Leadership Path' (6 minggu). HC AI menjadwalkan: 2 modul mandiri/minggu (Sen & Rab pagi), 1 sesi live (Sel), coaching dengan atasan tiap Jum, & praktik akhir minggu — total ~3 jam/minggu, menghindari jadwal padat Anda. Tersinkron ke Outlook + reminder H-1. Beban seimbang sesuai 70:20:10.You enrolled in 'Leadership Path' (6 weeks). HC AI scheduled: 2 self-paced modules/week (Mon & Wed mornings), 1 live session (Tue), manager coaching every Fri, & weekend practice — ~3 hours/week, avoiding your busy slots. Synced to Outlook + D-1 reminders. Load balanced per 70:20:10."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Goal & Habit Belajar Pribadi

Personal Goal & Habit Tracker

Tetapkan tujuan belajar pribadi (SMART) & bangun kebiasaan harian: belajar 30 menit/hari, baca artikel, refleksi. HC AI melacak progres, menjaga streak, & memberi nudge coaching agar Anda konsisten — pembelajaran jadi kebiasaan, bukan kewajiban.

Set personal (SMART) learning goals & build daily habits: learn 30 min/day, read articles, reflect. HC AI tracks progress, keeps streaks, & gives coaching nudges to keep you consistent — making learning a habit, not an obligation.

FR-LD-045PRD: FR-LXP-003 · FR-SMITH-005Pelacak Goal Pribadi, Habit & Streak BelajarPersonal Goal, Habit & Learning Streak TrackerHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin menetapkan tujuan belajar pribadi & membangun kebiasaan harian dengan pelacakan streak & nudge yang memotivasiI want to set personal learning goals & build daily habits with streak tracking & motivating nudges sehingga belajar jadi rutinitas yang melekat, terukur, & berkelanjutan — bukan sekadar saat ditugaskan.so that learning becomes a sticky, measurable, sustainable routine — not just when assigned.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Progres & streak ter-update real-time; nudge harian saat waktu optimal; review goal mingguanProgress & streak update real-time; daily nudges at optimal times; weekly goal review
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Goal harus SMART & selaras IDP; streak putus → nudge pemulihan lembut; privasi data pribadi dijagaGoals must be SMART & IDP-aligned; broken streak → gentle recovery nudge; personal-data privacy respected
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Habit aktif/karyawan naik; streak rata-rata naik; penyelesaian goal pribadi tinggiActive habits/employee up; average streak up; high personal-goal completion
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Penetapan goal SMART pribadi yang selaras IDP, skill gap, & aspirasi karier
  • Pelacak habit harian (mis. belajar 30 menit, baca artikel, refleksi) dengan grid mingguan & streak
  • Nudge & coaching cerdas pada waktu optimal; pemulihan streak yang lembut bila putus
  • Milestone, lencana, & perayaan pencapaian; visual progres goal & konsistensi
  • Saran aktivitas kecil (microlearning) untuk menjaga ritme & momentum belajar
  • Privasi: data goal & habit milik karyawan; agregat anonim untuk insight tim
  • Personal SMART goal-setting aligned to IDP, skill gaps, & career aspirations
  • Daily habit tracker (e.g. learn 30 min, read an article, reflect) with a weekly grid & streaks
  • Smart nudges & coaching at optimal times; gentle streak recovery when broken
  • Milestones, badges, & achievement celebration; visual goal progress & consistency
  • Small activity suggestions (microlearning) to sustain rhythm & learning momentum
  • Privacy: goal & habit data belong to the employee; anonymous aggregates for team insight
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Streak belajar Anda 5 hari — hebat! Goal 'Selesaikan Leadership Path' sudah 65% (tenggat 4 minggu, di jalur). Habit 'belajar 30 menit/hari' konsisten 4 dari 5 hari kerja. HC AI menyarankan 1 microlearning 10 menit sore ini untuk menjaga streak & mencapai milestone mingguan. Tetap semangat!Your learning streak is 5 days — great! The 'Finish Leadership Path' goal is 65% (4-week deadline, on track). The 'learn 30 min/day' habit is consistent 4 of 5 workdays. HC AI suggests one 10-minute microlearning this afternoon to keep the streak & hit your weekly milestone. Keep it up!"

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Event Komunitas & Learning Circle

Community Events & Learning Circles

Belajar bersama: learning circle, lunch & learn, webinar, guild komunitas praktik, & hackathon belajar. HC AI merekomendasikan event relevan, mengelola RSVP & kapasitas, & menumbuhkan komunitas belajar lintas-fungsi — memperkuat lapisan 20% (sosial) dari 70:20:10.

Learn together: learning circles, lunch & learns, webinars, community-of-practice guilds, & learning hackathons. HC AI recommends relevant events, manages RSVPs & capacity, & grows cross-functional learning communities — reinforcing the 20% (social) layer of 70:20:10.

FR-LD-046PRD: FR-SOCIAL-005 · FR-ADMIN-007Event Komunitas, Learning Circle & Community of PracticeCommunity Events, Learning Circles & Communities of PracticeHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & Spesialis L&D (P1, P4),As an Employee & L&D Specialist (P1, P4), saya ingin menemukan & mengikuti event belajar komunitas (circle, lunch & learn, guild) & menjadi bagian komunitas praktik, atau menyelenggarakan sendiriI want to discover & join community learning events (circles, lunch & learns, guilds) & be part of communities of practice, or host my own sehingga belajar terasa sosial & kolaboratif, pengetahuan mengalir antar-tim, & budaya belajar tumbuh.so that learning feels social & collaborative, knowledge flows across teams, & a learning culture grows.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Event reguler (mingguan/bulanan); RSVP & reminder otomatis; sinkron ke kalender belajarRegular events (weekly/monthly); auto RSVP & reminders; sync to the learning calendar
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Kapasitas penuh → waitlist; event butuh host & moderasi; rekaman & ringkasan pasca-eventFull capacity → waitlist; events need a host & moderation; post-event recording & summary
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Partisipasi event > 40%; komunitas aktif tumbuh; jam belajar sosial (20%) naikEvent participation > 40%; active communities grow; social learning hours (20%) up
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Direktori event belajar: learning circle, lunch & learn, webinar, guild, & hackathon
  • Rekomendasi event relevan berbasis minat, skill gap, & peran; RSVP & manajemen kapasitas/waitlist
  • Komunitas praktik (CoP): gabung/keluar, diskusi, berbagi sumber daya, & pengakuan kontributor
  • Self-service hosting: karyawan menyelenggarakan event sendiri dengan moderasi & template
  • Pasca-event: rekaman, ringkasan AI, materi, & jam belajar sosial tercatat ke transkrip (20%)
  • Sinkron ke kalender belajar & notifikasi; nudge untuk ikut event yang relevan
  • Learning-event directory: learning circles, lunch & learns, webinars, guilds, & hackathons
  • Relevant event recommendations by interest, skill gap, & role; RSVP & capacity/waitlist management
  • Communities of practice (CoP): join/leave, discuss, share resources, & recognize contributors
  • Self-service hosting: employees host their own events with moderation & templates
  • Post-event: recording, AI summary, materials, & social-learning hours logged to transcript (20%)
  • Sync to the learning calendar & notifications; nudges to join relevant events
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Berdasarkan minat 'Data Storytelling' Anda, HC AI merekomendasikan Learning Circle Rabu 14:00 (14/20 kursi). Anda juga cocok untuk 'Komunitas Data & Analytics' (248 anggota). RSVP otomatis tersinkron ke kalender + reminder H-1. Setelah event, rekaman & ringkasan AI tersimpan, & 1 jam belajar sosial masuk transkrip Anda.Based on your 'Data Storytelling' interest, HC AI recommends the Wed 14:00 Learning Circle (14/20 seats). You're also a fit for the 'Data & Analytics Community' (248 members). RSVP auto-syncs to your calendar + D-1 reminder. After the event, the recording & AI summary are saved, & 1 social-learning hour is logged to your transcript."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Micro-Mentoring On-Demand

On-Demand Micro-Mentoring

Butuh bantuan cepat? Ajukan pertanyaan & HC AI mencocokkan Anda dengan ahli internal yang online untuk sesi singkat 15 menit — “office hours” instan lintas topik. Pengetahuan mengalir tepat saat dibutuhkan (just-in-time), memperkuat lapisan 20% & 70%.

Need quick help? Ask a question & HC AI matches you with an online internal expert for a short 15-minute session — instant cross-topic “office hours”. Knowledge flows exactly when needed (just-in-time), reinforcing the 20% & 70% layers.

FR-LD-047PRD: FR-DELIVERY-013 · FR-SOCIAL-002Micro-Mentoring On-Demand & Bantuan Ahli InstanOn-Demand Micro-Mentoring & Instant Expert HelpHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin bantuan ahli cepat (sesi 15 menit) saat menemui kendala kerja/belajar, bukan menunggu kursus terjadwalI want quick expert help (15-min sessions) when I hit a work/learning blocker, not wait for a scheduled course sehingga kendala terurai segera, belajar terjadi saat momen kebutuhan, & produktivitas tetap jalan.so that blockers are unblocked immediately, learning happens at the moment of need, & productivity keeps flowing.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Pencocokan ahli < 1 menit; sesi singkat 15 menit; tersedia jam kerja; rekam & ringkas otomatisExpert matching < 1 min; short 15-min sessions; available in work hours; auto record & summary
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Cocokkan ke ahli online sesuai topik & beban; eskalasi ke mentor formal bila butuh mendalamMatch to an online expert by topic & load; escalate to a formal mentor if depth is needed
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Waktu unblock turun; kepuasan sesi > 4,5; jam berbagi pengetahuan naik; reuse jawaban ke KBTime-to-unblock down; session satisfaction > 4.5; knowledge-sharing hours up; answers reused into KB
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Ajukan pertanyaan → HC AI cocokkan ke ahli internal online berdasarkan topik, keahlian, & ketersediaan
  • Sesi micro 15 menit instan (chat/video); antrean ringan & status online ahli real-time
  • Pencocokan cerdas mempertimbangkan beban ahli, rating, waktu respons, & relevansi topik
  • Eskalasi ke mentor formal/coaching bila topik butuh pendalaman jangka panjang
  • Pasca-sesi: ringkasan AI, rating, & jawaban berkualitas diangkat jadi artikel knowledge base
  • Pengakuan ahli: poin & lencana “Helper”; jam micro-mentoring tercatat sebagai kontribusi
  • Ask a question → HC AI matches an online internal expert by topic, expertise, & availability
  • Instant 15-min micro-sessions (chat/video); lightweight queue & real-time expert online status
  • Smart matching considering expert load, rating, response time, & topic relevance
  • Escalate to a formal mentor/coaching when the topic needs long-term depth
  • Post-session: AI summary, rating, & quality answers promoted into knowledge-base articles
  • Expert recognition: points & “Helper” badges; micro-mentoring hours logged as contribution
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda bertanya soal ‘rumus VLOOKUP error’. HC AI menemukan Budi S. (ahli Excel, online, respons ~3 menit, rating 4,9) — terhubung dalam 40 detik untuk sesi 15 menit. Setelah sesi, ringkasan & solusi disimpan ke knowledge base agar rekan lain bisa pakai, & Budi dapat poin ‘Helper’.You asked about a ‘VLOOKUP formula error’. HC AI found Budi S. (Excel expert, online, ~3-min response, 4.9 rating) — connected in 40 seconds for a 15-min session. Afterward, the summary & solution are saved to the knowledge base for others to reuse, & Budi earns ‘Helper’ points."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Mobile Learning Lanjutan

Advanced Mobile Learning

Belajar tidak berhenti saat sinyal hilang. Unduh microlearning untuk akses offline (mode pesawat / area pabrik bersinyal lemah), progres tersimpan lokal lalu sinkron otomatis saat kembali online, & notifikasi push cerdas dari HC AI menjaga ritme belajar — semua dioptimalkan untuk layar HP.

Learning doesn't stop when the signal drops. Download microlearning for offline access (airplane mode / low-signal plant areas), progress is stored locally then auto-syncs once back online, & smart HC AI push notifications keep the learning rhythm — all optimized for the phone screen.

FR-LD-048PRD: FR-MOBILE-LMS-003 · FR-DELIVERY-008Mobile Learning Lanjutan: Offline Sync, Push & MicrolearningAdvanced Mobile: Offline Sync, Push & MicrolearningHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan lapangan/pabrik (Pembelajar, P1),As a field/plant Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin microlearning yang bisa diakses offline di HP, sinkron otomatis saat tersambung lagi, & pengingat push yang relevanI want microlearning I can access offline on my phone, that auto-syncs when reconnected, with relevant push reminders sehingga saya tetap belajar di lokasi bersinyal lemah tanpa kehilangan progres & tidak ketinggalan kewajiban.so that I keep learning in low-signal locations without losing progress & never miss an obligation.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Pra-unduh sebelum perjalanan; sinkron dua arah saat online; microlearning 3–6 menit; push dengan frequency cappingPre-download before trips; two-way sync when online; 3–6 min microlearning; push with frequency capping
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
HC AI pra-unduh modul yang relevan dgn lokasi/jadwal; pilih waktu kirim push optimal; resolusi konflik sinkron amanHC AI pre-downloads modules relevant to location/schedule; picks optimal push time; safe sync-conflict resolution
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Penyelesaian offline naik; sukses sinkron > 99%; CTR push; DAU/retensi mobileOffline completions up; sync success > 99%; push CTR; mobile DAU/retention
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Unduh modul microlearning untuk akses penuh offline (mode pesawat / area sinyal lemah)
  • Progres & penyelesaian tersimpan lokal saat offline, lalu sinkron otomatis dua arah saat kembali online
  • Microlearning bite-sized (3–6 menit) dioptimalkan untuk layar & sentuhan HP
  • Notifikasi push cerdas: pengingat streak, modul wajib jatuh tempo, & rekomendasi dari HC AI
  • HC AI memilih waktu kirim push optimal & menerapkan frequency capping agar tidak spam
  • Sinkronisasi konflik-aman; bookmark, catatan, & posisi terakhir ikut tersinkron lintas perangkat
  • Download microlearning modules for full offline access (airplane mode / low-signal areas)
  • Progress & completions stored locally offline, then auto two-way sync once back online
  • Bite-sized microlearning (3–6 min) optimized for the phone screen & touch
  • Smart push notifications: streak reminders, due mandatory modules, & HC AI recommendations
  • HC AI picks the optimal push send-time & applies frequency capping to avoid spam
  • Conflict-safe sync; bookmarks, notes, & last position sync across devices
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda dijadwalkan ke pabrik Cikande (sinyal lemah) besok. Saya pra-unduh 3 modul Keselamatan (14 menit total) ke HP Anda — selesaikan offline, progres otomatis tersinkron saat kembali ke kantor. Pengingat push streak saya jadwalkan pukul 19:00, waktu Anda biasanya aktif.You're scheduled to visit the Cikande plant (low signal) tomorrow. I've pre-downloaded 3 Safety modules (14 min total) to your phone — finish them offline, progress auto-syncs when you're back at the office. I've scheduled the streak push reminder for 7 PM, when you're usually active."

Antrean SinkronSync Queue
StreakStreak
Push TerkirimPush Sent

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

HC AI Study Buddy

HC AI Study Buddy

Teman belajar AI yang siap 24/7. Tanyakan apa pun tentang materi kursus dalam bahasa sehari-hari — HC AI menjawab dengan jawaban yang di-grounding ke materi resmi (lengkap sitasi), memberi contoh & analogi, membuat kuis latihan, & flashcard otomatis. Bila jawaban tak ada di materi, HC AI mengakuinya, bukan mengarang.

An AI study buddy available 24/7. Ask anything about course content in plain language — HC AI answers grounded in the official material (with citations), gives examples & analogies, builds practice quizzes, & auto flashcards. When the answer isn't in the material, HC AI admits it rather than hallucinating.

FR-LD-049PRD: FR-SMITH-002 · FR-LXP-001AI Study Buddy: Tanya-Jawab Konten PercakapanAI Study Buddy: Conversational Content Q&AHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin bertanya tentang materi kursus dalam bahasa alami & mendapat jawaban yang di-grounding ke materi, plus contoh, kuis, & flashcardI want to ask about course material in natural language & get answers grounded in the material, plus examples, quizzes, & flashcards sehingga saya paham lebih cepat tanpa menunggu instruktur, & belajar mandiri kapan saja.so that I understand faster without waiting for an instructor, & self-learn anytime.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Jawaban percakapan instan; tersedia 24/7 di web & mobile; grounding ke materi kursus aktifInstant conversational answers; available 24/7 on web & mobile; grounded to the active course material
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Jawab dari materi (RAG) bila ada; bila tidak, akui & arahkan ke sumber/ahli; sesuaikan kedalamanAnswer from material (RAG) if present; if not, admit & route to source/expert; adapt depth
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Waktu-paham turun; pertanyaan terjawab mandiri; skor kuis naik; akurasi grounded > 95%Time-to-understand down; self-served questions; quiz scores up; grounded accuracy > 95%
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Tanya-jawab percakapan atas konten kursus (RAG) — jawaban di-grounding ke materi resmi dengan sitasi
  • Jelaskan konsep di berbagai tingkat (sederhana → mendalam) sesuai pemahaman pembelajar
  • Buat contoh, analogi, kuis latihan, & flashcard otomatis dari materi
  • Bila jawaban tak ada di materi, HC AI mengakuinya (anti-halusinasi) & mengarahkan ke sumber/ahli
  • Mengingat konteks percakapan & progres; menyesuaikan kedalaman & bahasa jawaban
  • Jejak pertanyaan jadi sinyal untuk perbaikan konten & deteksi celah pemahaman
  • Conversational Q&A over course content (RAG) — answers grounded in official material with citations
  • Explain concepts at multiple levels (simple → deep) to match the learner's understanding
  • Auto-generate examples, analogies, practice quizzes, & flashcards from the material
  • If the answer isn't in the material, HC AI admits it (anti-hallucination) & routes to source/expert
  • Remembers conversation context & progress; adapts answer depth & language
  • Question trails become signals for content improvement & understanding-gap detection
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda bertanya ‘apa itu VLOOKUP?’ di modul Excel untuk Analis. Jawab: VLOOKUP mencari nilai di kolom kiri tabel lalu mengembalikan nilai dari kolom yang Anda tentukan. Sumber: Modul 2 — Pencarian Data. Mau saya buatkan contoh, kuis singkat, atau flashcard? Saya juga melihat banyak rekan bertanya hal ini — saya tandai untuk tim konten.You asked ‘what is VLOOKUP?’ in the Excel for Analysts module. Answer: VLOOKUP searches the left column of a table then returns a value from a column you specify. Source: Module 2 — Data Lookup. Want an example, a short quiz, or a flashcard? I also see many peers ask this — I've flagged it for the content team."

Akurasi GroundedGrounded Accuracy
Flashcard DibuatFlashcards Made
Topik TercakupTopics Covered

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Dampak Belajar & Korelasi Performa

Learning Impact & Performance Correlation

Apakah pelatihan benar-benar menggerakkan kinerja? HC AI mengaitkan data belajar (penyelesaian, jam, skill) dengan KPI bisnis nyata (penjualan, produktivitas, insiden K3, kualitas) — membandingkan kelompok terlatih vs kontrol, menghitung korelasi & uplift, & memisahkan sebab dari kebetulan. L&D pun bisa membuktikan dampak, bukan sekadar aktivitas.

Does training actually move performance? HC AI correlates learning data (completions, hours, skills) with real business KPIs (sales, productivity, OHS incidents, quality) — comparing trained vs control cohorts, computing correlation & uplift, & separating cause from coincidence. So L&D can prove impact, not just activity.

FR-LD-050PRD: FR-ANALYTICS-007 · FR-ADMIN-004Korelasi Dampak Belajar ↔ Performa KerjaLearning-Impact ↔ Job-Performance CorrelationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai L&D Manager / Pimpinan HC (P5),As an L&D Manager / HC Leader (P5), saya ingin melihat korelasi terukur antara program belajar & KPI kinerja kerja, dengan pembanding kelompok kontrolI want to see measurable correlation between learning programs & job-performance KPIs, with a control-group comparison sehingga saya bisa membuktikan dampak L&D, fokuskan investasi ke program berdampak tinggi, & hentikan yang tidak.so that I can prove L&D impact, focus investment on high-impact programs, & cut the ones that don't work.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Analisis korelasi bergulir; jeda dampak 1–6 bulan; pembanding kohort terlatih vs kontrol; refresh bulananRolling correlation analysis; 1–6 month impact lag; trained-vs-control cohort comparison; monthly refresh
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Mana program berkorelasi kuat (r≥0,6) & layak diperluas; mana yang lemah & perlu didesain ulang/dihentikanWhich programs correlate strongly (r≥0.6) & deserve scaling; which are weak & need redesign/retirement
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Uplift performa kohort terlatih; korelasi r; ROI L&D; rasio program berdampak tinggiTrained-cohort performance uplift; correlation r; L&D ROI; high-impact program ratio
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Mengaitkan data belajar (penyelesaian, jam, skill) dengan KPI kinerja dari HRIS/sistem bisnis
  • Membandingkan kohort terlatih vs kelompok kontrol untuk mengukur uplift performa bersih
  • Menghitung korelasi (r) & tingkat keyakinan; memodelkan jeda dampak (1–6 bulan)
  • Memisahkan korelasi dari sebab: menandai faktor pengganggu & menyarankan uji terkontrol
  • Mengurutkan program dari dampak tertinggi ke terendah untuk keputusan investasi L&D
  • Narasi insight otomatis & rekomendasi: perluas, desain ulang, atau hentikan program
  • Correlates learning data (completions, hours, skills) with performance KPIs from HRIS/business systems
  • Compares trained cohorts vs control groups to measure net performance uplift
  • Computes correlation (r) & confidence level; models the impact lag (1–6 months)
  • Separates correlation from causation: flags confounders & suggests controlled trials
  • Ranks programs from highest to lowest impact for L&D investment decisions
  • Auto insight narrative & recommendations: scale, redesign, or retire a program
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Penyelesaian ‘Sales Mastery’ berkorelasi kuat (r=0,72) dengan pencapaian target. Sales yang menyelesaikan program mencapai 118% target vs 96% kelompok kontrol — uplift +23% pada bulan ke-6. Confidence tinggi. Rekomendasi: perluas ke 4 cabang berkinerja rendah; perkiraan tambahan revenue Rp 2,1 M/kuartal.‘Sales Mastery’ completion correlates strongly (r=0.72) with target attainment. Reps who finished it hit 118% of target vs 96% for the control group — +23% uplift at month 6. High confidence. Recommendation: scale to 4 low-performing branches; est. +Rp 2.1B revenue/quarter."

Analisis Dampak Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Impact Analysis (Demo)

Korelasi (r)Correlation (r)
Uplift PerformaPerformance Uplift
Program BerdampakHigh-Impact Programs
KeyakinanConfidence

Demo ilustratif — data korelasi & kohort disimulasikan di browser; korelasi bukan kausalitas.Illustrative demo — correlation & cohort data simulated in the browser; correlation is not causation.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

AI Penasihat Karier & Skill

AI Career & Skill Advisor

Mau ke mana karier Anda? HC AI memetakan jalur karier yang mungkin, membandingkan skill Anda saat ini dengan yang dibutuhkan peran target, lalu menyusun rencana belajar untuk menutup celah — lengkap dengan skor kesiapan & estimasi waktu. Pengembangan karier jadi terarah, bukan menebak.

Where is your career headed? HC AI maps possible career paths, compares your current skills with a target role's requirements, then builds a learning plan to close the gaps — with a readiness score & time estimate. Career growth becomes directed, not guesswork.

FR-LD-051PRD: FR-SMITH-003 · FR-LXP-001AI Penasihat Karier: Analisis Celah Skill & Jalur KarierAI Career Advisor: Skill-Gap & Career-Path AnalysisHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin tahu jalur karier yang mungkin, celah skill menuju peran target, & rencana belajar untuk menutupnyaI want to know my possible career paths, the skill gaps to a target role, & a learning plan to close them sehingga saya bisa berkembang dengan arah jelas & melihat kemajuan kesiapan saya secara nyata.so that I can grow with a clear direction & see my readiness progress tangibly.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Pemetaan karier on-demand; skor kesiapan diperbarui saat skill bertambah; tinjauan tiap kuartalOn-demand career mapping; readiness recalculated as skills grow; quarterly review
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Peran mana paling cocok & realistis; skill prioritas mana yang menutup celah terbesar duluWhich role fits best & realistically; which priority skill closes the biggest gap first
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Mobilitas internal naik; kesiapan suksesi; waktu isi posisi turun; retensi talentaInternal mobility up; succession readiness; time-to-fill down; talent retention
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Memetakan jalur karier yang mungkin (vertikal & lateral) dari peran & skill Anda saat ini
  • Membandingkan profil skill Anda dengan kebutuhan peran target — menyorot celah per skill
  • Menghitung skor kesiapan peran & memperbaruinya saat skill bertambah
  • Menyusun rencana belajar prioritas: kursus mana menutup celah terbesar lebih dulu
  • Estimasi waktu & effort untuk siap; mempertimbangkan skill adjacent & minat
  • Mengaitkan ke peluang internal (lowongan, gigs, mentoring) yang relevan dengan tujuan
  • Maps possible career paths (vertical & lateral) from your current role & skills
  • Compares your skill profile against a target role's requirements — highlights per-skill gaps
  • Computes a role-readiness score & updates it as your skills grow
  • Builds a prioritized learning plan: which course closes the biggest gap first
  • Estimates time & effort to be ready; considers adjacent skills & interests
  • Links to relevant internal opportunities (openings, gigs, mentoring) aligned to the goal
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Untuk menuju ‘Data Analyst Senior’, Anda 68% siap. Celah terbesar: Visualisasi Data (Lv 2/4) & Storytelling Data (Lv 1/3). Rencana: 2 kursus (~24 jam) menutup keduanya & menaikkan kesiapan ke 92%. Saya juga melihat 1 lowongan internal & 1 mentor yang cocok dengan tujuan ini.To reach ‘Senior Data Analyst’, you're 68% ready. Biggest gaps: Data Visualization (Lv 2/4) & Data Storytelling (Lv 1/3). Plan: 2 courses (~24 hrs) close both & lift readiness to 92%. I also see 1 internal opening & 1 mentor aligned to this goal."

Peran saat ini:Current role: Analis Data JuniorJunior Data Analyst 🎯 Peran target:Target role:

Demo ilustratif — profil skill, peran, & rencana disimulasikan di browser. Selesaikan kursus untuk melihat kesiapan naik.Illustrative demo — skill profile, roles, & plan simulated in the browser. Complete a course to watch readiness rise.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Versi Konten & Lokalisasi

Content Versioning & Localization

Konten belajar terus berubah — HC AI menjaga riwayat versi tiap modul (lihat perubahan, publikasikan, rollback) & mengelola lokalisasi ke banyak bahasa dengan bantuan terjemahan AI. Satu sumber kebenaran, terkendali, & bisa diakses tiap karyawan dalam bahasanya.

Learning content keeps changing — HC AI keeps a version history per module (view changes, publish, rollback) & manages localization into many languages with AI translation. One source of truth, controlled, & reachable by every employee in their own language.

FR-LD-052PRD: FR-LCMS-004 · FR-LCMS-002Manajemen Versi Konten & Lokalisasi Multi-bahasaContent Version Management & Multi-language LocalizationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D / Content Author (P3),As an L&D Specialist / Content Author (P3), saya ingin riwayat versi terkendali untuk tiap konten & alur lokalisasi multi-bahasa dengan bantuan AII want controlled version history per content & an AI-assisted multi-language localization flow sehingga perubahan aman (bisa rollback), audit jelas, & setiap karyawan belajar dalam bahasanya.so that changes are safe (rollback-able), audit is clear, & every employee learns in their language.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Versi tersimpan tiap perubahan; publikasi terkontrol; terjemahan AT + tinjauan manusia; rollback instanVersion saved per change; controlled publishing; MT + human review; instant rollback
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Versi mana yang aktif/dipublikasi; bahasa mana diprioritaskan sesuai populasi karyawanWhich version is live/published; which language to prioritize by employee population
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
% konten terlokalisasi; waktu update ↓; insiden versi salah → 0; cakupan bahasa% content localized; update time ↓; wrong-version incidents → 0; language coverage
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Menyimpan riwayat versi tiap modul: lihat perubahan antar-versi, bandingkan, & rollback aman
  • Alur publikasi terkontrol: draft → tinjauan → publikasi; hanya satu versi aktif per saat
  • Lokalisasi multi-bahasa: terjemahan mesin AI sebagai draft + tinjauan penutur asli
  • Melacak status & persentase lokalisasi per bahasa; menyorot konten yang belum diterjemahkan
  • Sinkron perubahan: saat master diperbarui, HC AI menandai terjemahan yang perlu di-refresh
  • Memprioritaskan bahasa sesuai populasi karyawan & lokasi pabrik untuk dampak maksimal
  • Keeps a version history per module: view inter-version changes, compare, & safe rollback
  • Controlled publishing flow: draft → review → publish; only one live version at a time
  • Multi-language localization: AI machine translation as draft + native-speaker review
  • Tracks localization status & percentage per language; flags untranslated content
  • Change sync: when the master updates, HC AI flags translations needing a refresh
  • Prioritizes languages by employee population & plant location for maximum reach
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Modul ‘Keselamatan Pabrik’ punya versi baru v2.0 (draft). Perubahan: prosedur LOTO diperbarui sesuai regulasi terbaru. Setelah Anda publikasi, terjemahan EN & Jawa akan saya tandai ‘perlu refresh’. Bahasa Sunda belum ada — 1.200 karyawan pabrik Cikande memakainya; saya sarankan prioritaskan.The ‘Plant Safety’ module has a new v2.0 (draft). Change: the LOTO procedure was updated to the latest regulation. Once you publish, I'll flag the EN & Javanese translations as ‘needs refresh’. Sundanese is missing — 1,200 Cikande plant workers use it; I suggest prioritizing it."

Versi AktifLive Version
Bahasa TercakupLanguages Covered
Menunggu ReviewAwaiting Review
TerlokalisasiLocalized

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Kredensial Digital Terverifikasi

Verifiable Digital Credentials

Sertifikat yang tidak bisa dipalsukan. Setiap kredensial terbit dengan ID unik & sidik (hash) integritas yang dapat diverifikasi siapa pun secara publik — tanpa menghubungi HR. HC AI mengelola penerbitan, pencabutan, & portal verifikasi instan untuk perekrut, auditor, & mitra.

Certificates that can't be faked. Every credential is issued with a unique ID & integrity hash that anyone can verify publicly — without contacting HR. HC AI manages issuance, revocation, & an instant verification portal for recruiters, auditors, & partners.

FR-LD-053PRD: FR-DELIVERY-007 · FR-INTEGRATION-004Penerbitan & Verifikasi Publik Kredensial DigitalDigital Credential Issuance & Public VerificationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & pihak ketiga pemverifikasi (P1/P7),As an Employee & a third-party verifier (P1/P7), saya ingin kredensial digital yang dapat diverifikasi secara publik lewat ID/QR & tahan pemalsuanI want a digital credential that's publicly verifiable via ID/QR & tamper-proof sehingga keaslian pencapaian bisa dibuktikan instan oleh siapa pun, & yang dicabut langsung tidak valid.so that achievement authenticity can be proven instantly by anyone, & revoked ones become invalid immediately.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Terbit otomatis saat completion; verifikasi publik < 2 detik; pencabutan berlaku seketikaAuto-issued on completion; public verification < 2s; revocation takes effect instantly
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Kredensial valid, dicabut, atau tidak ditemukan; hash integritas cocok atau dipalsukanCredential valid, revoked, or not found; integrity hash matches or is tampered
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Pemalsuan sertifikat → 0; waktu verifikasi pihak ketiga ↓; adopsi kredensial digitalCertificate fraud → 0; third-party verification time ↓; digital-credential adoption
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Menerbitkan kredensial digital dengan ID unik & hash integritas (verifiable credential) tiap completion
  • Menyediakan portal verifikasi publik: cek ID/QR → valid, dicabut, atau tidak ditemukan
  • Pencabutan instan: kredensial yang dicabut langsung gagal verifikasi (mis. pelanggaran/kadaluarsa)
  • Memeriksa integritas: hash mendeteksi bila isi kredensial diubah/dipalsukan
  • Selaras standar terbuka (Open Badges / W3C VC) agar portabel lintas organisasi
  • Mencatat jejak penerbitan & verifikasi untuk audit & kepatuhan
  • Issues digital credentials with a unique ID & integrity hash (verifiable credential) per completion
  • Provides a public verification portal: check ID/QR → valid, revoked, or not found
  • Instant revocation: a revoked credential fails verification immediately (e.g. violation/expiry)
  • Integrity check: the hash detects if credential contents were altered/forged
  • Aligns to open standards (Open Badges / W3C VC) for portability across organizations
  • Logs issuance & verification trails for audit & compliance
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Kredensial NB-2K9F-EXCEL diterbitkan untuk Budi Santoso (Excel untuk Analis, 10 Mar 2026). Perekrut memindai QR → portal menampilkan ‘✓ Valid, diterbitkan ‘ONE’ Nabati HCMS, hash cocok’ dalam 1 detik. Saat kredensial dicabut, verifikasi yang sama langsung menampilkan ‘⚠ Dicabut’.Credential NB-2K9F-EXCEL issued to Budi Santoso (Excel for Analysts, 10 Mar 2026). A recruiter scans the QR → the portal shows ‘✓ Valid, issued by ‘ONE’ Nabati HCMS, hash matches’ within 1 second. If the credential is revoked, the same verification instantly shows ‘⚠ Revoked’."

Penerbitan & Verifikasi Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Issuance & Verification (Demo)

Kredensial TerbitCredentials Issued
Verifikasi Hari IniVerifications Today
Valid AktifActive Valid
DicabutRevoked

🔎 Portal Verifikasi PublikPublic Verification Portal

Tip: klik “Verifikasi” pada kredensial di kiri untuk mengisi ID, atau 📷 untuk simulasi scan QR.Tip: click “Verify” on a credential at left to fill the ID, or 📷 to simulate a QR scan.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Marketplace Konten Eksternal

External Content Marketplace

Tak perlu membangun semua konten sendiri. HC AI menyambungkan LMS ke marketplace & LXP eksternal (Coursera, Udemy, LinkedIn Learning, edX) — menyatukan katalog jutaan kursus dalam satu pencarian, menormalkan metadata, menyaring duplikat, & melacak lisensi. Karyawan mencari sekali, belajar dari sumber terbaik.

No need to build all content in-house. HC AI connects the LMS to external marketplaces & LXPs (Coursera, Udemy, LinkedIn Learning, edX) — unifying millions of courses into one search, normalizing metadata, de-duplicating, & tracking licenses. Employees search once, learn from the best source.

FR-LD-054PRD: FR-INTEGRATION-006 · FR-LXP-002Konektor LXP & Agregasi Marketplace KontenLXP Connectors & Content Marketplace AggregationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Admin LMS / L&D Manager (P4/P5),As an LMS Admin / L&D Manager (P4/P5), saya ingin menyambungkan penyedia konten eksternal & menyatukan katalognya dalam satu pencarian terkelolaI want to connect external content providers & unify their catalogs into one managed search sehingga karyawan mengakses konten kelas dunia tanpa silo, tanpa duplikat, & lisensi terkendali.so that employees access world-class content without silos, without duplicates, & with licenses under control.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Sinkronisasi katalog terjadwal (harian); aktif/nonaktif konektor instan; metadata dinormalkanScheduled catalog sync (daily); instant connector enable/disable; normalized metadata
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Penyedia mana diaktifkan; sumber terbaik per skill; duplikat lintas penyedia digabungWhich providers to enable; best source per skill; cross-provider duplicates merged
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Cakupan katalog naik; biaya konten/seat ↓; utilisasi lisensi; waktu temukan konten ↓Catalog coverage up; content cost/seat ↓; license utilization; time-to-find ↓
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Konektor siap-pakai ke penyedia eksternal (Coursera, Udemy, LinkedIn Learning, edX) via API/LTI
  • Agregasi katalog ke satu pencarian terpadu; metadata dinormalkan (judul, skill, durasi, level)
  • Deteksi & gabung duplikat lintas penyedia agar hasil bersih & tidak membingungkan
  • Pelacakan lisensi & seat per penyedia; memperingatkan utilisasi rendah/habis
  • Merekomendasikan sumber terbaik per skill (rating, biaya, relevansi, bahasa)
  • Sinkronisasi terjadwal & aktif/nonaktif konektor tanpa mengganggu katalog internal
  • Ready-made connectors to external providers (Coursera, Udemy, LinkedIn Learning, edX) via API/LTI
  • Aggregates catalogs into one unified search; normalizes metadata (title, skill, duration, level)
  • Detects & merges cross-provider duplicates so results stay clean & uncluttered
  • Tracks licenses & seats per provider; warns on low/exhausted utilization
  • Recommends the best source per skill (rating, cost, relevance, language)
  • Scheduled sync & instant connector enable/disable without disrupting the internal catalog
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Konektor Coursera diaktifkan — 1.200 kursus tersinkron & digabung ke katalog. Saya temukan 18 duplikat dengan Udemy & menggabungnya. Untuk skill ‘Python’, sumber terbaik: ‘Python for Everybody’ (Coursera, 4,8★) — lebih relevan & murah per seat dibanding alternatif. Total katalog kini 2.150 kursus dalam satu pencarian.Coursera connector enabled — 1,200 courses synced & merged into the catalog. I found 18 duplicates with Udemy & merged them. For the ‘Python’ skill, best source: ‘Python for Everybody’ (Coursera, 4.8★) — more relevant & cheaper per seat than alternatives. Total catalog is now 2,150 courses in one search."

Duplikat DigabungDuplicates Merged

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Kurasi Konten & Playlist Sosial

Content Curation & Social Playlists

Belajar jadi sosial. Siapa pun bisa menyusun playlist konten, mengikuti kurator ahli, & menemukan koleksi yang sedang tren — sementara HC AI merekomendasikan playlist yang relevan dengan peran & tujuan Anda. Pengetahuan terbaik sering datang dari rekan, bukan hanya katalog resmi.

Learning gets social. Anyone can curate content playlists, follow expert curators, & discover trending collections — while HC AI recommends playlists relevant to your role & goals. The best knowledge often comes from peers, not just the official catalog.

FR-LD-055PRD: FR-LXP-004 · FR-SOCIAL-004Kurasi Konten oleh Pengguna & Playlist SosialUser Content Curation & Social PlaylistsHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar & kurator, P1),As an Employee (learner & curator, P1), saya ingin menyusun & berbagi playlist konten, mengikuti kurator, & menemukan koleksi tren/rekomendasi AII want to curate & share content playlists, follow curators, & discover trending/AI-recommended collections sehingga belajar terasa sosial, relevan, & pengetahuan rekan mudah ditemukan kembali.so that learning feels social, relevant, & peer knowledge is easy to rediscover.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Playlist dibuat kapan saja; feed tren diperbarui harian; rekomendasi AI per peran & minatPlaylists created anytime; trending feed refreshed daily; AI recs per role & interest
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Playlist mana diangkat (tren/kualitas); kurator tepercaya; moderasi konten UGCWhich playlists to surface (trending/quality); trusted curators; UGC moderation
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Konten dibuat pengguna; follow/engagement; waktu di platform ↑; penemuan kontenUser-generated content; follows/engagement; time-on-platform ↑; content discovery
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Memungkinkan siapa pun menyusun playlist konten (campur internal & eksternal) & membaginya
  • Mengikuti kurator & channel; feed sosial menampilkan playlist baru & tren
  • Merekomendasikan playlist relevan dengan peran, skill-gap, & minat (personalisasi AI)
  • Mengangkat koleksi berkualitas/tren via sinyal sosial (suka, simpan, selesai)
  • Moderasi konten buatan pengguna & pemeringkatan kurator tepercaya
  • Menyarankan item tambahan saat Anda menyusun playlist (auto-complete kurasi)
  • Lets anyone curate content playlists (mix internal & external) & share them
  • Follow curators & channels; a social feed shows new & trending playlists
  • Recommends playlists relevant to role, skill gaps, & interests (AI personalization)
  • Surfaces quality/trending collections via social signals (likes, saves, completions)
  • Moderates user-generated content & ranks trusted curators
  • Suggests extra items as you build a playlist (curation auto-complete)
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda menyusun playlist ‘Jadi Analis Data’. HC AI menyarankan menambahkan ‘Dasar SQL’ (sering dipasangkan rekan). Playlist ‘SQL Mastery’ oleh Budi sedang tren (+340 follower minggu ini) & cocok dengan tujuan Anda — mau ikuti? Saya juga membuat ‘Rekomendasi untukmu’ berisi 5 item sesuai celah skill Anda.You're building the ‘Become a Data Analyst’ playlist. HC AI suggests adding ‘SQL Basics’ (often paired by peers). Budi's ‘SQL Mastery’ playlist is trending (+340 followers this week) & matches your goal — follow it? I also built a ‘For You’ collection with 5 items matching your skill gaps."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Manajemen Regulasi & Pemetaan Kontrol

Regulatory Management & Control Mapping

Kepatuhan bukan sekadar daftar kursus. HC AI memetakan setiap regulasi (K3, Halal, ISO 22000, UU PDP) ke kontrol & pelatihan wajib yang membuktikannya — memantau cakupan, menyorot celah, & menandai saat regulasi berubah sehingga pelatihan baru segera dipetakan. Audit jadi siap kapan saja.

Compliance is more than a course list. HC AI maps each regulation (OHS, Halal, ISO 22000, PDP Law) to the controls & mandatory trainings that evidence it — monitoring coverage, highlighting gaps, & flagging when a regulation changes so new training is mapped at once. Audit-ready anytime.

FR-LD-056PRD: FR-COMPLIANCE-003 · FR-COMPLIANCE-001Pemetaan Regulasi ↔ Kontrol & Pelatihan KepatuhanRegulation ↔ Control & Training Compliance MappingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Compliance Officer / L&D Manager (P6/P5),As a Compliance Officer / L&D Manager (P6/P5), saya ingin tiap regulasi terpetakan ke kontrol & pelatihan wajib, dengan pemantauan cakupan & alarm perubahan regulasiI want each regulation mapped to mandatory controls & trainings, with coverage monitoring & regulatory-change alerts sehingga celah kepatuhan terlihat dini, audit selalu siap, & risiko sanksi turun.so that compliance gaps surface early, audits are always ready, & sanction risk drops.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Pemetaan kontinu; alarm perubahan regulasi instan; tinjauan cakupan bulanan; bukti siap auditContinuous mapping; instant regulatory-change alerts; monthly coverage review; audit-ready evidence
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Kontrol mana belum tercakup; pelatihan apa menutup celah; prioritas regulasi berisiko tinggiWhich controls are uncovered; what training closes the gap; prioritize high-risk regulations
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Cakupan kontrol ↑; celah kepatuhan → 0; temuan audit ↓; waktu respons perubahan regulasiControl coverage ↑; compliance gaps → 0; audit findings ↓; regulatory-change response time
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Memetakan tiap regulasi ke kontrol & pelatihan wajib yang menjadi buktinya (traceability)
  • Memantau cakupan per regulasi & agregat; menyorot kontrol yang belum tercakup (celah)
  • Menandai perubahan regulasi & otomatis mengusulkan kontrol/pelatihan baru yang diperlukan
  • Menugaskan pelatihan penutup celah ke populasi yang tepat & melacak penyelesaiannya
  • Menyiapkan bukti siap-audit: matriks regulasi–kontrol–pelatihan–penyelesaian
  • Memprioritaskan regulasi berisiko tinggi (sanksi/keselamatan) untuk ditutup lebih dulu
  • Maps each regulation to the mandatory controls & trainings that evidence it (traceability)
  • Monitors coverage per regulation & in aggregate; highlights uncovered controls (gaps)
  • Flags regulatory changes & auto-proposes the new controls/trainings required
  • Assigns gap-closing training to the right population & tracks completion
  • Prepares audit-ready evidence: a regulation–control–training–completion matrix
  • Prioritizes high-risk regulations (sanction/safety) to close first
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "UU Keselamatan Kerja diperbarui — prosedur LOTO kini wajib. Saya petakan kontrol baru ‘Prosedur LOTO’ (saat ini celah) ke modul pelatihan & menugaskannya ke 240 teknisi pabrik. Cakupan K3 turun ke 67% sampai pelatihan selesai. Saya sarankan prioritaskan: ini berisiko sanksi & keselamatan tinggi.The Occupational Safety Law was updated — LOTO procedure is now mandatory. I mapped the new ‘LOTO Procedure’ control (currently a gap) to a training module & assigned it to 240 plant technicians. OHS coverage drops to 67% until training completes. I suggest prioritizing: high sanction & safety risk."

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Manajemen Approval & Delegasi Wewenang

Approval Management & Delegation of Authority

Persetujuan yang tak menghambat. HC AI mengelola rantai approval bertingkat untuk pendaftaran pelatihan, sertifikasi, & anggaran L&D — dengan kotak masuk persetujuan, delegasi wewenang saat atasan cuti, & eskalasi otomatis bila SLA terlampaui. Keputusan cepat, jejak audit jelas.

Approvals that don't bottleneck. HC AI manages multi-level approval chains for training enrollment, certification, & L&D budget — with an approval inbox, delegation of authority while a manager is away, & auto-escalation on SLA breach. Fast decisions, clear audit trail.

FR-LD-057PRD: FR-ADMIN-005 · FR-DELIVERY-009Rantai Approval, Delegasi Wewenang & EskalasiApproval Chains, Delegation of Authority & EscalationHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Manajer/Approver (P5),As a Manager/Approver (P5), saya ingin rantai persetujuan yang jelas, bisa mendelegasikan wewenang saat cuti, & eskalasi otomatis bila tertundaI want clear approval chains, the ability to delegate authority when away, & auto-escalation when stalled sehingga permintaan tidak macet, keputusan tepat waktu, & tetap terkendali serta terdokumentasi.so that requests don't stall, decisions are timely, & everything stays controlled & documented.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Approval SLA 48 jam; eskalasi otomatis saat terlampaui; delegasi aktif sesuai jadwal cuti48-hour approval SLA; auto-escalation on breach; delegation active per leave schedule
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Tingkat persetujuan sesuai nilai/risiko; siapa deputi; kapan eskalasi ke atasan berikutnyaApproval level by value/risk; who is the deputy; when to escalate to the next manager
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Waktu siklus approval ↓; permintaan macet → 0; kepatuhan SLA; jejak audit lengkapApproval cycle time ↓; stalled requests → 0; SLA compliance; complete audit trail
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Menjalankan rantai approval bertingkat sesuai nilai/risiko (pelatihan, sertifikasi, anggaran)
  • Kotak masuk persetujuan terpadu dengan konteks lengkap untuk keputusan cepat
  • Delegasi wewenang: alihkan persetujuan ke deputi saat approver cuti/tidak tersedia
  • Eskalasi otomatis ke approver berikutnya bila SLA (mis. 48 jam) terlampaui
  • Mencatat jejak audit setiap keputusan: siapa, kapan, atas nama siapa (delegasi)
  • Menyarankan keputusan berbasis kebijakan & preseden untuk mempercepat approver
  • Runs multi-level approval chains by value/risk (training, certification, budget)
  • A unified approval inbox with full context for fast decisions
  • Delegation of authority: route approvals to a deputy when the approver is away/unavailable
  • Auto-escalation to the next approver when the SLA (e.g. 48h) is breached
  • Logs an audit trail for every decision: who, when, on whose behalf (delegation)
  • Suggests policy- & precedent-based decisions to speed up approvers
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Permintaan sertifikasi PMP Rina (Rp 8jt) menunggu > 48 jam — SLA terlampaui. Karena approver sedang cuti & delegasi aktif ke Sari, saya teruskan ke Sari, atau eskalasikan ke Direktur. Berdasarkan kebijakan & preseden (5 PMP sebelumnya disetujui), saya sarankan: setujui.Rina's PMP certification request (Rp 8M) has waited > 48h — SLA breached. Since the approver is on leave & delegation to Sari is active, I'll route it to Sari, or escalate to the Director. Based on policy & precedent (5 prior PMPs approved), I suggest: approve."

Delegasi AktifDelegation Active

Demo ilustratif — rantai approval, delegasi, & eskalasi disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — approval chains, delegation, & escalation simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Belajar dalam Alur Kerja

Learning in the Flow of Work

Belajar tak harus berhenti bekerja. HC AI menghadirkan microlearning tepat-waktu langsung di alat yang Anda pakai sehari-hari (spreadsheet, email, CRM, kalender) — dipicu oleh konteks pekerjaan saat itu, dalam dosis 2–5 menit, tanpa keluar dari alur kerja. Pengetahuan datang persis saat dibutuhkan.

Learning shouldn't stop work. HC AI delivers just-in-time microlearning right inside the tools you use daily (spreadsheet, email, CRM, calendar) — triggered by your current work context, in 2–5 minute doses, without leaving your workflow. Knowledge arrives exactly when needed.

FR-LD-058PRD: FR-LXP-005 · FR-DELIVERY-013Microlearning Kontekstual dalam Alur KerjaContextual Microlearning in the Flow of WorkHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin tips & microlearning relevan muncul di alat kerja saya saat saya membutuhkannya, bukan di portal terpisahI want relevant tips & microlearning to appear inside my work tools right when I need them, not in a separate portal sehingga saya belajar tanpa berhenti bekerja & langsung menerapkannya pada tugas nyata.so that I learn without stopping work & apply it immediately to the real task.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Nudge kontekstual real-time; dosis 2–5 menit; frequency capping; kanal sesuai preferensiReal-time contextual nudges; 2–5 min doses; frequency capping; channel per preference
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Konteks apa terdeteksi; nudge mana relevan & tepat waktu; kapan menahan agar tak menggangguWhat context is detected; which nudge is relevant & timely; when to hold back to avoid interrupting
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Penerapan langsung ↑; waktu-ke-kompeten ↓; engagement microlearning; relevansi nudgeImmediate application ↑; time-to-competence ↓; microlearning engagement; nudge relevance
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Mendeteksi konteks pekerjaan (alat & tugas) & memunculkan microlearning yang relevan saat itu juga
  • Menyajikan nudge di kanal pilihan: ekstensi browser, Slack/Teams, email, atau dalam aplikasi
  • Dosis singkat 2–5 menit yang langsung bisa diterapkan ke tugas nyata
  • Frequency capping & pemilihan waktu agar membantu, bukan mengganggu
  • Belajar dari umpan balik (“tidak relevan”) untuk menajamkan nudge berikutnya
  • Mencatat penerapan & menautkan ke jalur belajar lebih dalam bila diminati
  • Detects work context (tool & task) & surfaces relevant microlearning right then
  • Delivers nudges on the chosen channel: browser extension, Slack/Teams, email, or in-app
  • Short 2–5 minute doses that apply directly to the real task
  • Frequency capping & timing so it helps rather than interrupts
  • Learns from feedback (“not relevant”) to sharpen the next nudge
  • Logs application & links to deeper learning paths when there's interest
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda membuka spreadsheet penjualan & menyalin rumus berulang. HC AI memunculkan nudge 2 menit: ‘Gunakan SUMIFS untuk total per wilayah tanpa filter manual’ — langsung di samping sel Anda. Selesai & terapkan tanpa membuka portal. Saya tahan nudge berikutnya 30 menit agar tidak mengganggu fokus Anda.You opened a sales spreadsheet & kept copying a formula. HC AI surfaces a 2-min nudge: ‘Use SUMIFS to total by region without manual filtering’ — right beside your cell. Finish & apply without opening a portal. I'll hold the next nudge for 30 minutes to protect your focus."

Nudge Kontekstual Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Contextual Nudges (Demo)

Nudge DisurfaceNudges Surfaced
DiterimaAccepted
Waktu BelajarLearning Time
Konteks TerdeteksiContexts Detected
Kanal nudge:Nudge channel:
Apa yang sedang Anda kerjakan?What are you working on?
—

Demo ilustratif — deteksi konteks & nudge microlearning disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — context detection & microlearning nudges simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Integrasi Kalender & Meeting

Calendar & Meeting Integration

Belajar masuk ke kalender, bukan terlupakan. HC AI menyinkronkan sesi pelatihan ke kalender pribadi (Google/Outlook), membuat tautan Zoom/Teams/Meet otomatis, mendeteksi bentrok jadwal, & mengirim pengingat — sinkron dua arah saat sesi dijadwalkan ulang. Kehadiran naik, repotnya hilang.

Learning lands in the calendar, not in the void. HC AI syncs training sessions to personal calendars (Google/Outlook), auto-creates Zoom/Teams/Meet links, detects scheduling conflicts, & sends reminders — two-way sync when sessions are rescheduled. Attendance up, hassle gone.

FR-LD-059PRD: FR-INTEGRATION-003 · FR-DELIVERY-002Sinkronisasi Kalender & Tautan Meeting OtomatisCalendar Sync & Automatic Meeting LinksHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan & Admin LMS (P1/P4),As an Employee & LMS Admin (P1/P4), saya ingin sesi pelatihan otomatis masuk kalender saya dengan tautan meeting & deteksi bentrokI want training sessions to auto-land in my calendar with meeting links & conflict detection sehingga saya tidak lupa, tidak bentrok rapat lain, & bisa bergabung sekali klik.so that I don't forget, don't clash with other meetings, & can join in one click.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Sinkron dua arah real-time; tautan meeting otomatis; pengingat H-1/H-1jam; deteksi bentrok instanReal-time two-way sync; auto meeting links; 1-day/1-hour reminders; instant conflict detection
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Kalender mana disambungkan; platform meeting apa; bagaimana menyelesaikan bentrok jadwalWhich calendar to connect; which meeting platform; how to resolve a scheduling conflict
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Kehadiran sesi ↑; no-show ↓; bentrok jadwal → 0; waktu admin penjadwalan ↓Session attendance ↑; no-shows ↓; scheduling conflicts → 0; admin scheduling time ↓
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Menyinkronkan sesi pelatihan ke kalender pribadi (Google Calendar / Outlook) dua arah
  • Membuat tautan meeting otomatis (Zoom / Microsoft Teams / Google Meet) per sesi virtual
  • Mendeteksi bentrok dengan agenda lain & menyarankan slot pengganti
  • Mengirim pengingat (H-1, H-1 jam) & pembaruan saat sesi dijadwalkan ulang/dibatalkan
  • Menyertakan join 1-klik, materi pra-sesi, & tombol RSVP langsung di undangan
  • Sinkron status kehadiran kembali ke LMS untuk pencatatan & analitik
  • Two-way syncs training sessions to personal calendars (Google Calendar / Outlook)
  • Auto-creates meeting links (Zoom / Microsoft Teams / Google Meet) per virtual session
  • Detects conflicts with other agenda items & suggests alternative slots
  • Sends reminders (1-day, 1-hour) & updates when a session is rescheduled/cancelled
  • Embeds one-click join, pre-session materials, & an RSVP button in the invite
  • Syncs attendance status back to the LMS for records & analytics
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Kelas Virtual Analitik Data ditambahkan ke Google Calendar Anda (Sen 10:00) dengan tautan Zoom otomatis & pengingat H-1 jam. Saya mendeteksi Workshop K3 (Sel 09:00) bentrok dengan rapat tim Anda — saya sarankan geser ke 11:00 yang kosong. Setujui & semua peserta diberi tahu otomatis.The Data Analytics Virtual Class was added to your Google Calendar (Mon 10:00) with an auto Zoom link & a 1-hour reminder. I detected the OHS Workshop (Tue 09:00) clashes with your team meeting — I suggest moving it to the free 11:00 slot. Approve & all attendees are notified automatically."

Sinkron Kalender & Meeting Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Calendar & Meeting Sync (Demo)

Sesi TerjadwalScheduled Sessions
Tersinkron KalenderCalendar-Synced
Tautan DibuatLinks Created
Bentrok JadwalSchedule Conflicts
📅 Sesi Pelatihan MendatangUpcoming Training Sessions

Demo ilustratif — sambungan kalender, tautan meeting, & resolusi bentrok disimulasikan di browser.Illustrative demo — calendar connection, meeting links, & conflict resolution simulated in the browser.

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Analitik Perilaku & Funnel Belajar

Behavioral Analytics & Learning Funnel

Di mana pembelajar berhenti? HC AI melacak perjalanan belajar tahap demi tahap (Daftar → Mulai → Berjalan → Selesai → Diterapkan), mengukur konversi antar-tahap, & menyorot titik drop-off terbesar — lalu menyarankan intervensi tepat sasaran. Data perilaku jadi aksi perbaikan, bukan sekadar grafik.

Where do learners drop off? HC AI tracks the learning journey stage by stage (Enroll → Start → In-progress → Complete → Apply), measures stage-to-stage conversion, & highlights the biggest drop-off — then suggests a targeted intervention. Behavioral data becomes corrective action, not just charts.

FR-LD-060PRD: FR-ANALYTICS-002 · FR-ANALYTICS-001Funnel Pembelajaran & Analitik Perilaku PembelajarLearning Funnel & Learner Behavioral AnalyticsHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Spesialis L&D / Analis Pembelajaran (P3/P5),As an L&D Specialist / Learning Analyst (P3/P5), saya ingin melihat funnel perjalanan belajar & titik drop-off terbesar dengan analitik perilakuI want to see the learning-journey funnel & the biggest drop-off points with behavioral analytics sehingga saya tahu persis di mana & mengapa pembelajar berhenti, lalu memperbaikinya.so that I know exactly where & why learners stop, then fix it.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Funnel diperbarui harian; konversi antar-tahap; analisis kohort & segmen perilakuFunnel refreshed daily; stage-to-stage conversion; cohort & behavioral segment analysis
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Tahap mana drop-off terbesar; intervensi apa (pengingat, ubah konten, nudge) yang dipasangWhich stage has the biggest drop-off; which intervention (reminder, content edit, nudge) to apply
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Tingkat penyelesaian ↑; drop-off ↓; tingkat penerapan; engagement antar-tahapCompletion rate ↑; drop-off ↓; application rate; inter-stage engagement
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Melacak funnel perjalanan belajar: Daftar → Mulai → Berjalan → Selesai → Diterapkan
  • Menghitung konversi & drop-off antar-tahap; menyorot kebocoran terbesar otomatis
  • Analitik perilaku: pola waktu belajar, perangkat, titik keluar, & segmen kohort
  • Mendiagnosis penyebab drop-off (konten terlalu panjang, kurang relevan, lupa) berbasis sinyal
  • Menyarankan intervensi tepat: pengingat, microlearning, ubah urutan/konten, nudge
  • Mengukur dampak intervensi pada funnel & melakukan iterasi berkelanjutan
  • Tracks the learning-journey funnel: Enroll → Start → In-progress → Complete → Apply
  • Computes inter-stage conversion & drop-off; auto-highlights the biggest leak
  • Behavioral analytics: study-time patterns, device, exit points, & cohort segments
  • Diagnoses drop-off causes (content too long, low relevance, forgetting) from signals
  • Suggests targeted interventions: reminders, microlearning, reorder/edit content, nudges
  • Measures intervention impact on the funnel & iterates continuously
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Di kursus ‘Analitik Data Dasar’, drop-off terbesar di tahap Mulai → Berjalan (turun 34%) — banyak yang berhenti di modul 2 yang panjang. Saya sarankan pecah modul 2 jadi 3 microlearning & kirim pengingat H-2. Simulasi: penyelesaian naik dari 41% ke ~54%.In ‘Data Analytics Basics’, the biggest drop-off is Start → In-progress (down 34%) — many stop at the long module 2. I suggest splitting module 2 into 3 microlearnings & sending a 2-day reminder. Simulation: completion rises from 41% to ~54%."

Funnel Pembelajaran Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Learning Funnel (Demo)

PendaftarEnrolled
PenyelesaianCompletion
Drop-off TerbesarBiggest Drop-off
PenerapanApplication
📚 Kursus:Course:
Funnel Perjalanan BelajarLearning-Journey Funnel
