Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

AI Role-Play & Simulasi Percakapan

AI Role-Play & Conversation Simulation

Latih soft skill di ruang aman. HC AI memerankan lawan bicara — pelanggan marah, manajer saat negosiasi, rekan yang meminta tolong — lalu Anda berlatih merespons, mendapat skor & umpan balik instan tiap giliran. Praktik berulang tanpa risiko, sampai mahir.

Practice soft skills in a safe space. HC AI role-plays the other party — an angry customer, a manager in a negotiation, a colleague asking for help — then you practice responding, getting a score & instant feedback each turn. Repeated, risk-free practice until you master it.

FR-LD-061PRD: FR-SMITH-006 · FR-DELIVERY-004Simulasi Percakapan Berbasis AI & Coaching Real-timeAI-based Conversation Simulation & Real-time CoachingHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Karyawan (Pembelajar, P1),As an Employee (learner, P1), saya ingin berlatih percakapan sulit dengan lawan bicara AI & mendapat skor serta umpan balik tiap giliranI want to practice difficult conversations with an AI counterpart & get a score plus feedback each turn sehingga saya membangun keterampilan & percaya diri sebelum menghadapinya di dunia nyata.so that I build skill & confidence before facing it in the real world.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Latihan kapan saja & berulang; respons AI & skor instan; skenario adaptif per peranPractice anytime & repeatedly; instant AI response & score; role-adaptive scenarios
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Respons mana paling efektif; teknik apa (empati, framing, solusi) yang dilatih & dinilaiWhich response is most effective; which technique (empathy, framing, solution) to practice & score
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Skor simulasi ↑; kepercayaan diri; transfer ke kinerja nyata; jam latihan amanSimulation score ↑; confidence; transfer to real performance; safe practice hours
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Memerankan lawan bicara realistis (pelanggan, manajer, rekan, kandidat) sesuai skenario
  • Merespons dinamis terhadap pilihan/jawaban pembelajar, termasuk emosi & keberatan
  • Memberi skor & coaching instan tiap giliran berbasis teknik (empati, framing, solusi)
  • Skenario beragam: layanan pelanggan, negosiasi, umpan balik sulit, wawancara, penjualan
  • Ringkasan akhir: skor, kekuatan, area perbaikan, & saran latihan ulang
  • Aman & berulang — membangun keterampilan tanpa risiko reputasi/relasi nyata
  • Role-plays a realistic counterpart (customer, manager, peer, candidate) per scenario
  • Responds dynamically to the learner's choices/answers, including emotion & objections
  • Gives an instant score & coaching each turn based on technique (empathy, framing, solution)
  • Varied scenarios: customer service, negotiation, tough feedback, interview, sales
  • Final summary: score, strengths, improvement areas, & a re-practice suggestion
  • Safe & repeatable — builds skill without real reputation/relationship risk
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Skenario ‘Pelanggan Marah’: HC AI berperan sebagai pelanggan yang kecewa. Anda memilih merespons dengan empati & minta maaf — skor giliran 25/25. Coaching: ‘Bagus, Anda menerapkan Listen & Apologize.’ Skor akhir 90% (Sangat Baik). Area latih ulang: berikan batas waktu solusi lebih spesifik.‘Angry Customer’ scenario: HC AI plays the upset customer. You chose to respond with empathy & an apology — turn score 25/25. Coaching: ‘Great, you applied Listen & Apologize.’ Final score 90% (Excellent). Re-practice area: give a more specific solution timeline."

Simulasi Percakapan Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Conversation Simulation (Demo)

SkenarioScenarios
Sesi SelesaiSessions Done
Skor Rata-rataAverage Score
Skill DilatihSkills Practiced

Demo ilustratif — peran AI, skor, & coaching disimulasikan di browser (alur bercabang).Illustrative demo — AI role, scoring, & coaching simulated in the browser (branching flow).

Kapabilitas HC AI HC AI Capability

Konfigurasi Sistem & Pengaturan Global

System Configuration & Global Settings

Satu panel untuk mengatur seluruh LMS. Admin mengonaktifkan fitur, menetapkan kebijakan default (nilai lulus, zona waktu, bahasa), notifikasi, & keamanan — HC AI memvalidasi perubahan, menandai yang berisiko, & menyimpan jejak konfigurasi. Tata kelola jelas, perubahan terkendali.

One panel to govern the whole LMS. Admins toggle features, set default policies (passing score, timezone, language), notifications, & security — HC AI validates changes, flags risky ones, & keeps a configuration trail. Clear governance, controlled change.

FR-LD-062PRD: FR-ADMIN-003 · FR-ADMIN-001Pengaturan Global, Feature Flag & Kebijakan DefaultGlobal Settings, Feature Flags & Default PoliciesHC AI
Kisah PenggunaUser Story
Sebagai Admin Sistem LMS (P4),As an LMS System Admin (P4), saya ingin satu tempat untuk mengonfigurasi fitur, kebijakan default, notifikasi, & keamanan secara globalI want one place to configure features, default policies, notifications, & security globally sehingga perilaku platform konsisten, sesuai kebijakan organisasi, & mudah dikendalikan.so that platform behavior is consistent, aligned to org policy, & easy to control.
Irama / SLACadence / SLA
Perubahan berlaku setelah disimpan; validasi & pratinjau dampak; jejak versi konfigurasiChanges apply on save; validation & impact preview; configuration version trail
Titik KeputusanDecision Point
Fitur mana diaktifkan; kebijakan default apa; pengaturan keamanan mana yang diwajibkanWhich features to enable; which default policies; which security settings to enforce
KPI TerkaitLinked KPI
Konsistensi konfigurasi; kesalahan setting ↓; waktu administrasi ↓; kepatuhan kebijakanConfig consistency; misconfigurations ↓; admin time ↓; policy compliance
Yang dilakukan HC AIWhat HC AI does
  • Panel pengaturan global terpusat: umum, fitur (feature flag), notifikasi, & keamanan
  • Kebijakan default: nilai lulus, zona waktu, bahasa, masa berlaku sertifikat, batas sesi
  • Feature flag untuk mengaktifkan/menonaktifkan modul tanpa rilis ulang
  • Memvalidasi perubahan & menandai konfigurasi berisiko (mis. 2FA nonaktif) sebelum disimpan
  • Pratinjau dampak & perubahan belum-tersimpan; simpan, batalkan, atau kembalikan ke default
  • Jejak versi konfigurasi untuk audit & pemulihan (siapa mengubah apa & kapan)
  • Centralized global settings panel: general, features (flags), notifications, & security
  • Default policies: passing score, timezone, language, certificate validity, session limit
  • Feature flags to enable/disable modules without a re-release
  • Validates changes & flags risky configs (e.g. 2FA disabled) before saving
  • Impact preview & unsaved-changes tracking; save, discard, or reset to defaults
  • Configuration version trail for audit & recovery (who changed what & when)
Contoh keluaran HC AIHC AI example output "Anda menonaktifkan ‘Wajib 2FA’ & menurunkan nilai lulus ke 60. HC AI menandai: menonaktifkan 2FA menurunkan keamanan — yakin? Ada 3 perubahan belum disimpan. Setelah disimpan, saya catat versi konfigurasi v18 (oleh Anda, hari ini) agar bisa dikembalikan kapan saja.You disabled ‘Require 2FA’ & lowered the passing score to 60. HC AI flags: disabling 2FA reduces security — are you sure? There are 3 unsaved changes. Once saved, I record configuration version v18 (by you, today) so it can be rolled back anytime."

Panel Konfigurasi Interaktif (Demo)Interactive Configuration Panel (Demo)

Total PengaturanTotal Settings
Fitur MenyalaFeatures On
Belum DisimpanUnsaved
StatusStatus

Diturunkan dari tabel pemetaan FR-LD ↔ PRD di aplikasi ini. Kode FR-LD disederhanakan & dipetakan ke FR PRD — nama AI tetap “HC AI”.Derived from this app's FR-LD ↔ PRD mapping table. FR-LD codes are simplified & mapped to PRD FRs — the AI stays named “HC AI”.

Peta Integrasi Integration Map

Peta Integrasi Lintas Modul: LMS sebagai Mesin Kapabilitas

Cross-Module Integration Map: LMS as Capability Engine

Bagaimana LMS terhubung ke seluruh modul HCMS dan sistem bisnis eksternal. HC AI mengorkestrasi aliran data dua arah antara LMS dan 10+ modul internal untuk memastikan pembelajaran terhubung langsung ke pengembangan karier, manajemen kinerja, dan perencanaan workforce.

How LMS connects to all HCMS modules and external business systems. HC AI orchestrates two-way data flows between LMS and 10+ internal modules to ensure learning is directly linked to career development, performance management, and workforce planning.

Dari Modul / SistemFrom Module / System Data yang Mengalir ke LMSData Flowing to LMS FR LMS yang TerdampakImpacted LMS FR Dampak & NilaiImpact & Value
Performance Mgmt (FR-PM-001) Gap kompetensi, tujuan IDP, performance ratings, 360-feedbackCompetency gaps, IDP goals, performance ratings, 360-feedback FR-LD-001b / FR-LD-002a Rekomendasi kursus berbasis gap; pembuatan learning path berbasis IDP; tracking dampak training pada performanceGap-driven course recommendations; IDP-based learning path creation; training impact on performance tracking
Career Management (FR-CM-001) Career paths, persyaratan grade progression, kesiapan suksesorCareer paths, grade progression requirements, successor readiness FR-LD-002a / FR-LD-004b Learning path selaras karier per job family; prasyarat sertifikasi untuk promosi; pelacakan program pengembangan suksesorCareer-aligned learning paths per job family; certification prerequisites for promotion; successor development program tracking
Employee Core Admin (FR-ECA-001) Profil karyawan, inventaris skills, penugasan jabatan, status onboardingEmployee profiles, skills inventory, job assignments, onboarding status FR-LD-001b / FR-LD-002b / FR-LD-004b Rekomendasi personal berdasarkan peran/grade; auto-assignment hire baru; pembaruan profil skills saat kursus diselesaikanPersonal recommendations by role/grade; new hire auto-assignment; skills profile updated on course completion
Talent Acquisition (FR-TA-001) Data karyawan baru, trigger onboarding, persyaratan peranNew hire data, onboarding trigger, role requirements FR-LD-002b Mandatory training Day 1 auto-assigned; learning path onboarding berbasis peran; akses pre-boarding ke konten pembelajaranDay 1 mandatory training auto-assigned; role-based onboarding learning path; pre-boarding learning access
Organization Design (FR-OD-001) Struktur departemen, job families, competency frameworkDepartment structure, job families, competency framework FR-LD-001a / FR-LD-005a Pemetaan katalog kursus ke kompetensi; analisis gap skills per departemen; strategi capability building organisasiCourse catalog mapped to competencies; per-department skills gap analysis; org-wide capability building strategy
Compensation & Benefits (FR-CB-001) Alokasi anggaran L&D, tracking biaya trainingL&D budget allocation, training cost tracking FR-LD-002b / FR-LD-005b Tracking anggaran per departemen; kalkulasi cost-per-competency; pengukuran ROI untuk justifikasi anggaranPer-department budget tracking; cost-per-competency calculation; ROI measurement for budget justification
People Analytics (FR-PA-001) Prediksi turnover, data keterlibatan, tren workforceTurnover predictions, engagement data, workforce trends FR-LD-005 Korelasi training dengan retensi; analisis hubungan engagement-learning; prediksi permintaan skillTraining-retention correlation; engagement-learning relationship analysis; skill demand forecasting
Role-Based Access Mgmt (FR-RAM-001) Role permissions, batas akses dataRole permissions, data access boundaries FR-LD-003a Visibilitas dan akses kursus berbasis peran; konten training sensitif dibatasi berdasarkan clearance; training compliance per yurisdiksi regulasiRole-based course visibility and access; sensitive training content restricted by clearance; compliance training by regulatory jurisdiction
External Learning Platforms (LinkedIn Learning, Coursera) Katalog kursus pihak ketiga, data completion, sertifikasiThird-party course catalogs, completion data, certifications FR-LD-001 / FR-LD-004b Katalog terpadu: kursus internal + eksternal; completion eksternal disinkronkan ke LMS; sertifikasi pihak ketiga dilacak secara terpusatUnified catalog: internal + external courses; external completion synced to LMS; third-party certifications tracked centrally
Regulatory Bodies (BNSP, SHRM, PMI, ISO) Persyaratan sertifikasi, mandat compliance, aturan renewal per negaraCertification requirements, compliance mandates, renewal rules per country FR-LD-002b / FR-LD-004b Training mandatory per regulasi negara; manajemen renewal sertifikasi; compliance dashboard per yurisdiksiMandatory training per country regulation; certification renewal management; compliance dashboard by jurisdiction
Permintaan Fitur Feature Requests

Backlog Kapabilitas

Capability Backlog

Kapabilitas yang diminta, dipetakan ke persona dan functional requirement. Tag FR biru bisa diklik untuk melompat ke kartu terkait; tag oranye adalah FR baru yang direncanakan.

Requested capabilities, mapped to personas and functional requirements. Blue FR tags jump to the related card; orange tags are planned new FRs.

Pemetaan FR-LD ↔ FR PRDFR-LD ↔ PRD FR Mapping

Kode alur FR-LD pada dokumen ini adalah label penyederhanaan; berikut pemetaannya ke kode FR resmi di PRD. Semua — termasuk yang ditandai ‘rencana’ (008/009/010) — sudah ada di PRD (tidak out of scope).The FR-LD flow codes in this document are simplified labels; below is their mapping to the official PRD FR codes. Everything — including the ‘planned’ ones (008/009/010) — already exists in the PRD (not out of scope).

FR-LD-005bFR-ANALYTICS-003 / FR-SMITH-007

A. Pengalaman PesertaA. Learner Experience

Lihat riwayat training yang sudah diikuti, ulang materi, ikut tes ulang, dan telusuri katalog training mendatang.See the history of trainings taken, replay material, retake tests, and browse upcoming training in the catalog.
👤 Karyawan
Tahu ada assignment baru dari L&D atau atasan; lihat gap kompetensi dari performance, career path/aspirasi, atau sengaja mempelajari skill atasan.Know about new assignments from L&D or the manager; see competency gaps from performance, career path/aspiration, or deliberately learn the manager's skills.
👤 Karyawan
Lihat skill matrix pribadi vs posisi saat ini, dan gap menuju posisi setingkat di atasnya.See a personal skill matrix vs the current position, and the gap toward the next position up.
👤 KaryawanFR-LD-008 · rencanaplanned

B. Authoring & TrainerB. Authoring & Trainer

Module builder yang memandu trainer membuat modul sendiri — tidak harus video: presentasi berjeda pertanyaan, plus workbook (download atau latihan langsung di web).A module builder that guides trainers to create their own modules — not only video: presentations paused by questions, plus a workbook (downloadable or practised in-site).
🎓 Spesialis L&DFR-LD-009 · rencanaplanned
Trainer dipandu HC AI / pertanyaan panduan saat membuat modul; termasuk download & upload template materi ajar.Trainers guided by HC AI / guiding questions while authoring; including download & upload of teaching-material templates.
🎓 Spesialis L&DFR-LD-009 · rencanaplanned
Trainer melihat submission tugas peserta untuk training berbasis workshop.Trainers review participants' assignment submissions for workshop-based training.
🎓 Spesialis L&DFR-LD-010 · rencanaplanned
Dukungan SCORM (1.2 / 2004) untuk paket konten e-learning standar.SCORM (1.2 / 2004) support for standard e-learning content packages.
🎓 Spesialis L&D
Impor video via tautan YouTube untuk konten berkualitas (mis. TEDx, Prof. Dave Ulrich, Prof. Armin Trost).Import videos via YouTube link for high-quality content (e.g. TEDx, Prof. Dave Ulrich, Prof. Armin Trost).
🎓 Spesialis L&D

C. Penugasan & EventC. Assignment & Events

L&D / LMS Specialist meng-assign training, tugas, dan event; menentukan venue serta format (daring/luring).L&D / LMS Specialist assigns training, tasks, and events; sets the venue and format (online/offline).
🧭 L&D ManagerFR-LD-010 · rencanaplanned

D. Tata Kelola & AdminD. Governance & Admin

Master Admin mengatur konten lintas seluruh negara & seluruh business unit.Master Admin manages content across all countries & all business units.
⚙️ Master Admin
Admin Module melakukan setup mendalam & detail LMS (ahli learning management system).Admin Module performs deep, detailed LMS setup (a learning-management-system expert).
⚙️ Admin Module

E. Dashboard & MonitoringE. Dashboard & Monitoring

HCBP melihat progress pegawai di divisi yang dikelolanya.HCBP sees the progress of employees in the divisions they manage.
🧩 HCBP
Cockpit dashboard progress belajar untuk LMS Specialist, Manager, dan HCBP.A cockpit dashboard of learning progress for the LMS Specialist, Manager, and HCBP.
🧭 L&D Manager🧩 HCBP
Referensi Reference

Glosarium Istilah LMS

LMS Glossary

Definisi singkat istilah kunci yang dipakai di sepanjang dokumen alur LMS ini.

Short definitions of the key terms used throughout this LMS flow document.

LMSLearning Management System — platform untuk mengelola, mengirim, dan melacak pembelajaran karyawan secara end-to-end.Learning Management System — the platform to manage, deliver, and track employee learning end-to-end.
HC AIAsisten AI tunggal yang menjalankan setiap tahap alur LMS: kurasi, desain path, delivery, asesmen, hingga analitik ROI.The single AI assistant that runs every stage of the LMS flow: curation, path design, delivery, assessment, and ROI analytics.
SCORMStandar pengemasan konten e-learning (1.2 / 2004) agar kursus dapat dijalankan dan dilacak antar-LMS.E-learning content packaging standard (1.2 / 2004) so courses run and are tracked across LMS platforms.
xAPIExperience API (Tin Can) — standar pelacakan aktivitas belajar lintas sistem, termasuk di luar LMS.Experience API (Tin Can) — a standard for tracking learning activity across systems, including outside the LMS.
Learning PathRangkaian kursus terstruktur yang menuntun karyawan dari kompetensi saat ini menuju target peran.A structured sequence of courses guiding an employee from current competency to the target role.
Competency FrameworkKerangka kompetensi yang mendefinisikan skill dan level yang dibutuhkan tiap peran/job family.A framework defining the skills and levels required for each role/job family.
Skills TaxonomyTaksonomi skill terstandardisasi yang dipakai HC AI untuk auto-tagging konten dan pemetaan kompetensi.A standardized skills taxonomy used by HC AI for content auto-tagging and competency mapping.
Quality ScoreRating 0–100 untuk konten berdasarkan keterlibatan, kejelasan, cakupan asesmen, dan mobile-friendliness. Di bawah 70 dikembalikan untuk perbaikan.A 0–100 content rating based on engagement, clarity, assessment coverage, and mobile-friendliness. Below 70 is returned for improvement.
Gap AnalysisAnalisis kesenjangan antara kompetensi yang dimiliki karyawan dan yang dibutuhkan peran, dasar penyusunan learning path.Analysis of the gap between an employee's current and required competencies, the basis for designing a learning path.
ILTInstructor-Led Training — pelatihan dipandu instruktur, baik tatap muka (classroom) maupun virtual.Instructor-Led Training — instructor-guided training, either classroom or virtual.
MicrolearningKonten belajar berdurasi pendek dan terfokus, cocok untuk akses cepat via mobile.Short, focused learning content suited to quick mobile access.
Adaptive AssessmentAsesmen yang menyesuaikan tingkat kesulitan soal berdasarkan jawaban peserta secara real-time.An assessment that adjusts question difficulty in real time based on the learner's answers.
Kirkpatrick ModelFramework evaluasi pembelajaran 4 level: Reaksi, Pembelajaran, Perilaku, dan Hasil/ROI.A 4-level learning evaluation framework: Reaction, Learning, Behavior, and Results/ROI.
ROIReturn on Investment — pengukuran dampak bisnis dari investasi L&D dibanding biayanya.Return on Investment — measuring the business impact of L&D spend relative to its cost.
Uji Pemahaman Knowledge Check

Cek Pemahaman: 5 Alur LMS

Knowledge Check: The 5 LMS Flows

Lima pertanyaan singkat untuk memastikan pemahaman inti tiap alur. Skor minimal 4/5 untuk lulus. Hasil tersimpan otomatis.

Five short questions to confirm core understanding of each flow. A score of at least 4/5 passes. Results are saved automatically.

1. Pada kurasi konten, apa yang terjadi jika quality score sebuah kursus di bawah 70?1. During content curation, what happens if a course's quality score is below 70?

2. Apa dasar utama HC AI menyusun learning path dan penugasan training?2. What is HC AI's primary basis for designing learning paths and training assignments?

3. Mode delivery pembelajaran yang didukung dalam alur ini mencakup…3. The learning delivery modes supported in this flow include…

4. Pendekatan asesmen dan sertifikasi pada Alur 4 menggunakan…4. The assessment and certification approach in Flow 4 uses…

5. Framework yang dipakai untuk mengukur efektivitas pembelajaran dan ROI adalah…5. The framework used to measure learning effectiveness and ROI is…

Kesiapan Readiness

Checklist Kesiapan Go-Live

Go-Live Readiness Checklist

Daftar kesiapan menuju go-live Wave 1 (Oktober 2026), dikelompokkan menjadi Data, Sistem, Konten, dan Manusia. Status tersimpan otomatis.

Readiness checklist toward Wave 1 go-live (October 2026), grouped into Data, System, Content, and People. Status is saved automatically.

A. Data & MigrasiA. Data & Migration

B. Sistem & IntegrasiB. System & Integration

C. Konten & KurikulumC. Content & Curriculum

D. Manusia & Change ManagementD. People & Change Management

Kesiapan Go-Live Wave 1Wave 1 Go-Live Readiness 0 / 20 selesai

Mulai centang item yang sudah selesai. Status tersimpan otomatis.

telah menyelesaikan kajian penuh dokumentasi alur Learning Management System — 5 alur proses, 12 functional requirement, dan filosofi 70:20:10 — dengan capaian 100% (bagian dibaca, uji pemahaman, dan checklist go-live).has completed the full study of the Learning Management System flow documentation — 5 process flows, 12 functional requirements, and the 70:20:10 philosophy — achieving 100% (sections read, knowledge check, and go-live checklist).
